V005-N00526.label: 带脉
V005-N00526.path: 十四经穴名称与定位｜足少阳胆经穴
V005-N00526.definition:
在侧腹部，第11肋骨游离端垂线与脐水平线的交点上。
注1：侧卧举臂，屈上足伸下足，先确认第12 肋游离端，再沿着肋弓缘向前触摸到的浮肋即第11肋骨游离端，直下与脐相平处取之。
注2：章门(LR13)直下，横平脐(中)。

V005-N00526.label: 带脉
V005-N00526.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于季胁，斜向横行，绕腰腹一周。

V005-N00619.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00619.label: 秋燥病
V005-N00619.path: 外感病类术语｜外感时令类病
V005-N00619.definition: 因燥邪侵袭肺卫,耗伤阴津所致。临床以发热、头痛，咳嗽或干咳，咯痰不爽,咽干鼻燥，口渴等为特征，多发于秋季的外感时病。

V005-N00619.label: 秋燥
V005-N00619.englishNames: Autumn Dryness Diseases; autumn dryness; autumndryness disease
V005-N00619.definition: 秋季感受燥邪引起的湿病。

V005-N00619.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00619.label: 秋燥
V005-N00619.path: TC[中医病症]｜伤寒和温病｜温病
V005-N00619.definition: 秋季感受燥邪引起的温病。

V005-N00619.label: 秋燥
V005-N00619.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V005-N00619.definition: 是秋季感受燥热病邪，初起以病在肺卫并具有津气干燥特征的急性外感热病。

V005-N00619.label: 秋燥病
V005-N00619.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病

V005-N00619.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00619.label: 秋燥病
V005-N00619.englishNames: autumn dryness disease; Autumn dryness; autumn-dryness disease
V005-N00619.pinyinNames: qiu zao bing; qiū zào bìng
V005-N00619.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00619.definition: A condition characterized by fever, headache, dry cough or difficulty in expectoration of sputum, dry nose and throat, and thirst. Often occurs when dryness affects the exterior and consumes yin fluids.

V005-N00781.label: 气脱病
V005-N00781.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病
V005-N00781.definition: 因各种原因引起大出血，或剧烈吐泻、疼痛、外邪壅闭等，致使真气急骤外泄所致。临床以骤然昏仆,面色苍白,冷汗淋漓,气短不续，甚或伴见目合、口开，鼻息低微，手撒、肢凉，二便自遗等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00781.label: 气脱
V005-N00781.englishNames: qi desertion; qi collapse; qi prostration
V005-N00781.definition: 由于邪气太盛，正气骤伤；或长期损耗，正气衰竭；或大汗、大吐、大出血致气随液脱、气随血脱等原因，导致气不内守而外选脱失的危重病理变化。

V005-N00781.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00781.label: 气脱
V005-N00781.aliases: 元气衰败； 元气虚脱
V005-N00781.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V005-N00781.definition: 真气因某种原因而急骤外泄，以突然面色苍白，口唇青紫，汗出肢冷，呼吸微弱，舌淡脉细数为常见症的危重证候。

V005-N00781.label: 气脱
V005-N00781.aliases: 元气败脱； 元气将脱； 正气暴脱
V005-N00781.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调
V005-N00781.definition: 指气不内守，大量向外亡失，以致生命机能突然衰竭的一种病理状态。

V005-N00781.label: 气脱病
V005-N00781.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V005-N00781.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00781.label: 气脱
V005-N00781.englishNames: qi desertion; qi collapse; qi prostration; Qi collapse
V005-N00781.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00781.definition: A pathological state in which extreme deficiency of qi causes qi to float on the exterior of the body.

V005-N00781.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00781.label: 气脱
V005-N00781.englishNames: qi prostration; qi collapse; qi desertion

V005-N00781.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00781.label: 气脱
V005-N00781.definition: desertion of qi due to sudden damage to the healthy qi, massive loss of blood, profuse sweating, excessive vomiting and diarrhea, or due to prolonged consumption in a chronic disease

V005-N00808.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00808.label: 液脱病
V005-N00808.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病
V005-N00808.definition: 因外感热病，或突发剧烈呕吐、腹泻等，致使津液急剧耗失，气阴欲脱所致。临床以口渴、唇枯，少尿或无尿,肌肤干瘪，目眶凹陷,四肢冰冷，起立晕厥,甚则嗜睡、意识不清，脉微或细数等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00808.label: 液脱
V005-N00808.englishNames: liquid collapse; liquid depletion; turbid fluid depletion
V005-N00808.definition: 由于汗、吐、下损伤津液，造成阴液脱失的病理变化。

V005-N00808.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00808.label: 津液亏虚
V005-N00808.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病
V005-N00808.definition: 津液亏少，脏腑组织失却濡养，以口燥咽干、唇焦或裂、渴欲饮水、小便短少、大便干结、舌红少津、脉细数无力等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00808.label: 液脱
V005-N00808.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜津液失常｜津液不足
V005-N00808.definition: 指人体阴液极度亏损而致形体羸瘦，脏腑生理功能衰微，甚则生命垂危的病理变化。

V005-N00808.label: 液脱
V005-N00808.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V005-N00808.definition: 因津液大量急剧耗失，以致阴亏脉陷，气阴欲脱。以口渴无尿，肤燥脉微，血压显著降低为主要表现的脱病类疾病。

V005-N00808.label: 液脱病
V005-N00808.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V005-N00808.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00808.label: 液脱
V005-N00808.englishNames: liquid depletion; liquid collapse; turbid fluid depletion

V005-N00927.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00927.label: 精脱病
V005-N00927.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病
V005-N00927.definition: 因房事过度，纵欲走阳，或久病劳损，肾精亏损，官窍失养所致。临床以同房时忽然昏冒,精关走泄，大汗淋漓，可伴见腰酸，耳聋等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00927.label: 精脱
V005-N00927.englishNames: essence collapse; essence prostrstion; collapse of essence; depletion of essence
V005-N00927.definition: 过劳伤精耗气，导致肾中精气亏损脱失，它窍失养的病理变化。

V005-N00927.label: 精脱
V005-N00927.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜精失调

V005-N00927.label: 精脱病
V005-N00927.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V005-N00927.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00927.label: 精脱
V005-N00927.englishNames: essence prostrstion; essence collapse; depletion of essence

V005-N00927.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00927.label: 精脱
V005-N00927.definition: a pathological change characterized by depletion and loss of kidney essence that leads to impaired hearing

V005-N00795.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00795.label: 血脱病
V005-N00795.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病
V005-N00795.definition: 因各种原因导致大量失血，血脉空虚，甚或气血欲脱所致。临床以突发大出血，面色苍白，脉微或孔，肢体冰冷，伴见血压持续下降等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00795.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00795.label: 血脱
V005-N00795.path: 第1部分 内科学｜急症
V005-N00795.definition: 突然大量失血，或长期反复出血，血脉空虚，气血欲脱，以出血，面色苍白，头晕目眩，心悸怔仲，气微而短，四肢厥冷，渐至神志昏蒙，舌淡白，脉微或芤，或微细欲绝，血压持续下降，低于90/60mmHg等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00795.label: 血脱
V005-N00795.englishNames: blood prostration; blood depletion; blood collapse
V005-N00795.definition: 各种急性大出血，导致的血海空虚，血液脱失的危重病理变化。

V005-N00795.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00795.label: 血脱
V005-N00795.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V005-N00795.definition: 突然大量出血或长期反复出血，血液亡脱于外，以面色苍白、头晕眼花、心悸怔忡、气微而短、四肢清冷、舌淡脉芤等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00795.label: 血脱
V005-N00795.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调
V005-N00795.definition: 指各种急性大出血，导致的血海空虚，血液脱失的危重病理变化。

V005-N00795.label: 血脱
V005-N00795.englishNames: Blood Prostration; Collapse Due to Massive Hemorrhage; Exhaustion of the Blood; Hemorrhagic Shock; Massive Bleeding
V005-N00795.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V005-N00795.definition: 因突然大量失血，以致血脉空虚，全身失却血液濡养，气血欲脱。以出血，面色苍白，脉微或芤，血压显著降低为主要表现的脱病类疾病。

V005-N00795.label: 血脱病
V005-N00795.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V005-N00795.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00795.label: 血脱

V005-N00795.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00795.label: 亡血
V005-N00795.definition: acute critical deficiency of blood, mostly due to massive hemorrhage, also called blood desertion

V005-N00666.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.path: 气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病
V005-N00666.definition: 因饮邪留于肠胃所致。临床以形体素肥今瘦,饮食减少,肠鸣、便溏，或伴见心悸,短气,呕吐涎沫等为特征的痰饮病。

V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.englishNames: phlegm and fluid-retention; phlegm-retained fluid; phlegm and fluid retention
V005-N00666.definition: 痰与饮的合称，脏腑病变过程中渗出并积存于体内的清理产物，可阻碍气血运行而成为继发的致病因素。

V005-N00666.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因
V005-N00666.definition: 机体水液代谢障碍所形成的病理产物，这种病理产物形成之后，作为一种致病因素作用于机体，阻滞经络，阻碍气血，影响脏腑，从而引起各种复杂的病理变化，导致各种新的病证出现。

V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.path: 病因病机｜病因｜病理产物
V005-N00666.definition: 指机体水液代谢障碍所形成的质地黏稠的病理产物。属继发性致病因素。

V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V005-N00666.definition: 多因素体脾虚，运化无力，复加饮食失节，或因感受湿邪，致脾阳受损，水湿失运，停于胃肠引起。主要表现是心下满闷，呕吐清水痰涎，胃肠沥沥有声。

V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V005-N00666.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜伴随产物

V005-N00666.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.englishNames: phlegm fluid retention; phlegm-fluid retention; Phlegm-fluid retention
V005-N00666.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00666.definition: Characterized by obesity with recent weight loss and a decreased appetite, bowel sounds, and loose stools. Associated symptoms may include palpitations, shortness of breath and vomiting of foamy saliva. Often results from fluid retention in the stomach and intestines.

V005-N00666.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮

V005-N00666.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.definition: a combination of phlegm and retained fluid as an entity to cause disease, also called phlegm-fluid retention

V005-N00738.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00738.label: 阴挺
V005-N00738.englishNames: prolapse of uterus; metroptosis; uterine prolapse; prolapse of the uterus; uterine or vaginal prolapse
V005-N00738.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜妇科杂病
V005-N00738.definition: 以子宫从正常位置沿阴道下移，甚至完全脱出于阴道口外，或阴道前后壁膨出为主要表现的疾病。

V005-N00738.label: 亡阴
V005-N00738.englishNames: yin prostration; yin exhaustion; yin collapse; yin depletion
V005-N00738.definition: 阴液在短时间内大量亡失，脏腑功能突然严重衰竭，因而导致生命垂危的病理变化。

V005-N00738.label: 阴挺
V005-N00738.englishNames: prolapse of uterus; metroptosis; uterine prolapse; prolapse of the uterus; uterine or vaginal prolapse
V005-N00738.definition: 以子宫脱垂为主要表现的疾病。

V005-N00738.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00738.label: 亡阴
V005-N00738.englishNames: Syndrome of Depletion of Yin Depletion
V005-N00738.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V005-N00738.definition: 体液大量耗损，阴精欲竭，以身热汗出如油、口渴饮冷、烦躁、面红、舌干无津、脉细疾数等为常见症的危重证候。

V005-N00738.label: 亡阴
V005-N00738.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳亡失
V005-N00738.definition: 指由于机体阴气发生突然大量消耗或丢失，而致全身机能严重衰竭的一种病理状态。

V005-N00738.label: 阴挺
V005-N00738.aliases: 阴菌； 阴脱； 子宫脱出； 子宫脱垂
V005-N00738.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜前阴病
V005-N00738.definition: 多因脾肾气虚所致。以子宫位置沿阴道下降，甚则脱垂于阴道外，或阴道前、后壁同时有不同程度的膨出，甚至脱出阴道口外为主要表现的妇科疾病。

V005-N00738.label: 阴挺
V005-N00738.englishNames: prolapse of uterus; metroptosis; uterine prolapse; prolapse of the uterus; uterine or vaginal prolapse
V005-N00738.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜女性前阴类病

V005-N00738.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00738.label: 阴挺
V005-N00738.aliases: 子宫脱垂； 阴脱； 阴菌； 阴痔； 阴下脱； 阴挺下脱； 子宫脱出； 产肠不收； 子肠不收
V005-N00738.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V005-N00738.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00738.label: 亡阴
V005-N00738.aliases: 阴脱； Yin depletion； 脱阴
V005-N00738.englishNames: yin prostration; Yin collapse; yin exhaustion; yin collapse; yin depletion
V005-N00738.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00738.definition: A critical state of massive loss and sudden failure of yin fluid.

V005-N00738.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00738.label: 阴挺
V005-N00738.aliases: 子宫脱垂； Uterine prolapse； 阴脱
V005-N00738.englishNames: prolapse of uterus; metroptosis; uterine prolapse; Prolapsed uterus; prolapse of the uterus; uterine or vaginal prolapse
V005-N00738.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00738.definition: Characterized by uterus slipping out of place, or sometimes protruding down through the vagina. Often results from qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney.

V005-N00738.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00738.label: 阴挺
V005-N00738.aliases: BFZ020； 阴菌； 阴脱； 子宫脱出； 子宫脱垂
V005-N00738.englishNames: prolapse of uterus; uterine prolapse; prolapse of the uterus

V005-N00738.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00738.label: 阴脱

V005-N00738.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00738.label: 亡阴
V005-N00738.englishNames: yin prostration; yin exhaustion; yin depletion

V005-N00738.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00738.label: 阴挺
V005-N00738.aliases: 阴脱； 阴菌； 子宫脱出； 子宫脱垂
V005-N00738.englishNames: prolapse of the uterus; uterine prolapse
V005-N00738.definition: downward displacement of the uterus, even with the entire uterus outside the vaginal orifice

V005-N00738.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00738.label: 亡阴
V005-N00738.definition: a pathological change caused by sudden massive loss of fluid leading to collapse

V005-N00961.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病
V005-N00961.definition: 因恰逢经期，感受外邪，邪热乘虚侵入血室，与血相搏所致。临床以月经期或经行前后，骤然寒热往来,或高热、烦渴,或头汗出，下腹或胸胁硬满，甚则谵语,或白天神清,夜晚谵妄等为特征的经行外感病。

V005-N00961.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.englishNames: heat invading blood chamber; heat entering uterus; heat entering the uterus
V005-N00961.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜妇科杂病
V005-N00961.definition: 以妇女在经期或月经前后，因感受外邪，邪热乘虚侵入血室，热与血搏，出现寒热如疟，或胸胁、少腹满痛，或谵语，或伴经量异常为主要表现的疾病。

V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.englishNames: heat entering the blood chamber; entering of heat into blood chamber; heat invading blood chamber
V005-N00961.definition: 外感病适逢妇人月经来潮，或月经适断，邪热与血互相搏结的病理变化。

V005-N00961.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.aliases: Syndrome of Heat Invading Blood Chamber
V005-N00961.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血热
V005-N00961.definition: 邪热侵及血室，以少腹灼热疼痛、拒按，月经量多或经闭，发热口渴，烦躁如狂，舌红绛，苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.path: 病因病机｜病机｜脏腑病机｜奇恒之腑病机
V005-N00961.definition: 指外感病适逢妇人月经来潮，或月经适断，邪热与血互相搏结的病理变化。

V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.englishNames: heat invading blood chamber; heat entering the uterus
V005-N00961.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病

V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.definition: the pathogenic heat exploiting deficiency during menstruation or after childbirth to enter the blood chamber and contend with the blood

V005-N00322.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00322.label: 胎气病
V005-N00322.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病
V005-N00322.definition: 因怀孕而压迫胞脉、胞络,气血运行不畅或逆上所致。临床以妊娠期间面目虚浮，四肢浮肿，可伴见眩晕，头痛、头胀等为特征的胎孕病。

V005-N00322.label: 胎气病
V005-N00322.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病

V005-N00655.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00655.label: 酒癖
V005-N00655.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V005-N00655.definition: 因长期饮酒，脾胃受损，酒毒湿热内蕴，气血不和，酒毒与痰瘀互结于胁下所致。临床以嗜酒无度，皖胁疼痛，胁下痞块，口渴、烦热，日渐消瘦，可伴见面发赤斑,肝掌,蜘蛛痣，黄疸等为特征的脾系病。

V005-N00655.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00655.label: 酒癖
V005-N00655.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肝胆病
V005-N00655.definition: 以嗜酒无度，脘胁疼痛，胁下痞块，口渴、烦热、日渐消瘦，可伴见面发齿斑，肝掌，蜘蛛痣，黄疸等为主要表现的疾病。

V005-N00655.definition: 对某一种类型的食物过分偏爱和进食。

V005-N00655.label: 酒癖
V005-N00655.englishNames: alcoholophilia; Alcohol-induced masses; alcohol-induced masses; alcohol-induced mass
V005-N00655.pinyinNames: jiu pi; jiu xian; jiǔ pǐ
V005-N00655.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00655.definition: Characterized by pain and masses in the subcostal region, thirst, restlessness, and gradual weight loss. Red spots on the face, red palms, spider angioma and jaundice may be present. Contributing factors may include retention of alcoholic toxin, phlegm and stasis in the subcostal region due to prolonged alcohol drinking, damp heat accumulating in the spleen and stomach and disharmony between qi and blood.

V005-N00655.definition: the state of heavy dependence on alcohol

V005-N01095.definition: A principle to use an appropriate method and medicine according to seasonal climate changes.

V005-N01109.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01109.label: 实者泻其子
V005-N01109.englishNames: purging the child-organ for excess syndrome/patterns
V005-N01109.definition: 根据五行学说的母子相生关系，间接清泻脏腑实邪的治疗方法。

V005-N01109.label: 实者泻其子
V005-N01109.englishNames: purging child viscera for treating excess of mother viscera; purging the child-organ in dealing with excess syndrome/patterns
V005-N01109.definition: 根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏实证应采用攻泻“我生”之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01109.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01109.label: 实则泻其子
V005-N01109.englishNames: Purging Child Viscera for Treating Excess of Mother Viscera
V005-N01109.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则

V005-N01109.label: 实则泻其子
V005-N01109.englishNames: Purging Child Viscera for Treating Excess of Mother Viscera
V005-N01109.definition: 根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏实证应采用攻泻“我生”之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01109.label: 实者泻其子
V005-N01109.englishNames: purging child viscera for treating excess of mother viscera; purging the child-organ in dealing with excess syndrome/patterns

V005-N01109.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01109.label: 实者泻其子
V005-N01109.englishNames: reducing chuild-element in excess condition; Reduce the son (element) for excess pattern; purging the child-organ for excess syndrome/patterns
V005-N01109.definition: A principle to treat excess of zang–fu organs based on the five-element theory. For example, since (heart) fire promotes (spleen earth), hyperactivity of heart fire can be treated by reducing the spleen and stomach.

V005-N01084.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01084.label: 急则治标
V005-N01084.englishNames: treating the tip in acute phases
V005-N01084.definition: 与缓则治本相对。在大出血或暴泻、剧痛、尿闭等标病、标症紧急情况下,及时采用止血或止泻、止痛、利尿等救治标病、标症的方法，然后再治其本病的治疗原则。

V005-N01084.label: 急则治标
V005-N01084.englishNames: symptomatic treatment in acute condition; treating the tip in acute disease
V005-N01084.definition: 与缓则治本相对而言，在大出血、暴泻、剧痛等标症甚急的情况下，及时救治标病，如止血、止泻、止痛等，然后治其本病的治疗原则。

V005-N01084.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01084.label: 急则治标
V005-N01084.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜标本论治
V005-N01084.definition: 与缓则治本相对而言，在大出血、暴泻、剧痛等标症甚急的情况下，及时救治标病，如止血、止泻、止痛等，然后治其本病的治疗原则。

V005-N01084.label: 急则治标
V005-N01084.path: 治则治法｜治则｜标本论治
V005-N01084.definition: 与缓则治本相对而言，在大出血、暴泻、剧痛等标症甚急的情况下，及时救治标病，如止血、止泻、止痛等，然后治其本病的治疗原则。

V005-N01084.label: 急则治标
V005-N01084.englishNames: symptomatic treatment in acute condition; treating the tip in acute disease

V005-N01084.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01084.label: 急则治标
V005-N01084.englishNames: treating symptom for urgency; Treat the tip first in acute conditions; treating the tip in acute phases; ji ze zhi biao
V005-N01084.pinyinNames: jí zé zhì biāo; Symptomatic Treatment in Acute Condition
V005-N01084.definition: A principle to address symptoms in acute conditions, for example, it is important to stop bleeding for heavy blood loss, to arrest diarrhoea for fulminant diarrhoea, alleviate pain for severe, intense pain and promote urination for urine retention.

V005-N01088.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01088.label: 扶正固本
V005-N01088.englishNames: reinforcing healthy qi and securing the root
V005-N01088.definition: 对于正气亏虚等所致病证，采用培补正气以愈病的治疗原则。

V005-N01088.label: 扶正固本
V005-N01088.englishNames: strengthening and consolidating body resistance; reinforcing healthy qi and securing the root
V005-N01088.definition: 对于正气亏虚的病证，采用培补正气以愈病的治疗原则。

V005-N01088.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01088.label: 扶正
V005-N01088.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则
V005-N01088.definition: 对于正虚为主、因虚而实的病证，应采取扶助正气为主，使正气加强，从而达到治病的原则。

V005-N01088.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01088.label: 扶正固本
V005-N01088.aliases: Strength Resist Consol Constit； 扶正培本
V005-N01088.englishNames: Strengthening Body Resistance to Consolidate Constitution
V005-N01088.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜扶正

V005-N01088.definition: 对于正虚为主、因虚而实的病证，应采取扶助正气为主，使正气加强，从而达到治病的原则。

V005-N01088.label: 扶正固本

V005-N01088.definition: 对于正气亏虚的病证，宜采用培补正气以愈病的治疗原则。

V005-N01088.label: 扶正固本
V005-N01088.englishNames: strengthening and consolidating body resistance; reinforcing healthy qi and securing the root

V005-N01088.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01088.label: 扶正固本
V005-N01088.aliases: 扶正培本； Strength Resist Consol Constit
V005-N01088.englishNames: Reinforce healthy qi to strengthen the body; reinforcing healthy qi and securing the root; Strengthening Body Resistance to Consolidate Constitution
V005-N01088.pinyinNames: fú zhèng gù běn; fu zheng gu ben
V005-N01088.definition: A principle to reinforce anti-pathogenic qi to speed up recovery. It is indicated for deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi.

V005-N01088.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01088.label: 扶正
V005-N01088.definition: a general term for treating disease by strengthening the healthy qi of the body

V005-N01087.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.englishNames: reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factors
V005-N01087.definition: 对于正气虚弱而病邪不能外达，或因虚致实等病证，采用扶助正气为主，辅之以祛邪的方法，以促使正胜邪退的治疗原则。

V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.englishNames: reinforcing the healthy qi to eliminate the pathogenic factors
V005-N01087.definition: 扶助正气、驱除病邪，使疾病趋向良性转归的针灸治疗原则。

V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.englishNames: strengthening vital qi to eliminate pathogenic factor; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factors
V005-N01087.definition: 对于正虚为主、因虚致实的病证，应采取扶助正气为主，使正气加强，从而达到驱除病邪目的的治疗原则。

V005-N01087.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.aliases: Strength Resist Elimin Pathog； 扶正达邪

V005-N01087.definition: 对于正虚为主、因虚而实的病证，应采取扶助正气为主，使正气加强，从而达到驱除病邪目的的治疗原则。

V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.aliases: Strength Resist Elimin Pathog； 扶正达邪
V005-N01087.englishNames: Strengthening Body Resistance to Eliminate Pathogenic Factors
V005-N01087.definition: 对于正虚为主、因虚而实的病证，应采取扶助正气为主，使正气加强，从而达到驱除病邪目的的治疗原则。

V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.englishNames: strengthening vital qi to eliminate pathogenic factor; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factors

V005-N01087.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.aliases: 扶正达邪； Strength Resist Elimin Pathog
V005-N01087.englishNames: strengthening healthy qi and eliminating pathogen; Strengthening Body Resistance to Eliminate Pathogenic Factors; reinforcing the healthy qi to eliminate the pathogenic factors; Reinforce healthy qi to eliminate pathogenic factors; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factors; reinforce the healthy qi and eliminate the pathogenic factors
V005-N01087.pinyinNames: fu zheng qu xie; fu zheng 祛xie; fú zhèng qū xié
V005-N01087.definition: A principle to reinforce anti-pathogenic qi to drive out the invading pathogenic factors. It is indicated for deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi coupled with exposure to pathogenic factors.

V005-N01087.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V005-N01087.englishNames: strengthening healthy qi and eliminating pathogen; reinforce the healthy qi and eliminate the pathogenic factors; strengthening vital qi to eliminate pathogenic factor
V005-N01087.definition: two general principles of treatment — to reinforce the patient’s healthy qi and to eliminating the invading pathogenic factors, which can be applied separately or in combination according to the particular condition of the case

V005-N01092.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: treating with both elimination and reinforcement
V005-N01092.definition: 泛指对虚实夹杂,或虚实程度相当的病证,采用扶正与祛邪并重,或相机先后或主次处理策略的治疗原则。

V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: treating with both elimination and reinforcement; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factor; reinforcement and elimination in combination
V005-N01092.definition: 对于虚实夹杂，或虚实病情相当的病证，可采用既祛邪又培补，即攻邪与扶正并重的治疗原则。

V005-N01092.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则

V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施

V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: treating with both elimination and reinforcement; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factor; reinforcement and elimination in combination

V005-N01092.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: treat with both elimination and reinforcement; Reinforce healthy qi and remove pathogenic factors simultaneously; treating with both elimination and reinforcement; simultaneous eliminination and reinforcement; Reinforcement and Elimination
V005-N01092.pinyinNames: gōng bǔ jiān shī; gong bu jian shi
V005-N01092.definition: A principle to reinforce anti-pathogenic qi and, at the same time, remove pathogenic factors. It is indicated for excessive pathogenic factors coupled with deficiency of healthy qi.

V005-N01092.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factor

V005-N01092.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: simultaneous eliminination and reinforcement; treat with both elimination and reinforcement; reinforcement and elimination in combination
V005-N01092.definition: a principle of treatment with eliminating and reinforcing methods used in combination, suitable for patients with a weak constitution suffering from an excess syndrome

V005-N01091.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01091.label: 先攻后补
V005-N01091.englishNames: eliminating pathogenic factors prior to reinforcing healthy qi
V005-N01091.definition: 对虚实夹杂,体弱正虚而又有急待攻下或祛散病邪的病证,采用先攻邪、后培补的治疗策略。

V005-N01091.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01091.label: 先攻后补
V005-N01091.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜攻补兼施

V005-N01091.label: 先攻后补
V005-N01091.path: 治则治法｜治则｜攻补兼施
V005-N01091.definition: 先攻邪后培补的治疗原则，用于体弱正虚而又有急须攻下或攻破之症的病证。

V005-N01091.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜攻补兼施

V005-N01091.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V005-N01091.pinyinNames: xiān gōng hòu bǔ; xian gong hou bu
V005-N01091.definition: A principle to remove the invading pathogenic factors, followed by reinforcing anti-pathogenic qi. It is indicated for deficiency of healthy qi coupled with acute conditions that require immediate removal of pathogenic factors.

V005-N01090.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01090.label: 先补后攻
V005-N01090.englishNames: reinforcing healthy qi prior to eliminating pathogenic factors
V005-N01090.definition: 对虚实夹杂，邪实须攻，或攻下又有正虚体弱、不堪攻击的病证，采用先补虚、后攻邪的治疗策略。

V005-N01090.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01090.label: 先补后攻
V005-N01090.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜攻补兼施
V005-N01090.definition: 先补虚后攻邪的治疗原则，用于需攻破或攻下而又正虚体弱不堪攻的病证。

V005-N01090.label: 先补后攻
V005-N01090.path: 治则治法｜治则｜攻补兼施
V005-N01090.definition: 先补虚后攻邪的治疗原则，用于需攻破或攻下而又正虚体弱不堪攻的病证。

V005-N01090.label: 先补后攻
V005-N01090.englishNames: application of tonification prior to elimination
V005-N01090.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜攻补兼施

V005-N01090.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01090.label: 先补后攻

V005-N01090.pinyinNames: xiān bǔ hòu gōng; xian bu hou gong
V005-N01090.definition: A principle to reinforce healthy qi, followed by removing the invading pathogenic factors. It is indicated for acute conditions that require immediate removal of pathogneic factors coupled with deficiency of healthy qi.

V005-N01086.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01086.label: 标本兼治

V005-N01086.definition: 在病症出现标本并重的情况下，采用治标与治本相兼或同时并用的治疗原则。

V005-N01086.path: 治则治法｜治则｜标本论治
V005-N01086.definition: 在病证出现标本并重的情况下，可采用治标与治本相结合的治疗原则。

V005-N01086.label: 标本兼治
V005-N01086.englishNames: treating both manifestation and root cause of disease; treating both the tip and root

V005-N01086.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01086.label: 标本兼治
V005-N01086.aliases: 标本同治； Treat Both Symptom and Radical
V005-N01086.englishNames: treating both the tip and root; Treat both the tip and root; Treating Both Symptoms and Radical
V005-N01086.pinyinNames: biāo běn jiān zhì; biao ben jian zhi
V005-N01086.definition: A principle to address both symptoms and root cause simultaneously when needed.

V005-N01074.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01074.label: 寒者热之
V005-N01074.definition: 对于寒性病证，使用温热的方药或相关疗法进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01075.label: 热者寒之
V005-N01075.definition: 对于热性病证，使用寒凉的方药或相关疗法进行治疗的方法。

V005-N01075.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜正治法

V005-N01075.label: 热者寒之
V005-N01075.englishNames: treating hotness with coldness; treat heat with cold; Treat heat with cold; treating heat with cold
V005-N01075.definition: A principle to treat heat conditions with medicines or formulas that are cool or cold in nature.

V005-N01076.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01076.label: 虚则补之
V005-N01076.definition: 对于虚弱病证，使用补益的方药或相关疗法进行治疗的方法。

V005-N01076.label: 虚则补之
V005-N01076.definition: 正气虚弱、体质较差者，针刺可用补的方法治疗。

V005-N01076.label: 虚者补之
V005-N01076.englishNames: treating deficiency syndrome with tonifying methods; treating deficiency with tonification
V005-N01076.definition: 针对虚弱性的病证采用补益方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01076.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01076.label: 虚则补之
V005-N01076.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜正治
V005-N01076.definition: 对于虚弱性的病证，使用补益的方药进行治疗。

V005-N01076.label: 虚者补之
V005-N01076.englishNames: Tonification is Used to Treat Deficiency
V005-N01076.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜针灸原理｜针灸治疗原理｜针灸治则术语
V005-N01076.definition: 治疗正气虚的病证，用补法。

V005-N01076.label: 虚则补之
V005-N01076.definition: 对于虚弱性的病证，使用补益的方药进行治疗。

V005-N01076.englishNames: treat deficiency by tonification; Treat deficiency with reinforcement; Treating Deficiency by Tonifying; treating deficiency with reinforcement; treating deficiency with tonification
V005-N01076.pinyinNames: xū zé bǔ zhī; xu ze bu zhi
V005-N01076.definition: A principle to treat deficiency conditions with tonic medicines or formulas.

V005-N01063.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01063.label: 已病防变
V005-N01063.definition: 泛指根据疾病发生、发展规律及其传变途径等,在其发作或加重之前，采取各种方法避免、阻止病情加重或传变的治疗原则。

V005-N01063.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01063.label: 既病防变
V005-N01063.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜治未病
V005-N01063.definition: 疾病已经发生，应早期诊断，并根据疾病的发展规律，早期治疗，以防止疾病传变。

V005-N01063.label: 既病防变
V005-N01063.definition: 疾病已经发生，应早期诊断，并根据疾病的发展规律，早期治疗，以防止疾病传变。

V005-N01063.label: 已病防变
V005-N01063.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜治未病法

V005-N01063.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01063.label: 既病防变
V005-N01063.englishNames: Preventing transmission of a disease after its onset
V005-N01063.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类
V005-N01063.definition: A method to use early diagnosis and early intervention to prevent disease progression and transmission.

V005-N01063.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01063.label: 既病防变

V005-N01059.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01059.label: 未病先防
V005-N01059.definition: 泛指在尚未患病,或在发病之前，从增强人体正气和防止病邪侵害两方面入手来防治疾病的治疗原则。

V005-N01059.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01059.label: 未病先防
V005-N01059.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜治未病

V005-N01059.label: 未病先防
V005-N01059.definition: 在未发生疾病之时做好预防工作。正气不足是发病的内在根据，邪气是发病的重要条件。未病先防重在保养正气和防御病邪两方面，主要方法有顺应自然、调摄精神、运动保健、饮食有节、起居规律、劳逸适度等，以增强体质，提高正气抗邪能力;；讲究卫生、避免外邪、药物预防、人工免疫等，以防止病邪的侵袭。

V005-N01059.label: 未病先防
V005-N01059.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜治未病法

V005-N01059.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01059.label: 未病先防
V005-N01059.englishNames: Preventing a disease before it arises
V005-N01059.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类
V005-N01059.definition: A method to strengthen the healthy qi and eliminate potential harmful factors to prevent the occurrence of a disease.

V005-N01059.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01059.label: 未病先防

V005-N01066.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01066.label: 瘥后防复
V005-N01066.definition: 泛指在疾病基本康复，或疾病尚未发作的稳定期、间歇期，为防止余邪复作，或劳累、饮食不当等因素而导致疾病复发，采取各种方法扶助正气、强身健体，以促进康复的治疗原则。

V005-N01066.label: 瘥后防复
V005-N01066.pinyinNames: chai hou fang fu; 瘥hou fang fu
V005-N01066.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜治未病法

V005-N01085.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01085.label: 缓则治本
V005-N01085.englishNames: treating the root in remissive phases
V005-N01085.definition: 与急则治标相对。在病势相对缓和，或病情稳定的情况下,先治疗其本病，或采取以调理、补益等为主的治疗原则。

V005-N01085.label: 缓则治本
V005-N01085.englishNames: radical treatment in chronic case; treating the root in chronic disease
V005-N01085.definition: 与急则治标相对而言，在病势缓和、病情缓慢的情况下，针对本病的病机治疗或采取调理、补益为主的治疗原则。

V005-N01085.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01085.label: 缓则治本
V005-N01085.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则｜标本论治
V005-N01085.definition: 与急则治标相对而言，在病势缓和、病情缓慢的情况下，针对本病的病机治疗或采取调理、补益为主的治疗原则。

V005-N01085.label: 缓则治本
V005-N01085.path: 治则治法｜治则｜标本论治
V005-N01085.definition: 与急则治标相对而言，在病势缓和、病情缓慢的情况下，针对本病的病机治疗或采取调理、补益为主的治疗原则。

V005-N01085.label: 缓则治本
V005-N01085.englishNames: radical treatment in chronic case; treating the root in chronic disease

V005-N01085.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01085.label: 缓则治本
V005-N01085.englishNames: treating the root in remissive phases; Treat the root in remissive stages; treating root cause for non-urgency; Radical Treatment in Chronic Case
V005-N01085.pinyinNames: huǎn zé zhì běn; huan ze zhi ben
V005-N01085.definition: A principle to regulate and reinforce the body to address the root cause when medical conditions become stable.

V005-N01108.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01108.label: 虚者补其母
V005-N01108.englishNames: nourishing the mother-organ in dealing for deficiency syndrome/patterns
V005-N01108.definition: 根据五行学说的母子相生关系，间接调补脏腑虚损的治疗方法。

V005-N01108.label: 虚则补其母
V005-N01108.definition: 虚证，补其所属的母经或母穴的方法。

V005-N01108.label: 虚者补其母
V005-N01108.englishNames: nourishing the mother-organ in dealing with deficiency syndrome/patterns; reinforcing mother viscera for treating deficiency of child viscera
V005-N01108.definition: 根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏虚证应采用补益“生我”之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01108.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01108.label: 虚则补其母
V005-N01108.englishNames: Reinforcing Mother Viscera for Treating Deficiency of Child Viscera
V005-N01108.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则
V005-N01108.definition: 根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏虚证应采用补益“生我”之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01108.label: 虚则补其母
V005-N01108.englishNames: Reinforcing Mother Viscera for Treating Deficiency of Child Viscera
V005-N01108.definition: 根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏虚证应采用补益“生我”之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01108.label: 虚者补其母
V005-N01108.englishNames: nourishing the mother-organ in dealing with deficiency syndrome/patterns; reinforcing mother viscera for treating deficiency of child viscera

V005-N01108.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01108.label: 虚者补其母
V005-N01108.englishNames: Reinforce the mother (element) for deficiency pattern; reinforcing mother-element in deficiency condition; nourishing the mother-organ in dealing for deficiency syndrome/patterns
V005-N01108.definition: A principle to treat deficiency of zang–fu organs based on the five-element theory. For example, since (spleen) earth promotes (lung) metal, lung deficiency can be treated by reinforcing the spleen and stomach.

V005-N01098.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01098.label: 调理阴阳
V005-N01098.aliases: 调平阴阳； 调整阴阳
V005-N01098.definition: 泛指利用药物或食物气味性能的偏胜，或情志的属性，或针灸补泻作用等，以纠正阴阳的偏胜偏衰，使之恢复相对协调、平和状态的治疗原则。

V005-N01098.label: 调理阴阳
V005-N01098.aliases: 调平阴阳； 调整阴阳
V005-N01098.englishNames: regulating yin and yang; coordinating yin and yang
V005-N01098.definition: 利用药物或食物的气味性能、清志的属性、针灸补泻的作用等，以纠正人体阴阳的偏胜偏衰，使之恢复相对平衡协调的治疗原则。

V005-N01098.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N01098.label: 调整阴阳
V005-N01098.aliases: 调和阴阳； 调理阴阳
V005-N01098.path: TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治则
V005-N01098.definition: 利用药物或食物气味性能的偏胜，或情志的属性，或针灸补泻作用等，以纠正阴阳的偏胜偏衰，使之恢复相对平衡协调的治疗原则。

V005-N01098.label: 调整阴阳
V005-N01098.aliases: 调和阴阳； 调理阴阳
V005-N01098.definition: 利用药物或食物气味性能的偏胜，或情志的属性，或针灸补泻作用等，以纠正阴阳的偏胜偏衰，使之恢复相对平衡协调的治疗原则。

V005-N01098.label: 调理阴阳
V005-N01098.aliases: 调平阴阳； 调整阴阳
V005-N01098.englishNames: regulating yin and yang; coordinating yin and yang

V005-N01098.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01098.label: 调理阴阳
V005-N01098.aliases: 调平阴阳； 调整阴阳
V005-N01098.englishNames: Regulate and balance yin and yang; regulating yin and yang
V005-N01098.definition: A principle to restore yin-yang equilibrium through medicines, food, emotions or reinforcing/reducing needling techniques.

V005-N01104.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01104.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01104.definition: 根据阴阳互根原理，在补阴时适当配用补阳之品，以助阴气生成的方法。

V005-N01104.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01104.englishNames: Lead Yin-Evil out through Yang Points
V005-N01104.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜针灸原理｜针灸治疗原理｜针灸治则术语
V005-N01104.definition: 针刺方法。指病在阴经而选阳经的穴位治疗。

V005-N01104.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01104.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V005-N01104.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01104.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01104.aliases: 阳中求阴； 病在阳而治其阴
V005-N01104.englishNames: Seeking yin from yang; treating yang for yin disorder; treating yin for yang disorder; seeking yin from yang
V005-N01104.pinyinNames: cóng yáng yǐn yīn; cong yang yin yin
V005-N01104.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yang meridians for problems of yin meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yang-reinforcing medicines to yin-nourishing formulas to assist the generation of yin qi.

V005-N01101.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01101.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01101.definition: 根据阴阳互根原理，在补阴时适当配用补阳之品，以助阴气生成的方法。

V005-N01101.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01101.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V005-N01101.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01101.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01101.aliases: 阳中求阴； 病在阳而治其阴
V005-N01101.englishNames: Seeking yin from yang; treating yang for yin disorder; treating yin for yang disorder; seeking yin from yang
V005-N01101.pinyinNames: cóng yáng yǐn yīn; cong yang yin yin
V005-N01101.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yang meridians for problems of yin meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yang-reinforcing medicines to yin-nourishing formulas to assist the generation of yin qi.

V005-N01101.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01101.label: 阳中求阴
V005-N01101.englishNames: Formulas that seek yin within yang
V005-N01101.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V005-N01101.definition: A method to combine a small amount of yang-tonifying medicines for kidney yin deficiency. This method enhances the effect of nourishing yin. The representative formula is Zuo Gui Wan (Left-Restoring Pill).

V005-N01101.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01101.label: 阳中求阴

V005-N01103.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01103.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01103.definition: 根据阴阳互根原理,在补阳时须适当配用补阴之品,以助阳气生化的方法。

V005-N01103.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01103.englishNames: Lead Yang-Evil out through Yin Points
V005-N01103.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜针灸原理｜针灸治疗原理｜针灸治则术语
V005-N01103.definition: 针刺方法。刺募穴以治阳病，引邪从募穴而出。

V005-N01103.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01103.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V005-N01103.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01103.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01103.aliases: 病在阳而治其阴； 阴中求阳
V005-N01103.englishNames: treating yin for yang disorder; treating yang for yin disorder; Seeking yang from yin; seeking yang from yin
V005-N01103.pinyinNames: cong yin yin yang; cóng yīn yǐn yáng
V005-N01103.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yin meridians for problems of yang meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a treatment principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yin-nourishing medicines to yang-reinforcing formulas to assist the transformation of yang qi.

V005-N01102.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01102.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01102.definition: 根据阴阳互根原理,在补阳时须适当配用补阴之品,以助阳气生化的方法。

V005-N01102.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01102.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V005-N01102.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01102.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01102.aliases: 病在阳而治其阴； 阴中求阳
V005-N01102.englishNames: treating yin for yang disorder; treating yang for yin disorder; Seeking yang from yin; seeking yang from yin
V005-N01102.pinyinNames: cong yin yin yang; cóng yīn yǐn yáng
V005-N01102.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yin meridians for problems of yang meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a treatment principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yin-nourishing medicines to yang-reinforcing formulas to assist the transformation of yang qi.

V005-N01102.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01102.label: 阴中求阳
V005-N01102.englishNames: Formulas that seek yang within yin
V005-N01102.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V005-N01102.definition: Formulas to combine a small amount of yin-nourishing medicines for kidney yang deficiency. This method enhances the effect of warming yang. The representative formula is You Gui Wan (Right-Restoring Pill).

V005-N01102.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01102.label: 阴中求阳

V005-N00155.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N00155.label: 金水相生
V005-N00155.englishNames: mutual promotion between metal and water
V005-N00155.definition: 运用具有补肺、滋肾等作用的方药或相关疗法，促使金水相互资生、充盛，以治疗肺肾两虚或肺阴虚、肾阴虚等所致病证的治法。

V005-N00155.label: 肺肾相生
V005-N00155.englishNames: mutually promotion of lung and kidney; mutual promotion between lung and kidney
V005-N00155.definition: 肺肾之间存在相互资生的关系，肺属金，肾属水，金能生水，肺阴下达于肾可滋养肾阴；肾阴为一身阴液之根本，故肾阴亦可上济于肺以滋养肺阴。

V005-N00155.label: 金生水
V005-N00155.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五行学说｜五行相生
V005-N00155.definition: 金对水具有促进、助长、资生的作用。

V005-N00155.label: 肺肾相生
V005-N00155.aliases: 肺肾同源； 金水相生
V005-N00155.englishNames: Mutual Promotion Of The Lung And The Kidney
V005-N00155.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜藏象学说原理｜藏象的一般性概念｜脏腑关系
V005-N00155.definition: 肺属金，肾属水。根据五行学说，肺金和肾水是母子关系，故又称“金水相生”。两者在生理上互相滋生，病变时互相影响。

V005-N00155.label: 金水相生
V005-N00155.englishNames: mutual promotion between metal and water
V005-N00155.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V005-N00155.pinyinNames: jin shui xiang sheng; jīn shuǐ xiāng shēng
V005-N00155.definition: A treatment method to tonify the kidney and nourish the lung for lung deficiency and kidney deficiency, since the lung (metal) and kidney (water) mutually support physiologically and mutually affect pathologically.

V005-N00013.label: 揆度奇恒

V005-N00013.definition: 指诊断中，要善于观察和分析一般的疾病规律和特殊的变化，以期正确判断病情。《素问·玉机真脏论》：“吾得脉之大要，天下至数，五色脉变，揆度奇恒，道在于一，……。”此处奇恒指平常（恒）和异常（奇）。 ;推测疾病的浅深和奇难。《素问·玉版论要》：“揆度者，度病之浅深也。奇恒者，言奇病也。”此处奇恒指异于平常的奇特疾病。

V005-N00028.definition: the mutually opposing, repelling and contending relationship between yin and yang

V005-N00029.label: 阴阳互根

V005-N00029.definition: 阴阳相互依存，互为根本的关系。

V005-N00029.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00029.label: 阴阳互根
V005-N00029.path: TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜医学，传统｜医学，中国传统｜中医药学｜中医学｜中医各家学说｜阴阳学说
V005-N00029.definition: 阴阳相互依存、互为根本的关系。

V005-N00029.label: 阴阳互根
V005-N00029.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴阳互根互用
V005-N00029.definition: 指阴阳双方互为存在的根源。

V005-N00029.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V005-N00029.englishNames: mutual rooting of yin and yang; Yin and yang reciprocally root

V005-N00029.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类

V005-N00029.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00029.englishNames: mutual rooting of yin and yang

V005-N00029.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V005-N00029.englishNames: mutual rooting of yin and yang
V005-N00029.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00029.definition: the mutually dependent relationship between yin and yang, the same as interdependence between yin and yang

V005-N00030.label: 阴阳消长
V005-N00030.path: 中医基础理论｜中医基础理论总论
V005-N00030.definition: 阴阳存在着始终不断的增减盛衰的运动变化。

V005-N00030.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00030.label: 阴阳消长
V005-N00030.englishNames: Waxing and Waning of Yin Yang
V005-N00030.path: TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜医学，传统｜医学，中国传统｜中医药学｜中医学｜中医各家学说｜阴阳学说
V005-N00030.definition: 阴阳存在着始终不断的增减盛衰的运动变化。

V005-N00030.label: 阴阳消长
V005-N00030.englishNames: growth and decline of Yin and Yang
V005-N00030.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理
V005-N00030.definition: 指处于一个统一体中的阴阳双方，各自的盛衰进退变化。指阴阳之间的平衡，不是静止的和绝对的平衡，而是在一定限度、一定时间内的“阴消阳长，阳消阴长”之中维持着相对的平衡。

V005-N00030.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00030.label: 阴阳消长
V005-N00030.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类

V005-N00030.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00030.label: 阴阳消长
V005-N00030.englishNames: waxing and waning of yin and yang; waning and waxing of yin and yang

V005-N00030.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00030.label: 阴阳消长
V005-N00030.englishNames: waxing and waning of yin and yang
V005-N00030.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00030.definition: alternation of strength and prevalence between the paired yin and yang, the same as natural flux of yin and yang or inter-consuming-supporting relationship of yin and yang

V005-N00031.label: 阴阳转化
V005-N00031.path: 中医基础理论｜中医基础理论总论
V005-N00031.definition: 事物的阴阳属性在一定条件下，可以向其相反方面转化。

V005-N00031.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00031.label: 阴阳转化
V005-N00031.path: TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜医学，传统｜医学，中国传统｜中医药学｜中医学｜中医各家学说｜阴阳学说
V005-N00031.definition: 事物的阴阳属性在一定条件下，可以向其相反方面转化。

V005-N00031.label: 阴阳转化
V005-N00031.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理
V005-N00031.definition: 阴阳双方在一定条件下的相互转移、变化，即阴可以转化为阳，阳可以转化为阴。

V005-N00031.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00031.label: 阴阳转化
V005-N00031.pinyinNames: yīn yáng zhuǎn huà; yin yang zhuan hua
V005-N00031.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00031.definition: Under certain circumstances, yin may transform into yang and yang into yin.

V005-N00031.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00031.label: 阴阳转化

V005-N00031.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00031.label: 阴阳转化
V005-N00031.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00031.definition: the property of the same thing can be transformed between yin and yang, also called inter-transformation of yin and yang

V005-N00032.label: 重阴必阳
V005-N00032.englishNames: Yin in its extreme giving rise to Yang
V005-N00032.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴阳转化
V005-N00032.definition: 阴阳转化的规律。阴消长超越了正常的阈值，必然转化为阳。

V005-N00032.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00032.label: 重阴必阳
V005-N00032.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00032.definition: When yin develops to its extremity, it will transform into yang.

V005-N00033.label: 重阳必阴
V005-N00033.path: 中医基础理论｜中医基础理论总论
V005-N00033.definition: 阳重复积累至极即会转化为阴的规律。

V005-N00033.label: 重阳必阴
V005-N00033.englishNames: Yang in its extreme giving rise to Yina
V005-N00033.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴阳转化
V005-N00033.definition: 阴阳转化的规律。阳消长超越了正常的阈值，必然转化为阴。

V005-N00033.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00033.label: 重阳必阴
V005-N00033.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00033.definition: When yang develops to its extremity, it will transform into yin.

V005-N00034.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00034.label: 阴平阳秘
V005-N00034.path: TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜医学，传统｜医学，中国传统｜中医药学｜中医学｜中医各家学说｜阴阳学说
V005-N00034.definition: 阴气平和，阳气固守，双方协调平衡的正常状态。

V005-N00034.label: 阴平阳秘
V005-N00034.englishNames: Yin and Yang in a relative equilibrium
V005-N00034.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴阳
V005-N00034.definition: 阴阳在对立斗争中，取得统一，维持阴与阳之间的动态平衡。

V005-N00034.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00034.label: 阴平阳秘
V005-N00034.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00034.definition: A harmonious state between yin and yang, when yin qi is in balance and yang qi is secured within the body.

V005-N00035.label: 阴阳调和
V005-N00035.aliases: 太和； 阴阳平衡； 阴阳自和
V005-N00035.englishNames: Harmony  between  Yin and Yang; Yin  and Yang  in  Equilibrium
V005-N00035.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理
V005-N00035.definition: 指阴阳处于和谐统一体时的状态。

V005-N00035.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00035.label: 阴阳平衡

V005-N00035.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00035.label: 阴阳平衡
V005-N00035.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00035.definition: the state in which yin and yang are balanced

V005-N00036.label: 阴阳自和
V005-N00036.path: 中医基础理论｜中医基础理论总论
V005-N00036.definition: 人体保持健康状态的自我调节能力。

V005-N00036.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00036.label: 阴阳自和
V005-N00036.path: TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜医学，传统｜医学，中国传统｜中医药学｜中医学｜中医各家学说｜阴阳学说
V005-N00036.definition: 人体保持健康状态的自我调节能力。

V005-N00036.label: 阴阳调和
V005-N00036.aliases: 太和； 阴阳平衡； 阴阳自和
V005-N00036.englishNames: Harmony  between  Yin and Yang; Yin  and Yang  in  Equilibrium
V005-N00036.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理
V005-N00036.definition: 指阴阳处于和谐统一体时的状态。

V005-N00036.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00036.label: 阴阳自和
V005-N00036.aliases: Spontaneous harmonization between yin and yang
V005-N00036.englishNames: spontaneous harmonization of yin and yang
V005-N00036.pinyinNames: yin yang zi he; yīn yáng zì hé
V005-N00036.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00036.definition: The tendency for yin and yang to spontaneously and mutually harmonize.

V005-N00036.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00036.label: 阴阳自和
V005-N00036.englishNames: spontaneous harmonization of yin and yang

V005-N00036.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V005-N00036.englishNames: spontaneous harmonization of yin and yang
V005-N00036.definition: spontaneous recovery from imbalance of yin and yang by its own natural regulatory function, also known as spontaneous restoration of yin-yang equilibrium

V005-N00037.label: 阴阳离决
V005-N00037.englishNames: dissociation of yin and yang; divorce of yin-yang; separation between yin and yang
V005-N00037.definition: 阴阳分离，失其维系，生命垂危的病理变化。

V005-N00037.label: 阴阳离决
V005-N00037.englishNames: dissociation of  Yin and Yang; divorce of YIN-YANG
V005-N00037.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理
V005-N00037.definition: 阴阳双方的关系分离决裂。病机上指阴阳分离，失其维系，生命垂危的病理变化。

V005-N00037.label: 阴阳离决
V005-N00037.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调
V005-N00037.definition: 指阴阳之间的关系分离、破裂，生命垂危的病理变化。

V005-N00037.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00037.label: 阴阳离决
V005-N00037.englishNames: Yin–yang separation; dissociation of yin and yang; divorce of yin-yang; separation between yin and yang
V005-N00037.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00037.definition: A critical state of separation between yin and yang due to extreme deficiency of yin and yang.

V005-N00037.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00037.label: 阴阳离决
V005-N00037.definition: divorce of yin and yang, indicating the end of life

V005-N00040.label: 阴中之阴
V005-N00040.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴
V005-N00040.definition: 阴阳学说内容之一。在阴阳属性依不同的关系而相对变化时，一事物分属两种不同属性，此两种属性均属于阴者。;指属性为阴的事物，再分阴阳，又分属于阴的一面。

V005-N00040.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00040.label: 阴中之阴
V005-N00040.pinyinNames: yīn zhōng zhī yīn; yin zhong zhi yin
V005-N00040.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00040.definition: When yin is further divided into yin and yang, the yin aspect of yin is called yin within yin.

V005-N00040.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00040.label: 阴中之阴

V005-N00040.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00040.label: 阴中之阴
V005-N00040.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00040.definition: the yin aspect of the yin category, for example, the night is regarded as yin in relation to daytime, the period from nightfall to midnight is the yin part within yin

V005-N00041.label: 阴中之阳
V005-N00041.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴
V005-N00041.definition: 阴阳学说内容之一。指一事物分属两种不同属性，此两种属性，前一种属于阴，后一种属于阳。;指属性为阴的事物，再分阴阳，又分属于阳的一面。

V005-N00041.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00041.label: 阴中之阳
V005-N00041.pinyinNames: yin zhong zhi yang; yīn zhōng zhī yáng
V005-N00041.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00041.definition: When yin is further divided into yin and yang, the yang aspect of yin is called yang within yin.

V005-N00041.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00041.label: 阴中之阳

V005-N00041.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00041.label: 阴中之阳
V005-N00041.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00041.definition: the yang aspect of the yin category, for example, the night is regarded as yin in relation to daytime, the period between midnight and dawn is the yang part within yin

V005-N00042.label: 阳中之阴
V005-N00042.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阳
V005-N00042.definition: 指属性为阳的事物，再分阴阳，又分属于阴的一面。;阴阳学说内容之一。指一事物分属两种不同属性，此两种属性，前一种属阳，后一种属阴。

V005-N00042.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00042.label: 阳中之阴
V005-N00042.pinyinNames: yang zhong zhi yin; yáng zhōng zhī yīn
V005-N00042.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00042.definition: When yang is further divided into yin and yang, the yin aspect of yang is called yin within yang.

V005-N00042.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00042.label: 阳中之阴

V005-N00042.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00042.label: 阳中之阴
V005-N00042.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00042.definition: the yin aspect of the yang category, for example, the daytime is regarded as yang in relation to night, and the period between midday and nightfall is the yin part of yang

V005-N00043.label: 阳中之阳
V005-N00043.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阳
V005-N00043.definition: 阴阳学说内容之一。 在阴阳属性依不同的关系而相对变化时，指一事物的两种属性均属于阳者。;指属性为阳的事物，再分阴阳，又分属于阳的一面。

V005-N00043.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00043.label: 阳中之阳
V005-N00043.pinyinNames: yáng zhōng zhī yáng; yang zhong zhi yang
V005-N00043.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00043.definition: When yang is further divided into yin and yang, the yang aspect of yang is called yang within yang.

V005-N00043.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00043.label: 阳中之阳

V005-N00043.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00043.label: 阳中之阳
V005-N00043.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00043.definition: the yang aspect of the yang category, for example, the daytime is regarded as yang in relation to night, and the period between dawn and noon is the yang part within yang

V005-N00044.label: 阳生阴长
V005-N00044.englishNames: Yin making matter growing while Yang generating
V005-N00044.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴阳消长｜阴阳皆消皆长
V005-N00044.definition: 阴阳双方互根互用。两者相互资助，阳气生化正常，阴气不断滋长。

V005-N00044.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00044.label: 阳生阴长
V005-N00044.pinyinNames: yáng shēng yīn zhǎng; yang sheng yin zhang
V005-N00044.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00044.definition: When yang qi brings things to life, yin qi grows and enables endurance.

V005-N00044.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00044.label: 阳生阴长

V005-N00045.label: 阳杀阴藏
V005-N00045.englishNames: Yin making matter  concealing  while  Yang  restraining  it
V005-N00045.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴阳消长｜阴阳皆消皆长
V005-N00045.definition: 阴阳双方互根互用。阳气肃杀收束与阴气封蜇潜藏功能相互配合。

V005-N00045.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00045.label: 阳杀阴藏
V005-N00045.pinyinNames: yáng shā yīn cáng; yang sha yin cang
V005-N00045.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00045.definition: In regard to the changing seasons, it is the nature of yang to kill and break things down and the nature of yin to store.

V005-N00045.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00045.label: 阳杀阴藏

V005-N00046.label: 生之本
V005-N00046.path: 中医基础理论｜中医基础理论总论
V005-N00046.definition: 阴阳是生命源泉与根本。

V005-N00046.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00046.label: 生之本
V005-N00046.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00046.definition: It refers to the heart, the foundation of human life.

V005-N00047.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00047.label: 五行类

V005-N00048.label: 五行学说
V005-N00048.path: 中医基础理论｜中医基础理论总论
V005-N00048.definition: 将古代哲学理论中以木、火、土、金、水五类物质的特性及其生克制化规律来认识、解释自然的系统结构和方法论运用到中医学而建立的中医基本理论，用以解释人体内脏之间的相互关系、脏腑组织器官的属性、运动变化及人体与外界环境的关系。

V005-N00048.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00048.label: 五行学说
V005-N00048.path: TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中医基础理论｜中医理论基础
V005-N00048.definition: 将古代哲学理论中以木、火、土、金、水五类物质的特性及其生克制化规律来认识、解释自然的系统结构和方法论，运用到中医学而建立的中医基本理论，用以解释人体内脏之间的相互关系、脏腑组织器官的属性、运动变化及人体与外界环境的关系。

V005-N00048.label: 五行学说
V005-N00048.pinyinNames: wu xing xue shuo yuan li
V005-N00048.definition: 研究木、火、土、金、水五行的概念、特性、生克制化乘侮规律，并用以阐释宇宙万物发生、发展、变化及相互关系的一种古代哲学思想。

V005-N00049.label: 五行

V005-N00049.definition: 木、火、土、金、水五种基本物质及其运动变化。

V005-N00049.label: 五行
V005-N00049.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五行学说
V005-N00049.definition: 指思孟学派论述的仁、义、礼、智、圣（信）五常。;指自然界金、木、水、火、土五种物质。后作为哲学概念，代表构成万物的五种基本元素。

V005-N00049.definition: The interactions and changes among the five categories of phenomena represented by wood, fire, earth, metal and water.

V005-N00050.path: 中医基础理论｜中医基础理论总论
V005-N00050.definition: 春、夏、长夏、秋、冬五季。长夏指农历六月。

V005-N00050.label: 五时
V005-N00050.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五行学说｜五行

V005-N00050.definition: The five seasons are spring, summer, late summer, autumn and winter. In the five elements, they are associated with wood, fire, earth, metal and water respectively.

V005-N00050.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00050.label: 五时

V005-N00051.label: 五气
V005-N00051.englishNames: Five  Climates; Five Emotions; Five  Kinds  of  Climates in Five  annual  Divisions; Five Successive Evolutive  Phases Correspouding   to Five Elements; Qi of Five Zang-Organs
V005-N00051.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五行学说｜五行
V005-N00051.definition: 五脏化生之气。也是情志活动即喜、怒、忧、悲、恐的物质基础。

V005-N00051.label: 五之气
V005-N00051.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五运六气学说原理｜运气学说｜五运六气｜六气｜主气
V005-N00051.definition: 指斗建由酉中至亥中，阳明燥金所主的时间，施布着清冷的燥气，故万物应之枯燥干涸。

V005-N00051.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00051.label: 五气
V005-N00051.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五行类
V005-N00051.definition: The prevailing climate qualities of the five seasons are wind, summer heat, dampness, dryness and cold. In the five elements, they are associated with wood, fire, earth, metal and water respectively.

V005-N00052.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00052.label: 五化
V005-N00052.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五行类
V005-N00052.definition: The five transformative states are birth, growth, transformation, harvest and storage. In the five elements, they are associated with wood, fire, earth, metal and water respectively.

V005-N00053.label: 五色
V005-N00053.definition: 青、赤、黄、白、黑5种常见的颜色。

V005-N00053.label: 五色

V005-N00053.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五行学说｜五行
V005-N00053.definition: 五色与五脏相配，即：青为肝、赤为心、白为肺、黄为脾、黑为肾。也指反映五脏病变及各种证候的五种病色。

V005-N00053.definition: The five colours are green, red, yellow, white and black. In the five elements, they are associated with wood, fire, earth, metal and water respectively.

V005-N00054.label: 五味

V005-N00054.definition: 五种不同的味道，以配合五行。木味酸、火味苦、土味甘、金味辛、水味咸。五味与五脏各有相宜，心欲苦，肺欲辛，肝欲酸，脾欲甘，肾欲咸。

V005-N00054.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00054.label: 五味
V005-N00054.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五行类
V005-N00054.definition: The five flavours are sour, bitter, sweet, pungent and salty. In the five elements, they are associated with wood, fire, earth, metal and water respectively.

V005-N00055.definition: The five musical notes are jué (mi), zhǐ(sol), gōng (do), shāng (re), and yǔ (la). In the five elements, they are associated with wood, fire, earth, metal and water respectively.

V005-N00066.definition: 五行之间依一定次序递相克制、制约的关系。

V005-N00066.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00066.label: 五行相克
V005-N00066.aliases: Mutual controlling among the five elements； Restriction in Five Elements
V005-N00066.englishNames: restriction among five elements/phases; The five elements mutually restrain; Mutual Restriction of Five Phases
V005-N00066.pinyinNames: wu xing xiang ke; wǔ xíng xiāng kè
V005-N00066.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五行类
V005-N00066.definition: The five elements mutually control and restrain one another. The sequential restraining relationships among the five elements are, specifically, wood restrains earth, earth restrains water, water restrains fire, fire restrains metal, and metal restrains wood.

V005-N00066.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00066.label: 五行相克
V005-N00066.englishNames: Mutual Restriction of Five Phases; restriction among five elements/phases

V005-N00067.label: 所胜

V005-N00067.definition: 在五行相克关系中，“我克”者为“我所胜”。如“木克土”，木为“我”，木之“所胜”是土。

V005-N00067.definition: 五行中，本行所能克制或制约的一行。

V005-N00074.definition: 五行中某一行对其所胜一行的过度克制，为五行之间的异常克制现象。

V005-N00086.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00086.label: 五行生克
V005-N00086.aliases: 五行制化； Five Element Generat Restrict
V005-N00086.path: TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中医基础理论｜中医理论基础｜五行学说
V005-N00086.definition: 五行之间相互制约，相互化生，化中有制，制中有化，二者相辅相成，才能维持其相对平衡和正常的协调关系。又称制化，制即克制，化即生化。

V005-N00086.label: 五行生克
V005-N00086.englishNames: Promotions  and  Restrictions  among   Five  Elements
V005-N00086.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五行学说｜生克乘侮
V005-N00086.definition: 五行在正常情况下相互滋生、相互制约的规律。

V005-N00087.label: 五行乘侮
V005-N00087.englishNames: over-Restriction  and  reverse-Restriction  among  five  elements
V005-N00087.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五行学说｜生克乘侮
V005-N00087.definition: 五行在异常情况下的生克关系。乘即乘虚侵袭之意。相克太过，超过正常制约的程度称之为乘。侮即欺侮，恃强凌弱之意。指五行中任何一行本身太过，而原来克它的一行，不仅不能去制约它，反而被它所克制。又称反克、反侮。

V005-N00088.label: 制化
V005-N00088.path: 中医基础理论｜中医基础理论总论
V005-N00088.definition: 制即克制，化即生化。五行之间相互制约，相互化生，化中有制，制中有化，二者相辅相成，才能维持其相对平衡和正常的协调关系。

V005-N00088.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00088.label: 五行生克（病机）
V005-N00088.aliases: 五行制化； Five Element Generat Restrict
V005-N00088.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病机
V005-N00088.definition: 五行之间相互制约，相互化生，化中有制，制中有化，二者相辅相成，才能维持其相对平衡和正常的协调关系。又称制化，制即克制，化即生化。

V005-N00088.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00088.label: 五行生克
V005-N00088.aliases: 五行制化； Five Element Generat Restrict
V005-N00088.path: TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中医基础理论｜中医理论基础｜五行学说
V005-N00088.definition: 五行之间相互制约，相互化生，化中有制，制中有化，二者相辅相成，才能维持其相对平衡和正常的协调关系。又称制化，制即克制，化即生化。

V005-N00088.label: 五行制化
V005-N00088.aliases: 己亢过极，反似胜己之化； 亢害承制； 亢则害，承乃制，制则生化； 生中有制； 制化

V005-N00088.definition: 五行之间既相互资生，又相互制约，维持平衡协调，推动事物间稳定有序的变化与发展。

V005-N00088.englishNames: The five elements mutually control and transform

V005-N00088.definition: A balanced, harmonized state maintained by mutual generating and restraining relationships among the five elements.

V005-N00088.definition: the engendering and restraining relationships for maintaining a relative balance and normal coordination in the five phase theory

V005-N00089.label: 五行胜复
V005-N00089.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五行学说
V005-N00089.definition: 五行中的一行亢盛（即胜气），引起其所不胜（即复气）的报复性制约，从而使五行之间复归于协调和稳定。

V005-N00089.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00089.label: 五行胜复
V005-N00089.englishNames: The five elements overcome and retaliate
V005-N00089.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五行类
V005-N00089.definition: The five elements have the actions of overcoming and retaliating with one another.

V005-N00090.label: 亢害承制
V005-N00090.englishNames: restraining excessiveness to acquire harmony; harmful hyperactivity and responding inhibition
V005-N00090.path: 中医基础理论｜中医基础理论总论
V005-N00090.definition: 五行某一行偏亢则失去平衡而为害，惟有随之克制亢害之行才能恢复相对平衡。

V005-N00090.englishNames: regular   changes  due to inter-Promotions  and inter-Restrictions  among   five  elements

V005-N00090.definition: 五行之间既相互资生，又相互制约，维持平衡协调，推动事物间稳定有序的变化与发展。

V005-N00092.label: 脏象学说
V005-N00092.definition: 研究人体脏腑生理功能、病理变化规律及相互关系与外在征象的学说。

V005-N00092.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00092.label: 脏象学说
V005-N00092.aliases: 藏象学说； Viscera State Theory
V005-N00092.path: TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜医学，传统｜医学，中国传统｜中医药学｜中医学｜中医各家学说
V005-N00092.definition: 研究人体脏腑生理功能、病理变化规律及相互关系与外在征象的学说。

V005-N00092.label: 藏象学说
V005-N00092.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜藏象学说原理｜藏象的一般性概念
V005-N00092.definition: 是中医学基础理论的一个重要内容。是研究人体脏腑活动规律及其相互关系的学说。它认为人体是以五脏为中心，以六腑相配合，以气、血、精、津液为物质基础，通过经络使脏与脏、腑与腑、脏与腑密切联系，外连五官九窍、四肢百骸，构成一个有机整体。它是我国劳动人民和医学家，通过长期对人类生命活动的观察研究和防病治病的实践，并吸取了阴阳五行的理论，逐步形成和发展起来的学说，对中医诊治疾病有重要的指导意义。中医理论的五脏六腑虽有一定的解剖概念，但主要是阐述其生理功能和病理现象，因而不能与现代解剖学中的同名脏器完全等同。

V005-N00092.label: 藏象学说
V005-N00092.path: 原理和经验｜经验｜中医学说｜推拿主要学说
V005-N00092.definition: 是以中医藏象学说为指导思想而形成的脏腑推拿学派，代表医家有王文、董好魁等诸家。

V005-N00092.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00092.label: 脏象学说
V005-N00092.definition: the theory dealing with the study of physiological functions and pathological changes of the internal organs as well as their interrelationship and external manifestation

V005-N00093.label: 脏象
V005-N00093.definition: 脏腑生理功能、病理变化表现于外的征象。脏，指藏于体内的内脏；象，为表现于外的生理功能和病理现象。

V005-N00093.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表

V005-N00094.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00094.label: 脏腑
