V005-N00516.label: 足太阴脾经
V005-N00516.englishNames: spleen meridian (SP); foot greater yin spleen meridian; channel$ SP
V005-N00516.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which runs from yinbai (SP1) at the medial side of the great toe, ascends along the medial side of the foot and tibia and anteromedial side of the thigh to the lower abdomen. It then enters the abdomen and connects

V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.path: 经络｜十二经脉｜足三阴经
V005-N00517.definition: 十二经脉之一。起于足大趾背毫毛处，属于肝，联络胆，连目系，止于巅。

V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.englishNames: liver meridian/channel of foot reverting yin(LR); liver meridian of foot-jueyin; Jueyin Liver Channel of Foot; Jueyin Liver Meridian of Foot; liver meridian of foot jueyin; liver meridian (LR); foot reverting yin liver meridian; channel $ LR
V005-N00517.definition: 本经起于足大趾爪甲后丛毛处，向上沿足背至内踝前1寸处，向上沿胫骨内缘，在内踝上8寸处交出足太明脾经之后，上行过膝内侧，沿大腿内侧中线进入阴毛中，绕阴器，至小腹，夹胃两旁，属肝，络胆，向上穿过膈肌，分布于胁肋部。沿喉咙的后边，向上进入鼻咽部，上行连接目系，出于额，上行与督脉会于头顶部。其分支从肝分出，穿过膈肌，向上注入肺，经气由此处与手太阴肺经相接。

V005-N00517.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00517.label: 肝经
V005-N00517.aliases: 足厥阴肝经； 足厥阴经； Jueyin Liver Channel of Foot； Jueyin Liver Meridian of Foot
V005-N00517.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉｜十二经脉｜阴经｜厥阴经
V005-N00517.definition: 十二经脉之一，起于足大趾爪甲后丛毛处，向上沿足背至内踝前1寸处，向上沿胫骨内缘，在内踝上8寸处交出足太阴脾经之后，上行过膝内侧，沿大腿内侧中线进入阴毛中，绕阴器，至小腹，夹胃两旁，属肝，络胆，向上穿过膈肌，分布于胁肋部。沿喉咙的后边，向上进入鼻咽部，上行连接目系，出于额，上行与督脉会于头顶部。其分支从肝分出，穿过膈肌，向上注入肺，经气由此处与手太阴肺经相接。

V005-N00517.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00517.label: 穴位，肝经
V005-N00517.aliases: 肝经穴位； 穴位，肝经Point，Liver Meridian； 穴位，足厥阴肝经； 足厥阴肝经穴位； Points, LIV； Points, LR
V005-N00517.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜针刺穴位
V005-N00517.definition: 足厥阴肝经穴位，共有14个，分别为大敦、行间、太冲、中封、蠡沟、中都、膝关、曲泉、阴包、足五里、阴廉、急脉、章门、期门。

V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.aliases: 肝经； 肝足厥阴之脉； 足厥阴
V005-N00517.englishNames: liver meridian (LR); Liver Meridian of Foot-Jueyin
V005-N00517.path: 机体形态｜经络｜经脉｜十二经脉｜足经｜足三阴经
V005-N00517.definition: 十二经脉之一。其循行从大趾背毫毛部开始，向上沿着足背内侧，离内踝一寸，上行小腿内侧，离内踝八寸处交出足太阴脾经之后，上膝腘内侧，沿着大腿内侧，进入阴毛中，环绕阴部，至小腹，夹胃旁边，属于肝，络于胆，向上通过膈肌，分布胁肋，沿喉咙之后，向上进入颃颡，连接目系，上行出于额部，与督脉交会于头顶。

V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00517.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00517.definition: The liver meridian pertains to the liver and connects with the gallbladder. It mainly travels along the medial aspect of the leg, passes over the chest and abdomen, and its divergent meridian reaches the vertex.

V005-N00517.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.englishNames: liver meridian of foot jueyin; liver meridian/channel of foot reverting yin(LR); Jueyin Liver Channel of Foot; Jueyin Liver Meridian of Foot

V005-N00517.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.englishNames: liver meridian (LR); foot reverting yin liver meridian; channel $ LR

V005-N00517.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.aliases: 肝经； 肝足厥阴之脉； 足厥阴
V005-N00517.englishNames: liver meridian (LR); Liver Meridian of Foot-Jueyin
V005-N00517.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which runs from dadun (LR1) on the medial aspect of the big toe just behind the nail, through the inner side of the lower limb, external genitalia and abdomen, to qimen (LR14), a point about 2 cun below the nipple.

V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.path: 经络｜十二经脉｜足三阴经
V005-N00518.definition: 十二经脉之一。起于足小趾之下，属于肾，联络膀胱，止于舌根两侧。

V005-N00518.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00518.label: 肾经
V005-N00518.aliases: 足少阴经； 足少阴肾经； Shaoyin Kidney Channel of Foot； Shaoyin Kidney Meridian of Foot
V005-N00518.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉｜十二经脉｜足经｜足三阴经
V005-N00518.definition: 十二经脉之一；起于足小趾下，斜行于足心涌泉穴，出行于舟骨粗隆之下，沿内踝后，分出进入足跟，向上沿小腿内侧后缘，至腘内侧，上股内侧后缘入脊内，穿过脊柱，属肾，络膀胱。其直行主干从肾分出，上行，穿过肝和膈肌，进入肺，沿喉咙，到舌根两旁。其分支从肺中分出，络心，注于胸中，经气于此处与手厥阴心包经相接。

V005-N00518.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00518.label: 穴位，肾经
V005-N00518.aliases: 肾经穴位； 穴位，足少阴肾经； 足少阴肾经穴位； Point，Kidney Meridian
V005-N00518.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜针刺穴位
V005-N00518.definition: 足少阴肾经穴位，共有27个，分别为涌泉、然谷、太溪、大钟、水泉、照海、复溜、交信、筑宾、阴谷、横骨、大赫、气穴、四满、中注、肓俞、商曲、石关、阴都、腹通谷、幽门、步廊、神封、灵墟、神藏、彧中、俞府。

V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.aliases: 肾经； 肾足少阴之脉； 足少阴
V005-N00518.englishNames: kidney meridian (KI); Kidney Meridian of Foot-Shaoyin
V005-N00518.path: 机体形态｜经络｜经脉｜十二经脉｜足经｜足三阴经
V005-N00518.definition: 十二经脉之一。其循行从足小趾下边开始，斜行足底心，出于舟骨粗隆下，沿内踝之后，分支进入足跟，上向小腿内，出腘窝内侧，上大腿内后侧，通过脊柱，属于肾，络于膀胱。它直行的脉，从肾向上，通过肝、膈，进入肺中，沿着喉咙，夹舌根旁。

V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00518.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00518.definition: The kidney meridian pertains to the kidney and connects with the urinary bladder. It mainly travels along the posterior border of the medial aspect of the leg and passes through the chest and abdomen, finally terminating at the root of the tongue.

V005-N00518.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.englishNames: kidney meridian of foot shaoyin; kidney meridian/channel of foot lesser yin(KI)

V005-N00518.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.englishNames: kidney meridian (KI); foot lesser yin kidney meridian; channel $ KL

V005-N00518.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.englishNames: kidney meridian (KI); foot lesser yin kidney meridian; channel $ KL
V005-N00518.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which begins on the plantar tip of the small toe and travels to yongquan (KI1) in the center of the sole, continues along the medial side of the lower limb to the symphysis pubis, turns internally to the kidney and

V005-N00519.label: 十二经别
V005-N00519.definition: 十二经脉别行而离入出合，深入体腔的支脉。

V005-N00519.label: 经别
V005-N00519.definition: 十二经脉别行深入体腔，循行于胸腔、腹腔及头部的重要支脉，具有补充十二经脉内外循行联系，加强经脉所属络的脏腑在体腔深部之联系的功能。

V005-N00519.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00519.label: 十二经别
V005-N00519.englishNames: twelve meridian divergences; Branches of the Twelve Regular Channels; Collaterals of Twelve Meridians; the Branches of the Twelve Meridians; the Twelve Divergent Meridians; Twelve Meridian Divergences
V005-N00519.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉
V005-N00519.definition: 是十二正经离、入、出、合的别行部分，是正经别行深入体腔的支脉。十二经别多从四肢肘膝关节附近的正经别出（离），经过躯干深入体腔与相关的脏腑相联系（入），再浅出于体表上行头项部（出），在头项部，阳经经别合于本经的经脉，阴经经别合于其相表里的阳经经脉（合）。十二经别按阴阳表里关系汇合成六组，故有“六合”之称。

V005-N00519.label: 十二经别
V005-N00519.englishNames: twelve meridian divergences; Branches of the Twelve Regular Channels; Collaterals of Twelve Meridians; the Branches of the Twelve Meridians; the Twelve Divergent Meridians; Twelve Meridian Divergences
V005-N00519.definition: 中医学名词。十二经别是从十二经脉别出的支脉，故称十二经别。

V005-N00519.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00519.label: 十二经别
V005-N00519.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00519.definition: The twelve divergent meridians branch out from the twelve regular meridians and are deeper in the body. They function to strengthen the connection between internally-externally coupled meridians.

V005-N00519.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00519.label: 十二经别
V005-N00519.englishNames: twelve divergent meridians; twelve meridian/channel divergences

V005-N00519.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00519.label: 经别

V005-N00519.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00519.label: 十二经别
V005-N00519.englishNames: twelve meridian divergences; Branches of the Twelve Regular Channels; Collaterals of Twelve Meridians; the Branches of the Twelve Meridians; the Twelve Divergent Meridians; Twelve Meridian Divergences
V005-N00519.definition: the divergent passages of the twelve main meridians going deep in the body

V005-N00519.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00519.label: 经别
V005-N00519.definition: the divergent passage of a regular meridian going deep in the body

V005-N00520.label: 经筋
V005-N00520.definition: 人体经络系统中具有连属和运动作用的筋肉体系。皆从四肢末端走向头身，结聚于关节、骨骼部。

V005-N00520.label: 十二经筋
V005-N00520.definition: 十二经脉之气濡养筋肉骨节的体系，附属于十二经的筋肉系统。

V005-N00520.label: 经筋
V005-N00520.definition: 附属十二经脉的筋膜系统，是十二经脉之气濡养筋肉骨节的体系，具有约束骨骼，屈伸关节的功能。

V005-N00520.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00520.label: 十二经筋
V005-N00520.englishNames: twelve meridian sinews; Twelve Meridian Sinews
V005-N00520.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉
V005-N00520.definition: 十二经脉之气结聚散络于筋肉关节的体系，是十二经脉连属于筋肉关节的部分。十二经筋皆隶属于十二经脉，并随所辖经脉而命名。

V005-N00520.label: 十二经筋
V005-N00520.englishNames: Arteries of the Twelve Meridians; Muscles along the Twelve Regular Channels; Musculature of the Twelve Meridians
V005-N00520.path: 机体形态｜经络｜连属部分
V005-N00520.definition: 十二经筋是经络系统中具有连属和运动作用的筋肉体系。出《黄帝内经》。它行于四肢百骸、胸廓腹壁，虽归十二经脉所属，但不入脏腑，其数目和路线也与十二经脉相同。它结聚联缀，维系周身的皮肉筋骨，从而使人体成为能动作的统一整体。

V005-N00520.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00520.label: 十二经筋
V005-N00520.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00520.definition: The twelve muscle regions are corresponding sites where the qi and blood of the twelve meridians to nourish the muscles and tendons. Their distributions are almost the same as that of the twelve meridians.

V005-N00520.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00520.label: 十二经筋
V005-N00520.englishNames: tendons along twelve meridians; twelve meridian/channel sinews

V005-N00520.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00520.label: 经筋

V005-N00520.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00520.label: 十二经筋
V005-N00520.englishNames: twelve meridian sinews; Twelve Meridian Sinews
V005-N00520.definition: the sinew systems attributed to the twelve meridians

V005-N00520.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00520.label: 经筋
V005-N00520.definition: the sinew system attributed to a certain meridian/ channel

V005-N00521.label: 十二皮部
V005-N00521.definition: 十二经脉的功能活动反应于体表的部位，也是十二经脉在体表的划分区域。

V005-N00521.label: 皮部
V005-N00521.definition: 十二经脉及其所属络脉在体表的分区，经气布散之所在，具有保卫机体，抗御外邪的功能，并能反映十二经脉的病证。

V005-N00521.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00521.label: 十二皮部
V005-N00521.aliases: 六经皮部； 皮部； 皮有分部； Twelve Skin Areas
V005-N00521.englishNames: twelve cutaneous regions; Twelve Cutaneous Regions; Twelve Skin Areas
V005-N00521.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉
V005-N00521.definition: 是十二经脉功能活动反映于体表的部位，也是络脉之气散布之所在。十二皮部的分布区域是以十二经脉在体表的分布范围，既十二经脉在皮肤上的分属部分为依据而划分的。

V005-N00521.label: 十二皮部
V005-N00521.aliases: 六经皮部； 皮部； 皮有分部； Twelve Skin Areas
V005-N00521.englishNames: twelve cutaneous regions; Twelve Cutaneous Regions; Twelve Skin Areas
V005-N00521.path: 机体形态｜经络｜连属部分
V005-N00521.definition: 十二经脉功能活动反映于体表的部位，也是络脉之气散布之处。;十二皮部是经络系统的皮肤分区。经脉是呈线状分布的，络脉呈网状分布，而其所属的皮部，则是成片的带状分布。十二经脉及其络属的脏腑，在皮肤都有相应的投影部位，故称十二皮部。

V005-N00521.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00521.label: 十二皮部
V005-N00521.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00521.definition: The twelve cutaneous regions are corresponding sites where the qi and blood of the twelve meridians to nourish the skin. They are generally known as the outward manifestations of the twelve meridians and collaterals.

V005-N00521.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00521.label: 十二皮部
V005-N00521.englishNames: twelve skin regions; twelve cutaneous regions

V005-N00521.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00521.label: 皮部

V005-N00521.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00521.label: 十二皮部
V005-N00521.aliases: 六经皮部； 皮部； 皮有分部； Twelve Skin Areas
V005-N00521.englishNames: twelve cutaneous regions; Twelve Cutaneous Regions; Twelve Skin Areas
V005-N00521.definition: the regions of the skin reflecting the functional condition of the twelve meridians respectively

V005-N00521.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00521.label: 皮部
V005-N00521.definition: the region of the skin reflecting the functional condition of a certain meridian

V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.definition: 督脉、任脉、冲脉、带脉、阴维脉、阳维脉、阴跷脉和阳跷脉的总称。

V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.englishNames: eight extra meridians; Eight Extra Meridians; eight extra meridians/channels; Eight Extraordinary Channels; Eight Extraordinary Meridians
V005-N00522.definition: 督脉、任脉、冲脉、带脉、阴维脉、阳维脉、阴跷脉、阳跷脉的合称。

V005-N00522.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.englishNames: eight extra meridians; Eight Extra Meridians
V005-N00522.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉
V005-N00522.definition: 督脉、任脉、冲脉、带脉、阴维脉、阳维脉、阴跷脉、阳跷脉的合称。

V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.englishNames: Eight Extra Channels; Eight Extra Meridians
V005-N00522.definition: 经络名。指十二经脉以外的八条经脉，是相对于十二正经而言，包括任脉、督脉、冲脉、带脉、阴跷脉、阳跷脉、阴维脉和阳维脉。

V005-N00522.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00522.definition: The eight extraordinary meridians are different from the twelve regular meridians with special distributions and functions. They are Du meridian, Ren meridian, Chong meridian, Dai meridian, Yinwei meridian, Yangwei meridian, Yinqiao meridian and Yangqiao meridian.

V005-N00522.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.englishNames: eight extra meridians; eight extra meridians/channels; Eight Extraordinary Channels; Eight Extraordinary Meridians

V005-N00522.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.englishNames: eight extra meridians; Eight Extra Meridians
V005-N00522.definition: a collective term for governor vessel, conception vessel, thoroughfare vessel, belt vessel, yin heel vessel, yang heel vessel, yin link vessel, and yang link vessel

V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于小腹内，下出会阴，向后行于脊内，入脑，上巅顶，止于唇。

V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.aliases: Du Meridian； Governor Channel； 阳脉之海
V005-N00523.englishNames: Governor Vessel; governor vessel; governor vessel (GV); governor vessel(GV); Governor Channel; GV
V005-N00523.definition: 起于胞中，下出会阴，沿脊柱里边直向上行，至项后风府穴处进入颅内，络脑，并由项沿头部正中线，上行颠顶，沿前额正中，鼻柱正中，至上唇系带处。

V005-N00523.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉
V005-N00523.definition: 起于胞中，下出会阴，沿脊柱里边直向上行，至项后风府穴处进入颅内，络脑，并由项沿头部正中线，上行巅顶，沿前额正中，鼻柱正中，至上唇系带处。

V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.path: 机体形态｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉
V005-N00523.definition: 奇经八脉之一。其循行：起于小腹内，下出于会阴部，向后行于脊柱里面，上行达项后风府穴，进入脑部，上至巅顶，沿额下行鼻柱至上齿龈。

V005-N00523.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00523.definition: The Du meridian is mainly distributed over the head, face and along the midline of the back.

V005-N00523.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00523.label: 阳脉之海
V005-N00523.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00523.definition: The Du meridian governs meridian qi of all yang meridians and is therefore known as “the sea of yang meridians”.

V005-N00523.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.englishNames: governor vessel; governor vessel(GV); Governor Channel; Governor Vessel

V005-N00523.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00523.label: 督脉

V005-N00523.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates in the lower abdomen and exits at changqiang (GV1), a point at the back of the anus, sending one branch forward to huiyin (CV1). The main portion of the meridian/channel ascends along the midline of th

V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于小腹内，下出会阴，沿腹上达咽喉，环绕口唇，止于目下。

V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.aliases: Conception Channel； Ren Meridian； 阴脉之海
V005-N00524.englishNames: Conception Vessel; conception vessel; conception vessel(CV); Conception Channel; CV; conception vessel (CV)
V005-N00524.definition: 起于胞中，下出会阴，向上前行至阴毛部位，沿腹部和胸部正中线直上，经咽喉，至下颌，环绕口唇，沿面颊，分行至目眶下。

V005-N00524.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉
V005-N00524.definition: 起于胞中，下出会阴，向上前行至阴毛部位，沿腹部和胸部正中线直上，经咽喉，至下颌，环绕口唇，沿面颊，分行至目眶下。

V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.path: 机体形态｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉
V005-N00524.definition: 奇经八脉之一。其循行路线是：起于胞中，出于会阴部，上行于胸腹正中线，抵颏部。

V005-N00524.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00524.definition: The Ren meridian is mainly distributed over the neck, face and along the midline of the chest and abdomen.

V005-N00524.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00524.label: 阴脉之海
V005-N00524.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00524.definition: The Ren meridian governs meridian qi of all yin meridians and is therefore known as “the sea of yin meridians”.

V005-N00524.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.englishNames: conception vessel; conception vessel(CV); Conception Channel; Conception Vessel

V005-N00524.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00524.label: 任脉

V005-N00524.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates in the lower abdomen, exists at huiyin (CV1), a point in the center of perineum, and ascends the midline of the abdominal wall and chest to chengjiang (CV24), midpoint of the mentolabial sulcus. The i

V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.definition: 经脉之海奇经八脉之一。起于小腹内，下出会阴，上行脊内，沿腹两侧，上达咽喉，环绕口唇而终。

V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.englishNames: thoroughfare vessel; Chong Channel; Chong Vessel; thoroughfare vessel(TV); thoroghfare vessel
V005-N00525.definition: 起于胞中，下出会阴后，从气街部起与足少阴经相并，夹脐上行，散入胸中，上达咽喉，环绕口唇。

V005-N00525.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉
V005-N00525.definition: 起于胞中，下出会阴后，从气街部起与足少阴经相并，夹脐上行，散入胸中，上达咽喉，环绕口唇。

V005-N00525.label: 血海
V005-N00525.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜针灸原理｜经络原理｜经络学说｜四海
V005-N00525.definition: 四海之一，指冲脉。出《灵枢·海论》。又称十二经之海。冲脉上循脊里，与十二经脉会聚而贯通全身，故称。

V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.aliases: 经脉之海； 太冲脉； 血海
V005-N00525.path: 机体形态｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉
V005-N00525.definition: 奇经八脉之一。又名太冲脉。出《灵枢·逆顺肥瘦》。其循行，起于小腹内，浅出气街部，与足少阴经并行，夹脐旁直上，至胸中散开，上行的一支至咽喉，上行至鼻之内窍，分别散络唇口。下行者，注入肾之大络，出于气街部。沿大腿内侧，斜入腘中，经过胫骨内廉，到内踝后又分两去，一支向下并于足少阴肾达足底，一支向前至足跗上行于足大趾。另一支，从小腹分出，向内贯脊，行于背部。

V005-N00525.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00525.definition: The Chong meridian is mainly distributed over the chest and face, inside the spine and along the first lateral line of the abdomen.

V005-N00525.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.englishNames: thoroghfare vessel; thoroughfare vessel(TV); Chong Channel; Chong Vessel

V005-N00525.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates in the lower abdomen, exits at the perineum, and comes into confluence with kidney meridian and then runs upward along the two sides of the abdomen to the chest

V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于足跟内侧，沿大腿内侧上行至腹部，与足太阴经相合，过胸部与任脉会于颈部。

V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.englishNames: yin link vessel; Yin Link Channel; Yin Link Vessel; yin link vessel(Yin LV)
V005-N00527.definition: 起于小腿内侧足三阴经交会之处，沿下肢内侧上行，至腹部，与足太阴脾经同行，到胁部，与足厥阴经相合，然后上行至咽喉，合于任脉。

V005-N00527.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.englishNames: yin link vessel; Yin Link Channel
V005-N00527.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉
V005-N00527.definition: 起于小腿内侧足三阴经交会之处，沿下肢内侧上行，至腹部，与足太阴脾经同行，到胁部，与足厥阴经相合，然后上行至咽喉，合于任脉。

V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.path: 机体形态｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉｜维脉
V005-N00527.definition: 奇经八脉之一。其循行线路是：起于小腿内侧，沿下肢内侧上行至腹部，与足太阴脾经相合，过胸部，至咽喉，与任脉会合。

V005-N00527.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00527.definition: The Yinwei meridian is mainly distributed over the medial aspect of the leg and thigh and ascends along the third lateral line of the abdomen. It reaches the throat and meets with the Ren meridian at Tiantu (Ren 22) and Lianquan (Ren 23).

V005-N00527.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.englishNames: yin link vessel; yin link vessel(Yin LV); Yin Link Channel; Yin Link Vessel

V005-N00527.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.englishNames: yin link vessel; Yin Link Channel
V005-N00527.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates from the upper part of the inner ankle, running upward along the medial side of the lower limb, through the abdomen, chest and throat, terminating at the back of the neck

V005-N00528.label: 阳维脉
V005-N00528.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于足跟外侧，上经外踝，沿足少阳经上行髋关节，经胁肋后侧，从腋后上肩，至前额，达项后，合于督脉。

V005-N00528.label: 阳维脉
V005-N00528.englishNames: yang link vessel; Yang Link Channel; Yang Link Vessel
V005-N00528.definition: 起于足跟外侧，向上经过外踝，与足少阳胆经并行，沿下肢外侧上行至髋部，经胁肋后侧，从腋后上肩，至前额，再到项后，合于督脉。

V005-N00528.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00528.label: 阳维脉
V005-N00528.englishNames: yang link vessel; Yang Link Channel
V005-N00528.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉
V005-N00528.definition: 起于足跟外侧，向上经过外踝，与足少阳胆经并行，沿下肢外侧上行至髋部，经胁肋后侧，从腋后上肩，至前额，再到项后，合于督脉。

V005-N00528.label: 阳维脉
V005-N00528.path: 机体形态｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉｜维脉
V005-N00528.definition: 中医学名词。奇经八脉之一。其循行线路是：起于足跟外侧，向上经过外踝，沿足少阳胆经上行髋关节部，经胁肋后侧，从腋后上肩，至前额，再到项后，合于督脉。

V005-N00528.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00528.label: 阳维脉
V005-N00528.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00528.definition: The Yangwei meridian is mainly distributed below the external malleolus, the lateral aspect of the leg, and over the subcostal area, shoulder and sides of the head. It meets with the Du meridian at Fengfu (Du 16) and Yamen (Du 15).

V005-N00528.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00528.label: 阳维脉
V005-N00528.englishNames: yang link vessel; Yang Link Channel
V005-N00528.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates from the lower part of the outer ankle running upward along the lateral side of the lower limb, through the side of the trunk, the shoulder, neck and terminating at the top of the head

V005-N00529.label: 阴跷脉
V005-N00529.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于足跟内侧直上沿大腿内侧，过阴部，沿腹、胸内侧入锁骨上窝，经人迎，过鼻旁至目内眦。

V005-N00529.label: 阴跷脉
V005-N00529.aliases: 阴蹻脉； Yin Heel Vessel； Yinqiao Vessel
V005-N00529.englishNames: Yin Heel Channel; Yin Heel Vessel; yin heel vessel; yin heel vessel(Yin HV)
V005-N00529.definition: 起于内踝下照海穴，经过内踝后，沿下肢内侧上行，经阴部，沿腹、胸进入缺盆，再上行，出人迎穴之前，经鼻旁，到目内眦，与手足太阳经、阳跷脉会合。

V005-N00529.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00529.label: 阴跷脉
V005-N00529.aliases: 阴蹻脉； Yin Heel Vessel； Yinqiao Vessel
V005-N00529.englishNames: yin heel vessel; Yin Heel Channel
V005-N00529.path: TA[中医形态]｜经络腧穴｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉
V005-N00529.definition: 起于内踝下照海穴，经过内踝后，沿下肢内侧上行，经阴部，沿腹、胸进入缺盆，再上行，出人迎穴之前，经鼻旁，到目内眦，与手足太阳经、阳跷脉会合。

V005-N00529.label: 阴跷脉
V005-N00529.path: 机体形态｜经络｜经脉｜奇经八脉｜跷脉
V005-N00529.definition: 针灸学名词。奇经八脉之一，是循行于下肢内侧及腹、胸腔与面部的主一身之阴气的阴脉。其循行线路是：起于内踝下照海穴，经过内踝后，沿下肢内侧上行，经阴部，沿腹、胸进入缺盆，再上行，出人迎穴之前，经鼻旁，到目内眦，与手足太阳经、阳跷脉会合。

V005-N00529.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00529.label: 阴跷脉
V005-N00529.englishNames: yin heel vessel; yin heel vessel(Yin HV); Yin Heel Channel; Yin Heel Vessel

V005-N00529.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00529.label: 阴跷脉
V005-N00529.aliases: 阴蹻脉； Yin Heel Vessel； Yinqiao Vessel
V005-N00529.englishNames: yin heel vessel; Yin Heel Channel

V005-N00530.label: 阳跷脉

V005-N00564.definition: 以各种病症的临床表现为依据，通过分析疾病的症状体征，找出其病因病机。如眩晕、震颤、抽搐等症状，多属于风，病变在肝；狂躁、神昏等症状，多属于火，病变在心包等。

V005-N00565.englishNames: disease caused by hyperactivity; overuse causing disease
V005-N00565.definition: 中医病因学的基本观点。认为四季六气与饮食营养本是人赖以生存的必备条件，七情本是人对生存环境的精神活动，劳逸作息本是人类生存和繁衍的行为方式，但是如果气候反常、饮食失调及人的各种活动过极，就成为导致疾病的根本原因。

V005-N00566.englishNames: theory of three categories of disease cause; theory of three types of disease causes; theroy of three types of disease cause
V005-N00566.definition: 是宋代陈言关于中医病因分类的学说，六淫为外因；七情为内因；饮食所伤、劳倦过度、外伤、虫兽伤、溺水等为不内外因。

V005-N00566.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00566.label: 三因学说
V005-N00566.englishNames: Theory of Three Types of Disease Causes
V005-N00566.path: TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜医学，传统｜医学，中国传统｜中医药学｜中医学｜中医各家学说
V005-N00566.definition: 中医学说之一，由南宋陈言创立，把病因归为内因（七情所伤）、外因（感受六淫之气）和不内外因（饮食饥饱、疲极筋力、乃至虎狼毒虫所伤）。

V005-N00566.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00566.definition: A theory that classifies etiological factors into internal, external and neither internal nor external.

V005-N00567.definition: 内因、外因、不内外因的合称。现代中医学中很少用“不内外因”来归类，而将内因、外因之外的病因概括为“其他病因”。

V005-N00567.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00567.definition: external cause, internal cause, and cause neither internal nor external － an ancient classification of causes of disease, also called three categories of causes of disease

V005-N00568.label: 内因
V005-N00568.definition: 三因学说中指喜、怒、忧、思、悲、恐、惊七情内伤过度。现将七情过极、劳倦损伤和饮食失调等能导致气机紊乱，脏腑受损的病因称为内伤病因。

V005-N00568.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00568.label: 内因
V005-N00568.definition: one of the three causes of disease, one that arises within the body, referring chiefly to the excessive emotional changes

V005-N00569.label: 外因
V005-N00569.definition: 三因学说中指外感风、寒、暑、湿、燥、火六淫病邪。现将六淫和各种疫疠病邪统属外感病因；跌仆、虫兽伤、烧伤、冻伤等称为外伤病因。

V005-N00569.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00569.label: 外因
V005-N00569.definition: one of the three causes of disease, one that originates outside the body, referring chiefly to the six excesses and pestilential pathogens

V005-N00570.label: 不内外因
V005-N00570.englishNames: cause neither internal nor external; non-endo-non-exogenous cause; non-endo-exogenous
V005-N00570.definition: 三因学说中指饮食所伤、劳倦过度、外伤、虫兽所伤，以及溺水等多种致病因素。现代中医学中已很少用此分类法。

V005-N00570.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V005-N00570.englishNames: Neither internal nor external etiological factors; cause neither internal nor external; non-endo-non-exogenous cause; non-endo-exogenous
V005-N00570.pinyinNames: bù nèi wài yīn; bu nei wai yin
V005-N00570.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类

V005-N00573.definition: 七情过极、劳倦损伤、饮食失调等致病因素导致气机紊乱，脏腑受损而发病的过程。

V005-N00573.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表

V005-N00573.definition: 病因之一，泛指内损脏气的致病因素。病名，与内损同，由撞击跌扑、强力负重或其他因素伤及脏腑气血的一类病证。

V005-N00573.label: 内伤病因
V005-N00573.definition: 指情志或行为不循常度，直接伤及脏腑而发病的致病因素。包括七情过极、过劳、过逸、饮食失宜等。

V005-N00573.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00573.label: 内伤病因
V005-N00573.englishNames: cause of endogenous injury; Endogenous etiological factors
V005-N00573.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00573.definition: Internal dysfunctions due to extreme emotions, over-exertion, and improper diet.

V005-N00573.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00573.label: 内伤
V005-N00573.englishNames: internal damage; Internal Damage; endogenous injury

V005-N00573.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00573.label: 内伤
V005-N00573.englishNames: endogenous injury; internal damage; Internal Damage
V005-N00573.definition: any detrimental effect on visceral qi produced by intemperance of the seven emotions, overexertion and fatigue, improper diet and sexual overindulgence

V005-N00574.label: 病理产物
V005-N00574.definition: 指在初始病因作用下，机体气化功能失调所产生并引起新的病理变化的致病因素。包括痰饮、瘀血、结石。

V005-N00575.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00575.label: 邪气
V005-N00575.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因
V005-N00575.definition: 与正气相对而言，泛指各种致病因素，包括存在于外界环境之中的和人体内部产生的各种具有致病或损伤正气作用的因素，诸如六淫、疠气、七情、外伤及痰饮、瘀血等。

V005-N00575.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00575.label: 邪气
V005-N00575.englishNames: pathogenic qi; Pathogenic Factors; Pathogenic qi
V005-N00575.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00575.definition: Opposite to healthy qi, it is a collective term for all pathogenic factors.

V005-N00575.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00575.label: 邪气

V005-N00575.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00575.label: 病邪
V005-N00575.definition: an agent causing disease, also called pathogenic factor or pathogenic qi

V005-N00576.label: 阳邪
V005-N00576.englishNames: yang pathogen; pathogen attacking yang meridians/channels

V005-N00576.label: 阳邪
V005-N00576.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阳
V005-N00576.definition: 有温热性质的邪气，如六淫病邪中的风、暑、燥、火之邪。

V005-N00576.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00576.label: 阳邪
V005-N00576.englishNames: yang pathogen; Yang pathogens; pathogen attacking yang meridians/channels
V005-N00576.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00576.definition: Opposite to yin pathogens, refers to pathogenic factors of yang nature, such as wind, summer-heat or fire-heat.

V005-N00576.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00576.label: 阳邪
V005-N00576.englishNames: yang pathogen; pathogen attacking yang meridians/channels

V005-N00576.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00576.label: 阳邪

V005-N00577.label: 阴邪
V005-N00577.englishNames: yin pathogen; pathogen attacking yin meridians/channels

V005-N00577.label: 阴邪
V005-N00577.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴
V005-N00577.definition: 六淫病邪中的寒、湿之邪。;指侵犯阴经的邪气。

V005-N00577.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00577.label: 阴邪
V005-N00577.englishNames: yin pathogen; pathogen attacking yin meridians/channels; Yin pathogens
V005-N00577.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00577.definition: Opposite to yang pathogens, refers to pathogenic factors of yin nature, such as cold or dampness.

V005-N00577.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00577.label: 阴邪
V005-N00577.englishNames: yin pathogen; pathogen attacking yin meridians/channels

V005-N00577.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00577.label: 阴邪

V005-N00578.label: 五邪
V005-N00578.englishNames: five pathogens; five categories of pathogen
V005-N00578.definition: （1）邪在五脏；（2）中风、伤暑、伤寒、中湿、饮食劳倦五种病因；（3）根据五脏五行属性进行分类的实邪、虚邪、贼邪、微邪、正邪的合称。邪气从子脏传向母脏为实邪，从母脏传向子脏为虚邪，从所不胜传所胜为贼邪，从所股传所不胜为微邪，感五行中同行之邪为正邪。

V005-N00578.label: 五邪
V005-N00578.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因
V005-N00578.definition: 指邪在肺、肝、脾胃、肾、心五脏的总称。

V005-N00578.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00578.label: 五邪
V005-N00578.englishNames: five pathogens; five categories of pathogen

V005-N00579.label: 虚邪
V005-N00579.englishNames: deficiency-type pathogen; pathogen from mother-organ; deficient pathogen; pathogen attack in deficiency condition
V005-N00579.definition: （1）体虚受邪；（2）从母脏传向子脏的邪气。

V005-N00579.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00579.label: 虚邪
V005-N00579.englishNames: Deficiency pathogens; deficiency-type pathogen; pathogen from mother-organ; deficient pathogen; pathogen attack in deficiency condition
V005-N00579.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00579.definition: Opposite to excess pathogens, it is a collective term for exogenous pathogenic factors that invade the body when the body is weak. Alternatively, it refers to pathogenic qi that transmits from the mother organ to the son organ.

V005-N00579.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00579.label: 虚邪
V005-N00579.englishNames: deficiency-type pathogen; pathogen from mother-organ; deficient pathogen; pathogen attack in deficiency condition

V005-N00580.label: 实邪
V005-N00580.englishNames: excess pathogen; pathogen from child-organ; excessive pathogen
V005-N00580.definition: 亢盛的邪气，也指从子脏传向母脏的邪气。

V005-N00580.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00580.label: 实邪
V005-N00580.englishNames: excess pathogen; Excess pathogens; pathogen from child-organ; excessive pathogen
V005-N00580.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00580.definition: Opposite to deficiency pathogens, it is a collective term for pathogenic factors. Alternatively, it refers to pathogenic qi that transmits from the son organ to the mother organ.

V005-N00580.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00580.label: 实邪
V005-N00580.englishNames: excess pathogen; pathogen from child-organ; excessive pathogen

V005-N00581.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00581.label: 贼邪

V005-N00582.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00582.label: 微邪

V005-N00583.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00583.label: 正邪
V005-N00583.englishNames: healthy qi and pathogenic qi; regular pathogen; regular pathogen$healthy and pathogenic qi

V005-N00584.label: 时邪
V005-N00584.definition: 与四季气候相关的病邪，为各种季节性流行病病因的统称。

V005-N00584.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00584.label: 时邪
V005-N00584.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00584.definition: A collective term for epidemic, etiological factors associated with the four seasons.

V005-N00584.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00584.label: 时邪

V005-N00584.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00584.label: 时邪
V005-N00584.definition: a general designation for the pathogenic factors causing seasonal diseases

V005-N00585.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00585.label: 客邪
V005-N00585.englishNames: intruding pathogen; visiting pathogen; Exogenous pathogenic factors
V005-N00585.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00585.definition: External pathogenic factors that damage the human body.

V005-N00585.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00585.label: 客邪

V005-N00585.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00585.label: 外邪
V005-N00585.definition: any pathogen originating outside the body

V005-N00586.label: 外感
V005-N00586.englishNames: external contraction; exogenous contraction; exogenous disease
V005-N00586.definition: 六淫、疫疠之气等病邪侵犯人体，导致疾病的过程。

V005-N00586.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00586.label: 外感
V005-N00586.englishNames: external contraction; exogenous contraction; exogenous disease

V005-N00586.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00586.label: 外感
V005-N00586.definition: disease or morbid condition produced by any of the six excesses (external etiological factors) or other noxious factors, the same as exopathic disease

V005-N00587.label: 内伤
V005-N00587.englishNames: internal damage; Internal Damage; endogenous injury
V005-N00587.definition: 七情过极、劳倦损伤、饮食失调等致病因素导致气机紊乱，脏腑受损而发病的过程。

V005-N00587.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00587.label: 内伤
V005-N00587.englishNames: endogenous injury; internal damage; Internal Damage
V005-N00587.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因
V005-N00587.definition: 病因之一，泛指内损脏气的致病因素。病名，与内损同，由撞击跌扑、强力负重或其他因素伤及脏腑气血的一类病证。

V005-N00587.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00587.label: 内伤
V005-N00587.englishNames: internal damage; Internal Damage; endogenous injury

V005-N00587.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00587.label: 内伤
V005-N00587.englishNames: endogenous injury; internal damage; Internal Damage
V005-N00587.definition: any detrimental effect on visceral qi produced by intemperance of the seven emotions, overexertion and fatigue, improper diet and sexual overindulgence

V005-N00588.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00588.label: 合邪
V005-N00588.englishNames: combined pathogen; Combined pathogens; combined pathogens
V005-N00588.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00588.definition: Two or more external pathogenic factors invade the body. Alternatively, it means exogenous pathogenic factors triggering previously existing diseases.

V005-N00588.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00588.label: 合邪

V005-N00588.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00588.label: 合邪
V005-N00588.definition: any combination of more than one pathogen

V005-N00589.label: 六淫
V005-N00589.englishNames: six climatic exopathogens; six climatic influences; Six Climatic Exopathogens; six excesses
V005-N00589.definition: 风、寒、暑、湿、燥、火六种外感病邪的合称。

V005-N00589.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00589.label: 六淫
V005-N00589.englishNames: six climatic influences; six excesses; Six Climatic Exopathogens
V005-N00589.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因
V005-N00589.definition: 风、寒、暑、湿、燥、火六种外感病邪的统称。

V005-N00589.label: 六淫
V005-N00589.englishNames: Climatic Pathogens; Six Climatic Influences; Six Exopathogens
V005-N00589.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因
V005-N00589.definition: 即风、寒、暑、湿、燥、火六种外感病邪的总称。

V005-N00589.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00589.label: 六淫
V005-N00589.englishNames: Six pathogenic factors; six climatic exopathogens; six climatic influences; Six Climatic Exopathogens; six excesses
V005-N00589.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00589.definition: A collective term for six exogenous pathogenic factors: wind, cold, summer-heat, dampness, dryness and fire.

V005-N00589.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00589.label: 六淫
V005-N00589.englishNames: six climatic exopathogens; six climatic influences; Six Climatic Exopathogens; six excesses

V005-N00589.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00589.label: 六淫
V005-N00589.definition: a collective term for the six excessive or untimely climatic influences as external pathogenic factors: wind, cold, summerheat, dampness, dryness and fire, also the same as six climatic pathogenic factors

V005-N00590.label: 风邪
V005-N00590.definition: 具有轻扬开泄、善动不居、升发、向上、向外特性的邪气。

V005-N00590.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00590.label: 风邪
V005-N00590.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜六淫
V005-N00590.definition: 风具有轻扬开泄、善动不居的特性，故自然界中凡具有此特性的外邪，称为风邪。

V005-N00590.label: 风邪
V005-N00590.aliases: 大邪； 风； 风毒； 风毒之邪； 风邪侵袭； 风淫； 外感风邪
V005-N00590.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫
V005-N00590.definition: 六淫中具轻扬开泄、善动不拘、向上向外特性的邪气。

V005-N00590.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00590.label: 风邪
V005-N00590.englishNames: wind pathogen; Pathogenic wind; Pathogenic Wind
V005-N00590.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00590.definition: A pathogenic factor characterized by opening the skin pores, high mobility and upward/outward movement.

V005-N00590.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00590.label: 风

V005-N00590.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00590.label: 风
V005-N00590.definition: wind as a pathogenic factor characterized by its rapid movement, swift changes, and ascending and opening actions, also called pathogenic wind

V005-N00591.label: 风性开泄
V005-N00591.englishNames: wind pathogen being characterized by openingdispersing; wind attributing to opening and releasing
V005-N00591.definition: 风邪致病常使人皮毛腠理疏泄而开张，表现为出汗、恶风等症。

V005-N00591.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00591.label: 风性开泄
V005-N00591.englishNames: wind pathogen being characterized by openingdispersing; wind attributing to opening and releasing; Wind opens and disperses
V005-N00591.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00591.definition: Wind loosens the interspace between skin/muscle fibers and opens the skin pores, resulting in sweating and aversion to wind.

V005-N00592.label: 风易伤阳位
V005-N00592.englishNames: wind being apt to attack yang portion of body
V005-N00592.definition: 风邪致病，常伤及人体的上部（头面）、阳经和肌表的致病特点。

V005-N00593.label: 风性主动
V005-N00593.englishNames: characteristic of wind being mobile; wind attributing to mobility
V005-N00593.definition: 风邪致病具有动摇不定的特点，常表现为眩晕、震颤、四肢抽搐、角弓反张、直视上吊等症。

V005-N00593.label: 风胜则动
V005-N00593.definition: 风邪侵袭，或肝风内动，出现头目肢体动摇、震颤等的病理变化。

V005-N00593.label: 风性主动
V005-N00593.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜病因学说｜六淫致病特征｜风邪致病特征

V005-N00593.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00593.label: 风性主动
V005-N00593.englishNames: Wind causes movement; characteristic of wind being mobile; wind attributing to mobility
V005-N00593.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00593.definition: Wind is characterized by constant moving. It causes the limbs to tremble.

V005-N00593.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00593.label: 风胜则动

V005-N00594.label: 善行数变
V005-N00594.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜病因学说｜六淫致病特征｜风邪致病特征

V005-N00595.label: 风为百病之长
V005-N00595.englishNames: wind being primary pathogen; wind being leading cause of diseases
V005-N00595.definition: 风邪常为外邪致病的先导，凡寒、湿、燥、热等病邪均可依附于风而侵犯人体。

V005-N00595.label: 风为百病之长
V005-N00595.pinyinNames: feng wei bai bing zhi zhang
V005-N00595.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜病因学说｜六淫致病特征｜风邪致病特征
V005-N00595.definition: 一是指风邪常兼他邪合而伤人，为外邪致病的先导；二是指风邪袭人致病最多。

V005-N00595.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00595.label: 风为百病之长
V005-N00595.aliases: 风为百病之首； Wind is the spearhead of a hundred diseases
V005-N00595.englishNames: wind being primary pathogen; wind being leading cause of diseases; Wind is the leading cause of diseases
V005-N00595.pinyinNames: fēng wéi bǎi bìng zhī zhǎng
V005-N00595.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00595.definition: Wind may cause a wide variety of conditions. It is the spearhead of exogenous pathogenic factors and liable to associate itself with cold, dampness, dryness and heat.

V005-N00596.label: 寒邪
V005-N00596.definition: 具有寒冷、凝滞、收引等特性的邪气。

V005-N00596.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00596.label: 寒邪
V005-N00596.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜六淫
V005-N00596.definition: 自然界中具有寒冷、凝结特性的外邪称为寒邪。

V005-N00596.label: 寒邪
V005-N00596.aliases: 寒； 寒毒； 寒邪凝滞； 寒邪侵袭； 寒邪外束； 寒淫
V005-N00596.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫
V005-N00596.definition: 六淫中具有寒冷、凝滞、收引等特性的邪气。

V005-N00596.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00596.label: 寒邪
V005-N00596.englishNames: Pathogenic cold; Pathogenic Cold; cold pathogen
V005-N00596.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00596.definition: A pathogenic factor characterized by coldness, stagnation, congealing and contraction.

V005-N00596.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00596.label: 寒

V005-N00596.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00596.label: 寒
V005-N00596.definition: cold as a pathogenic factor characterized by the damage to yang qi, deceleration of activity, congealing and contracting actions, also called pathogenic cold

V005-N00597.label: 寒易伤阳
V005-N00597.englishNames: cold tending to injure yang; cold pathogen being apt to attack yang
V005-N00597.definition: 寒邪致病易伤人阳气，常表现为恶寒、肢冷、心腹冷痛等症。

V005-N00597.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00597.label: 寒易伤阳
V005-N00597.englishNames: cold tending to injure yang; cold pathogen being apt to attack yang; Cold tends to impair yang
V005-N00597.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00597.definition: Cold is yin in nature and can easily impair yang qi.

V005-N00598.label: 寒性凝滞
V005-N00598.englishNames: cold having property of coagulation and stagnation; cold attributing to congealing
V005-N00598.definition: 寒邪致病可使人体气血运行不畅，经络不通，常表现为各种疼痛症状。

V005-N00598.label: 寒性凝滞
V005-N00598.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜病因学说｜六淫致病特征｜寒邪致病特征
V005-N00598.definition: 寒邪侵人，易使气血津液凝结、经脉阻滞。

V005-N00598.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00598.label: 寒性凝滞
V005-N00598.englishNames: cold having property of coagulation and stagnation; Cold congeals and stagnates; cold attributing to congealing
V005-N00598.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00598.definition: Pathogenic cold causes qi/blood to stagnate, blocks meridians, and causes pain.

V005-N00599.label: 寒性收引
V005-N00599.englishNames: cold having property of contraction; cold attributing to contraction
V005-N00599.definition: 寒邪致病易使人体气机收敛，腠理紧闭，脉络拘紧，筋肉挛急，常表现为无汗，肢体疼痛，活动不利等症。

V005-N00599.label: 寒性收引
V005-N00599.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜病因学说｜六淫致病特征｜寒邪致病特征
V005-N00599.definition: 寒邪侵袭人体，可使气机收敛，腠理、经络、筋脉收缩而挛急。

V005-N00599.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00599.label: 寒性收引
V005-N00599.englishNames: cold having property of contraction; cold attributing to contraction; Cold causes contraction/contracture
V005-N00599.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00599.definition: Pathogenic cold constricts qi, blocks the skin pores, and causes contractions.

V005-N00599.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00599.label: 寒则气收

V005-N00600.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00600.label: 风寒
V005-N00600.aliases: 风寒化热； Wind Cold Syndrome
V005-N00600.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜六淫｜寒邪
V005-N00600.definition: 风邪裹结寒邪侵犯机体，指证候也指病因。以周身关节疼痛，屈身不利，或痛无定处，或疼痛剧烈，宛如锥刺，或肢体肿胀，麻木重着，步履艰难，得热则舒，舌淡，苔薄白，脉细缓等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00600.label: 风寒
V005-N00600.aliases: 风寒侵袭； 风寒侵袭人体； 风寒入侵； 风寒上受； 风寒之邪； 外感风寒
V005-N00600.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫｜风邪
V005-N00600.definition: 六淫中风与寒相合的病邪。

V005-N00600.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00600.label: 风寒

V005-N00600.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00600.label: 风寒
V005-N00600.definition: a combined pathogen of external wind and cold

V005-N00601.label: 暑邪
V005-N00601.definition: 夏至以后，立秋之前，具有炎热、升散等特性的邪气。

V005-N00601.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00601.label: 暑邪
V005-N00601.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜六淫
V005-N00601.definition: 暑为夏令的火热之邪，夏至以后，立秋以前，自然界中的火热之邪。

V005-N00601.label: 暑邪
V005-N00601.aliases: 暑； 暑气； 暑热； 暑热病邪； 暑热炽盛； 暑热侵袭； 暑热之邪； 暑淫； 暑月高温
V005-N00601.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫
V005-N00601.definition: 夏至之后，立秋之前，具有炎热，升散特性的邪气。

V005-N00601.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00601.label: 暑邪
V005-N00601.englishNames: summerheat pathogen; Pathogenic summer heat; Pathogenic Summer Heat
V005-N00601.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00601.definition: A pathogenic factor commonly seen between the summer solstice and beginning of autumn. It is characterized by flames ascending and dispersing.

V005-N00601.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00601.label: 暑
V005-N00601.definition: summerheat as a pathogenic factor, only occurring in summer, characterized by hotness and evaporation, also called pathogenic summerheat

V005-N00602.label: 暑性炎热
V005-N00602.englishNames: summer attributing to burning heat; characteristic of summerheat being scorchinghot
V005-N00602.definition: 暑为夏季火热之气所化，暑邪致病，多表现出一系列阳热症状。

V005-N00602.label: 暑性炎热
V005-N00602.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜病因学说｜六淫致病特征｜暑邪致病特征
V005-N00602.definition: 暑为盛夏火热之气所化，火热属阳，暑邪伤人多表现为阳热症状，如高热、心烦、面赤、脉洪大等。

V005-N00602.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00602.label: 暑性炎热
V005-N00602.englishNames: summer attributing to burning heat; characteristic of summerheat being scorchinghot; Summer heat causes flaming heat
V005-N00602.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00602.definition: Pathogenic summer heat is characterized by extreme hotness. Often causes hyperactive yang heat.

V005-N00603.label: 暑性升散
V005-N00603.englishNames: summerheat attributing to rise and dispersion; characteristic of summerheat being ascending and dispersive
V005-N00603.definition: 暑为阳邪，阳性升散，故暑邪致病，多直入气分，可致腠理开泄而多汗。

V005-N00603.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00603.label: 暑性升散
V005-N00603.englishNames: summerheat attributing to rise and dispersion; Summer heat ascends and disperses; characteristic of summerheat being ascending and dispersive
V005-N00603.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00603.definition: Summer heat ascends and disperses. Often directly affects the qi phase, opens the sweating pores and damages body fluids.

V005-N00604.label: 暑易夹湿
V005-N00604.englishNames: summerheat being likely to be mixed with dampness; summerheat tending to have dampness involved
V005-N00604.definition: 暑季常多雨潮湿，热蒸湿动，暑邪为病，常夹湿邪而侵袭人体。

V005-N00605.label: 暑易扰心
V005-N00605.englishNames: summerheat tending to disturb heart; summerheat being likely to disturb heart
V005-N00605.definition: 暑邪致病，有易扰动心神的特点，常导致心烦不宁，甚则突然昏倒，不省人事。

V005-N00607.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00607.label: 风热
V005-N00607.aliases: 风热俱盛； 风热痰毒； 风热挟湿； 风热血燥； 风热疫毒； 风热郁滞肌肤
V005-N00607.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜风淫证候
V005-N00607.definition: 风和热相结合的病邪，指证候亦指病因。临床表现为发热重、恶寒较轻、咳嗽、口渴、舌边尖红、苔微黄、脉浮数，甚则口燥、目赤、咽痛、衄血等。

V005-N00607.label: 风热
V005-N00607.aliases: 风热病邪； 风热外袭； 风热外邪； 风热之邪
V005-N00607.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫｜风邪
V005-N00607.definition: 六淫中风与热相合的病邪。

V005-N00607.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00607.label: 风热
V005-N00607.definition: a combined pathogen of external wind and heat

V005-N00608.label: 湿邪
V005-N00608.definition: 具有易阻气机、重浊、黏滞、趋下等特性的邪气。

V005-N00608.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00608.label: 湿邪
V005-N00608.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜六淫
V005-N00608.definition: 自然界中具有水湿之重浊、粘滞、趋下特性的外邪。

V005-N00608.label: 湿邪
V005-N00608.aliases: 秽浊之邪； 水湿； 水湿之邪
V005-N00608.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫

V005-N00608.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00608.label: 湿邪
V005-N00608.englishNames: Pathogenic dampness; dampness pathogen; Pathogenic Dampness
V005-N00608.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00608.definition: A pathogenic factor that obstructs the flow of qi. It is characterized by heaviness, turbidity, stickiness and downward flowing.

V005-N00608.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00608.label: 湿
V005-N00608.definition: dampness as a pathogenic factor characterized by its impediment to qi movement and its turbidity, heaviness, stickiness and downward flowing properties, also called pathogenic dampness

V005-N00609.label: 湿阻气机
V005-N00609.definition: 湿邪致病，留滞于脏腑经络，有阻遏气机的特点，易使气机升降失常，经络气血不畅。

V005-N00609.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00609.label: 湿阻气机
V005-N00609.englishNames: Dampness obstructs qi movement; dampness hampering qi movement
V005-N00609.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00609.definition: Dampness is a tangible pathogenic factor and is easy to obstruct qi movement.

V005-N00611.label: 湿性重浊
V005-N00611.englishNames: characteristic of dampness being heavy and turbid; dampness attributing to heaciness and turbidity
V005-N00611.definition: 湿邪致病，常表现出易导致肢体沉重及分泌物混浊的特点。

V005-N00611.label: 湿性重浊
V005-N00611.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜病因学说｜六淫致病特征｜湿邪致病特征
V005-N00611.definition: 湿邪致病，出现以沉重感为特征的临床表现，如头身困重、四肢酸楚沉重等。

V005-N00611.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00611.label: 湿性重浊
V005-N00611.englishNames: characteristic of dampness being heavy and turbid; Dampness is heavy and turbid; dampness attributing to heaciness and turbidity
V005-N00611.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00611.definition: Pathogenic dampness is characterized by its heaviness and turbidity. The diseases caused by it may lead to heaviness of the body and turbidity of secretions and excrements.

V005-N00612.label: 湿性黏滞
V005-N00612.englishNames: dampness attributing to viscosity and stagnation; characteristic of dampness being sticky and stagnant
V005-N00612.definition: 湿邪致病，常表现出分泌物黏稠、排出困难且病程缠绵难愈的特点。

V005-N00612.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00612.label: 湿性黏滞
V005-N00612.englishNames: Dampness is sticky and stagnant; dampness attributing to viscosity and stagnation; characteristic of dampness being sticky and stagnant
V005-N00612.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00612.definition: Dampness is characterized by stickiness and stagnation. It causes sticky, viscous secretions and discharges. Dampness-induced conditions often last a long time.

V005-N00613.label: 湿性趋下
V005-N00613.englishNames: dampness characterized by downward going; characteristic of dampness being descending
V005-N00613.definition: 湿邪致病，具有以发生于人体下部病变为主的特点。

V005-N00613.label: 湿性趋下
V005-N00613.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜病因学说｜六淫致病特征｜湿邪致病特征
V005-N00613.definition: 湿邪为重浊有质之邪，类水属阴而有趋下之势，人体下部属阴，同类相求，故湿邪为病，多易伤及人体下部。

V005-N00613.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00613.label: 湿性趋下
V005-N00613.englishNames: dampness characterized by downward going; Dampness tends to descend; characteristic of dampness being descending
V005-N00613.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00613.definition: Dampness move downward and affects the yin and lower parts of the body.

V005-N00614.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00614.label: 风湿
V005-N00614.aliases: 风湿（中医）； syndrome of Winddampness
V005-N00614.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜六淫｜风邪
V005-N00614.definition: 六淫中风与湿相合的病邪。

V005-N00614.label: 风湿
V005-N00614.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫｜风邪

V005-N00614.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00614.label: 风湿

V005-N00614.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00614.label: 风湿
V005-N00614.definition: dampness produced in the body due to yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney with decreased fluid transportation and transformation and resultant water stagnation

V005-N00614.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00614.label: 风湿
V005-N00614.definition: (1) a combined pathogen of external wind and dampness; (2) arthritis with soft tissue inflammation

V005-N00615.label: 燥邪
V005-N00615.definition: 具有易损伤肺脏，易耗伤津液等特点的邪气。

V005-N00615.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00615.label: 燥邪
V005-N00615.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜六淫
V005-N00615.definition: 自然界具有干燥、收敛清肃特性的外邪。

V005-N00615.label: 燥邪
V005-N00615.aliases: 燥； 燥火； 燥火炽盛； 燥热病邪； 燥热毒邪侵袭； 燥热内结； 燥热内盛； 燥热之邪； 燥热之邪侵袭； 燥淫
V005-N00615.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫
V005-N00615.definition: 六淫中具有干涩、伤津、易于伤肺特性的邪气。

V005-N00615.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00615.label: 燥邪
V005-N00615.englishNames: Pathogenic Dryness; dryness pathogen; Pathogenic dryness
V005-N00615.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00615.definition: A pathogenic factor that consumes body fluids and tends to damage the lung.

V005-N00615.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00615.label: 燥
V005-N00615.definition: dryness as a pathogenic factor characterized by dryness and is apt to injure the lung and consume fluid, also called pathogenic dryness

V005-N00616.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V005-N00616.label: 燥性干涩
V005-N00616.englishNames: dryness being dry and puckery; dryness characterized by aridity and astringency
V005-N00616.path: 中医皮肤科学｜皮肤科学病因病机
V005-N00616.definition: 燥邪具有易伤人津液，导致人体阴津亏虚的特点，致病易表现出口鼻干燥、咽干口渴、皮肤干涩等症。

V005-N00616.label: 燥胜则干
V005-N00616.definition: 燥性干涩，燥邪致病易伤人津液，导致各种干燥症状的病理变化。

V005-N00616.label: 燥伤津液
V005-N00616.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜病因学说｜六淫致病特征｜燥邪致病特征
V005-N00616.definition: 燥邪为干涩之病邪，侵犯人体，易损伤津液，出现各种干燥、涩滞的症状，如口鼻干燥，咽干口渴，皮肤干涩、皲裂，毛发不荣，小便短少，大便干结等。

V005-N00616.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00616.label: 燥性干涩
V005-N00616.englishNames: dryness being dry and puckery; Dryness tends to desiccate; dryness characterized by aridity and astringency
V005-N00616.pinyinNames: zao xing gan se; zào xìng gān sè
V005-N00616.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00616.definition: Dryness desiccates by consuming body fluids and causing body fluid deficiency and lack of moisture.

V005-N00616.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00616.label: 燥胜则干
V005-N00616.englishNames: domination of dryness causing dry symptoms

V005-N00617.label: 燥易伤肺
V005-N00617.englishNames: dryness tending to injure lung; dryness likely to injure lung
V005-N00617.definition: 燥邪一般多从口鼻、肌表侵袭人体，肺外合皮毛，开窍于鼻，主敷市津液，故燥邪最易伤肺。

V005-N00617.label: 燥易伤肺
V005-N00617.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜病因学说｜六淫致病特征｜燥邪致病特征
V005-N00617.definition: 肺为娇脏，喜润恶燥，又主气司呼吸，开窍于鼻。燥邪从口鼻而入，最易损伤肺津，从而影响肺气宣降，甚或燥伤肺络，出现干咳少痰，痰黏难咯，或痰中带血，甚则喘息胸痛等。

V005-N00617.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00617.label: 燥易伤肺
V005-N00617.englishNames: dryness tending to injure lung; dryness likely to injure lung; Dryness easily damages the lung
V005-N00617.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00617.definition: Dryness invades the body through the nose, mouth and skin pores. It easily damages the lung fluids and impairs the dispersing of lung qi.

V005-N00618.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00618.label: 风燥
V005-N00618.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜六淫｜风邪
V005-N00618.definition: 风邪和燥邪共同侵袭机体，指证候亦指病因。风和燥相结合，多感于秋燥时令。临床表现为头痛、发热、恶寒无汗、鼻塞、唇燥、咽干、干咳、胸胁痛、皮肤干涩、舌苔白薄而干，脉浮涩等。

V005-N00618.label: 风燥
V005-N00618.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫｜风邪
V005-N00618.definition: 六淫中风与燥相合的病邪。

V005-N00618.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00618.label: 风燥

V005-N00618.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00618.label: 风燥
V005-N00618.definition: a combined pathogen of external wind and dryness

V005-N00620.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00620.label: 凉燥
V005-N00620.path: 第1部分 内科学｜热病｜秋燥[病]
V005-N00620.definition: 感受秋燥偏寒之邪，以初起头痛身热，恶寒无汗，鼻塞流涕，状类风寒，惟唇燥咽干，干咳连声，苔薄白而干，脉浮弦紧等为特征的秋燥病。注：与温燥相对而言。

V005-N00620.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00620.label: 凉燥
V005-N00620.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜燥淫证候
V005-N00620.definition: 凉燥之邪侵袭，犯表伤肺，以恶寒重，发热轻，头痛无汗，口、鼻、咽干燥，咳嗽痰少，舌苔薄白而干，脉浮紧等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00620.label: 凉燥
V005-N00620.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫｜燥邪
V005-N00620.definition: 指深秋近冬之际，西风肃杀，燥与寒相合而侵犯人体的病邪。

V005-N00620.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00620.label: 凉燥病
V005-N00620.pinyinNames: liang zao bing; liáng zào bìng
V005-N00620.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00620.definition: A condition characterized by fever, chills, headache, absence of sweating, unproductive cough or difficulty expectoration of sputum, and a dry throat and lips. Often occurs in autumn when cool dryness affects the lung and consumes bodily fluids.

V005-N00620.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00620.label: 凉燥

V005-N00620.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00620.label: 凉燥
V005-N00620.definition: the pathogenic factor that causes cool dryness pattern/syndrome

V005-N00621.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00621.label: 温燥
V005-N00621.path: 第1部分 内科学｜热病｜秋燥[病]
V005-N00621.definition: 感受秋燥偏热之邪，以初起身热头痛，干咳无痰，即或有小量咯痰亦黏腻不爽，气逆而喘，咽喉干痛，鼻干唇燥，心烦口渴，舌边尖红，苔薄白而燥等为特征的秋燥病。注：与凉燥相对而言。

V005-N00621.label: 温燥
V005-N00621.definition: 感受燥邪而偏兼热邪者，与凉燥相对而言。

V005-N00621.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00621.label: 温燥
V005-N00621.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜燥淫证候
V005-N00621.definition: 温燥之邪侵袭，耗伤阴津，以发热、微恶风寒、干咳痰少、心烦口渴、皮肤及鼻咽干燥、小便短黄、舌苔薄黄、脉浮数等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00621.label: 温燥
V005-N00621.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫｜燥邪
V005-N00621.definition: 指初秋有夏热余气，久晴无雨，秋阳以暴之时，燥与热相合而侵犯人体的病邪。

V005-N00621.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00621.label: 温燥

V005-N00621.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00621.label: 温燥
V005-N00621.definition: the pathogenic factor that causes warm dryness pattern/syndrome

V005-N00622.label: 火邪
V005-N00622.definition: 具有炎上届伤津耗气、生风动血，且易扰动心神特点的邪气。

V005-N00622.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00622.label: 火邪
V005-N00622.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜六淫
V005-N00622.definition: 阳盛太过，耗散人体正气的病邪，又有内火、外火之分。

V005-N00622.label: 火邪
V005-N00622.aliases: 瘅； 风火； 炅气； 火； 火气； 热； 热邪； 热邪亢盛； 热邪壅滞； 热淫； 外感热邪； 邪火； 邪热； 邪热炽盛； 邪热壅积
V005-N00622.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫
V005-N00622.definition: 六淫中具有炎上、耗气伤津、生风动血、扰动心神特性的邪气。

V005-N00622.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00622.label: 火邪
V005-N00622.englishNames: fire pathogen; Pathogenic fire; Pathogenic Fire
V005-N00622.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00622.definition: A pathogenic factor that flames upward, consumes qi and body fluids, engenders wind, stirs blood, and harasses the heart spirit.

V005-N00622.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00622.label: 火邪

V005-N00622.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00622.label: 火
V005-N00622.definition: fire as a pathogenic factor characterized by intense heat that is apt to injure fluid, consume qi, engender wind, inducing bleeding, and disturb the mental activities, also called pathogenic fire

V005-N00623.label: 热邪
V005-N00623.aliases: 温邪； Heat Pathogen； 火热
V005-N00623.definition: 易导致阳热性病证的邪气的统称，与火邪没有本质区别，常火热并称。

V005-N00623.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00623.label: 热邪
V005-N00623.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜六淫｜火邪
V005-N00623.definition: 自然界中具有火之炎热特性的外邪。

V005-N00623.label: 火邪
V005-N00623.aliases: 瘅； 风火； 炅气； 火； 火气； 热； 热邪； 热邪亢盛； 热邪壅滞； 热淫； 外感热邪； 邪火； 邪热； 邪热炽盛； 邪热壅积
V005-N00623.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫
V005-N00623.definition: 六淫中具有炎上、耗气伤津、生风动血、扰动心神特性的邪气。

V005-N00623.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00623.label: 热邪
V005-N00623.aliases: 温邪； Heat Pathogen； 火热
V005-N00623.englishNames: heat pathogen; Pathogenic Heat; Pathogenic heat
V005-N00623.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00623.definition: A pathogenic factor that causes excessive pathological changes of hot and yang nature.

V005-N00623.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00623.label: 热
V005-N00623.definition: heat as a pathogenic factor that causes heat pattern/ syndrome, also called pathogenic heat

V005-N00624.label: 热邪
V005-N00624.aliases: 温邪； Heat Pathogen； 火热
V005-N00624.definition: 易导致阳热性病证的邪气的统称，与火邪没有本质区别，常火热并称。

V005-N00624.label: 温邪
V005-N00624.aliases: 温； 温热； 温热病邪
V005-N00624.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫｜火邪
V005-N00624.definition: 温为热之渐。温是指热性轻微的火邪。

V005-N00624.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00624.label: 温邪
V005-N00624.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00624.definition: A collective term for pathogenic warm heat, including spring warmth, wind warmth, summer heat warmth, damp warmth, autumn dryness, winter warmth, pestilence warmth, warm toxin, warm malaria, etc.

V005-N00624.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00624.label: 热邪
V005-N00624.aliases: 温邪； Heat Pathogen； 火热
V005-N00624.englishNames: heat pathogen; Pathogenic Heat; Pathogenic heat
V005-N00624.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00624.definition: A pathogenic factor that causes excessive pathological changes of hot and yang nature.

V005-N00624.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00624.label: 温邪
V005-N00624.definition: a collective term for various pathogens causing acute febrile diseases

V005-N00625.label: 火性炎上
V005-N00625.englishNames: characteristic of fire being flaring up; fire characterized by flaming
V005-N00625.definition: 火邪致病具有炎热及向上趋势的特点。

V005-N00625.label: 火曰炎上
V005-N00625.englishNames: fire  being  flaming  upwards  in nature
V005-N00625.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜五行学说｜火
V005-N00625.definition: 五行学说中，火具有炎热、上升、光明的特性，引申为凡具有温热、上升、光明等性质或作用的事物和现象，归属于火。

V005-N00625.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00625.label: 火性炎上
V005-N00625.englishNames: characteristic of fire being flaring up; fire characterized by flaming; Fire flames upward
V005-N00625.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00625.definition: The nature of pathogenic fire flames upward. It causes heat symptoms and often affects the upper part of the body.

V005-N00626.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00626.label: 火易生风
V005-N00626.englishNames: fire tending to cause wind; Fire tends to generate wind
V005-N00626.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00626.definition: Fire tends to stir liver wind. Extreme heat can cause stirring of wind.

V005-N00627.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00627.label: 火易动血
V005-N00627.englishNames: fire tending to cause bleeding; Fire tends to cause bleeding
V005-N00627.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00627.definition: Since fire may burn the vessels and collaterals and cause the blood to move recklessly, it often results in bleeding or macular eruption.

V005-N00628.label: 伤津
V005-N00628.aliases: 耗气伤津； 耗伤津液； 耗伤阴津； 津伤； 津液耗伤； 津液受伤； 津液灼伤； 亡津
V005-N00628.englishNames: Body Fluid Consumption; Impairment of Fluid
V005-N00628.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜津液失常｜津液不足
V005-N00628.definition: 指由于高热、汗出过多，或感受燥邪而导致的肺、胃津液损伤的病理变化。

V005-N00629.label: 火易扰心
V005-N00629.englishNames: fire being likely to disturb heart; fire tending to disturb heart
V005-N00629.definition: 火性炎主，火邪致病有易扰乱神明的特点，常出现心烦失眠，狂躁妄动，神昏谵言等症。

V005-N00630.label: 疠气
V005-N00630.definition: 各种具有强烈传染性病邪的统称。

V005-N00630.label: 疠气
V005-N00630.aliases: 毒气； 乖疠之气； 戾气； 疠； 异气； 疫毒； 疫疠毒邪； 疫疠之气； 疫气； 杂气
V005-N00630.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因
V005-N00630.definition: 指各种具有强烈传染性病邪的统称。

V005-N00630.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00630.label: 疠气
V005-N00630.englishNames: Pestilence qi; pestilent qi; pestilential qi
V005-N00630.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00630.definition: A collective term for exogenous pathogenic factors with high contagiousness.

V005-N00630.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00630.label: 时行戾气

V005-N00630.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00630.label: 疠气

V005-N00630.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00630.label: 时行戾气
V005-N00630.definition: pathogen that cause an epidemic infectious diseases, also called pestilential qi

V005-N00631.label: 瘟毒
V005-N00631.definition: 瘟疫病邪中具有毒性者，即兼有易在皮肉组织蕴郁的特点，致病可兼见局部病变，如大头瘟之类。

V005-N00631.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00631.label: 温毒
V005-N00631.path: TC[中医病症]｜伤寒和温病｜温病
V005-N00631.definition: 感受温邪热毒疾患的总称。

V005-N00631.label: 温毒
V005-N00631.aliases: 温毒病邪； 温毒内伏； 温热毒邪； 温热时毒
V005-N00631.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫｜火邪
V005-N00631.definition: 指感受后能引起急性热病的一种温热病邪。

V005-N00631.label: 瘟毒
V005-N00631.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜疠气
V005-N00631.definition: 六淫蕴结而成的温热性的一类致病邪气的统称。具有季节性、流行性、且易致肿毒。

V005-N00631.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00631.label: 温毒
V005-N00631.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜兼杂疾病因素

V005-N00631.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00631.label: 瘟毒
V005-N00631.aliases: 温毒； 温毒发斑； 瘟毒发斑； Pestilence eruptions
V005-N00631.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00631.definition: Characterized by high fever, headache, and presence of maculae or sores/ulcers. In severe cases, clouding of consciousness may be present. This condition often occurs when pestilence toxin enters the bloodstream with lice/fleas to damage the Ying nutrients or disturb the heart mind.

V005-N00631.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00631.label: 温毒

V005-N00632.label: 疟邪
V005-N00632.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜疠气

V005-N00632.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00632.label: 疟邪

V005-N00633.label: 麻毒
V005-N00633.englishNames: measles toxin; toxic pathogen causing measles

V005-N00633.label: 麻毒
V005-N00633.aliases: 中华人民共和国国家质量监督检验检疫总局中国国家标准化管理委员会.GB/T 20348-2006 中华人民共和国国家标准，中医基础理论术语[S].2006.
V005-N00633.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜疠气

V005-N00633.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00633.label: 麻毒
V005-N00633.englishNames: measles toxin; toxic pathogen causing measles

V005-N00633.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00633.label: 麻毒

V005-N00634.label: 瘴气
V005-N00634.definition: 中国南方山林荒野特有的病邪之统称，包括疟邪等。

V005-N00634.label: 瘴毒
V005-N00634.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内毒外毒
V005-N00634.definition: 指能致疫疠的湿热杂毒。

V005-N00634.label: 瘴气
V005-N00634.path: 病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜疠气
V005-N00634.definition: 南方山林间湿热蒸郁致人疾病的邪气。

V005-N00634.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00634.label: 瘴毒

V005-N00634.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00634.label: 瘴毒
V005-N00634.definition: noxious mountainous vapor alleged to be the cause of certain kinds of malaria, also known as miasma

V005-N00636.label: 七情所伤
V005-N00636.englishNames: injury by seven emotional factors; damaged by excess of seven emotions
V005-N00636.definition: 喜、怒、忧、思、悲、恐、惊七种情志变化过于强烈、持久或突然，引起脏腑气机紊乱，功能失调而致病。

V005-N00636.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00636.label: 情志内伤
V005-N00636.aliases: 内伤七情； 七情内伤
V005-N00636.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候
V005-N00636.definition: 情感、思维等精神活动过于突然、强烈或持久，超过了个体心理、生理所能承受的限度，从而引起脏腑气血失调而发病。临床表现为怒则气上、喜则气缓、悲（忧）则气消、恐则气下、惊则气乱、思则气结。

V005-N00636.label: 七情内伤
V005-N00636.aliases: 内伤七情； 七情失和； 七情所伤； 七情郁结； 情志刺激； 情志过极； 情志失调； 情志所伤
V005-N00636.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因
V005-N00636.definition: 指喜、怒、忧、思、悲、恐惊七种引发或诱发疾病的情志活动。是引起脏腑精气功能紊乱而致疾病发生的一类病因。

V005-N00636.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00636.label: 七情内伤
V005-N00636.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00636.definition: A collective term for damage caused by extreme emotions including joy, anger, anxiety, overthinking, grief, fear and fright.

V005-N00637.label: 大怒伤肝
V005-N00637.englishNames: rage impairing liver; rage injuring liver
V005-N00637.definition: 过度愤怒可使肝气横逆上冲，血随气逆，并走于上，而致气急上逆，面红目赤，或呕血，甚则昏厥等症。

V005-N00637.label: 怒伤肝
V005-N00637.englishNames: the  Liver  is  Easily  Affected  by  Anger
V005-N00637.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜藏象学说原理｜神明情志｜情志｜五志｜五志所伤
V005-N00637.definition: 大怒不止，则肝气上逆或肝阳上亢。

V005-N00638.label: 怒则气上
V005-N00638.englishNames: rage leading to qi ascending; rage causing qi rising
V005-N00638.definition: 过度愤怒，可使肝气疏泄失常，过于升发而上逆，甚则血随气逆于上的病理变化。

V005-N00638.label: 怒则气上
V005-N00638.englishNames: Adverse  Flow  of  the  Liver-qi  Caused  by  Rage; Rage Leading to Qi Ascending
V005-N00638.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调｜气逆
V005-N00638.definition: 指过度愤怒，可使肝气疏泄失常，过于升发而上逆，甚则血随气逆于上的病理变化。

V005-N00638.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00638.label: 怒则气上
V005-N00638.englishNames: Anger causes the qi to rise
V005-N00638.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜情志疗法
V005-N00638.definition: Rage and persistent anger cause disorderly ascending of the qi.

V005-N00638.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00638.label: 怒则气上
V005-N00638.englishNames: rage leading to qi ascending; rage causing qi rising

V005-N00639.label: 暴喜伤心
V005-N00639.englishNames: overwhelming joy impairing heart; extreme joy injuring heart
V005-N00639.definition: 暴喜过度，可伤心神，使心气涣散，神不守舍，而致精神涣散，甚则失神狂乱等症。

V005-N00640.label: 喜则气缓
V005-N00640.englishNames: over-joy leading to qi sluggishness; over-joy causing qi to slacken; excessive joy leading to qi loose
V005-N00640.definition: 暴喜过度，可导致心气弛缓，精神涣散的病理变化。

V005-N00640.label: 喜则气缓
V005-N00640.englishNames: Excessive Joy Leading to Qi Loose; Orerjoy  Relaxing Qi
V005-N00640.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调
V005-N00640.definition: 指暴喜过度，可导致心气弛缓，精神涣散的病理变化。

V005-N00640.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00640.label: 喜则气缓
V005-N00640.englishNames: Joy causes the qi to slack
V005-N00640.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜情志疗法
V005-N00640.definition: Excess joy and/or euphoria cause qi to move too slowly and the qi movement becomes sluggish.

V005-N00640.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00640.label: 喜则气缓
V005-N00640.englishNames: over-joy leading to qi sluggishness; over-joy causing qi to slacken; excessive joy leading to qi loose

V005-N00641.label: 思虑伤脾
V005-N00641.englishNames: pensiveness injuring spleen; worry impairing spleen
V005-N00641.definition: 思虑劳神过度可伤神损脾，使脾气郁结，运化失职，而致纳呆、腹胀、便溏等症。

V005-N00641.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00641.label: 思伤脾气
V005-N00641.aliases: 思虑伤脾； Syndrome of Spleen Qi Injured by Thought
V005-N00641.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜脾系证候
V005-N00641.definition: 思虑太过，脾气郁滞，以神情呆滞、不思饮食、胸胁脘腹作胀、喜叹息、大便不爽、脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00641.label: 思伤脾气
V005-N00641.aliases: si shang pi qi； 思虑伤脾
V005-N00641.path: 病因病机｜病机｜脏腑病机｜脾与胃病机｜脾病机
V005-N00641.definition: 思虑太过，脾气郁滞，表现为神情呆滞、不思饮食、胸胁脘腹作胀、喜叹息、大便不爽、脉弦等。

V005-N00642.label: 思则气结
V005-N00642.englishNames: pensiveness leading to qi knotting; pensiveness leading to qi stagnation; pensiveness causing qi stagnation
V005-N00642.definition: 思虑过度，劳神损脾，而致气机郁结，阻滞脾胃运化功能的病理变化。

V005-N00642.label: 思则气结
V005-N00642.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜藏象学说原理｜神明情志｜情志｜五志｜五志损气
V005-N00642.definition: 思虑过度则脾气郁结，中焦被阻，脾失健运。

V005-N00642.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00642.label: 思则气结
V005-N00642.englishNames: pensiveness leading to qi knotting; pensiveness leading to qi stagnation; pensiveness causing qi stagnation

V005-N00643.label: 悲忧伤肺
V005-N00643.englishNames: grief and worry injuring lung; melancholy impairing lung
V005-N00643.definition: 过度悲忧可使肺气抑郁，意志消沉，肺气耗伤，而致气短乏力等症。

V005-N00643.label: 悲忧伤肺
V005-N00643.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜藏象学说原理｜神明情志｜情志｜五志｜五志所伤
V005-N00643.definition: 过度悲哀或忧思可以伤及肺气。

V005-N00644.label: 悲则气消
V005-N00644.englishNames: excessive sorrow leading to qi consumption; grief leading to qi consumption; sorrow causing qi consumption
V005-N00644.definition: 过度悲忧，使肺气抑郁不伸，气郁化热，耗气伤精的病理变化。

V005-N00644.label: 悲则气消
V005-N00644.englishNames: Excessive  Sorrow  Leading  to  Consumption  of  Qi
V005-N00644.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜藏象学说原理｜神明情志｜情志｜五志｜五志损气
V005-N00644.definition: 悲哀过度消耗肺气，可使周身乏力，呼吸减弱，意志消沉。

V005-N00644.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00644.label: 悲则气消
V005-N00644.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜情志疗法
V005-N00644.definition: Excess sorrow and grief weaken the qi.

V005-N00644.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00644.label: 悲则气消
V005-N00644.englishNames: excessive sorrow leading to qi consumption; grief leading to qi consumption; sorrow causing qi consumption

V005-N00645.label: 惊恐伤肾
V005-N00645.englishNames: fear impairing kidney; fright and terror injuring kidney
V005-N00645.definition: 过度惊恐可使肾气不固，气泄于下，而致二便失禁，惊慌失措等症。

V005-N00645.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00645.label: 惊恐伤肾
V005-N00645.englishNames: Syndrome of Kidney Impaired by Fear
V005-N00645.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肾和膀胱证候｜肾系证候
V005-N00645.definition: 大惊大恐损伤肾气，以惊慌不定、阳痿、滑精、或二便失禁等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00645.label: 惊恐伤肾
V005-N00645.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜藏象学说原理｜神明情志｜情志｜五志｜五志所伤
V005-N00645.definition: 大惊卒恐，则肾气受伤，气陷于下。

V005-N00645.label: 惊恐伤肾
V005-N00645.path: 病因病机｜病机｜脏腑病机｜肾与膀胱病机｜肾病机
V005-N00645.definition: 大惊大恐损伤肾气，表现为惊慌不定、阳痿、滑精、或二便失禁等。

V005-N00646.label: 恐则气下
V005-N00646.englishNames: terror leading to qi sinking; fear causing qi sinking; fear leading to qi sinking
V005-N00646.definition: 恐惧过度，伤损肾气，气虚下陷，肾关不固，导致二便失禁的病理变化。

V005-N00646.label: 恐则气下
V005-N00646.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜藏象学说原理｜神明情志｜情志｜五志｜五志损气
V005-N00646.definition: 长期恐惧或突然受惊，皆可导致肾气受损，精气下陷。

V005-N00646.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00646.label: 恐则气下
V005-N00646.englishNames: Fear causes the qi to descend
V005-N00646.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜情志疗法
V005-N00646.definition: Excess fear or an ongoing state of fearfulness causes qi to strongly descend.

V005-N00646.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00646.label: 恐则气下
V005-N00646.englishNames: terror leading to qi sinking; fear causing qi sinking; fear leading to qi sinking

V005-N00647.label: 惊则气乱
V005-N00647.englishNames: fright causing disorder of qi; fright leading to qi turbulence
V005-N00647.definition: 大惊则气机紊乱，气血失调，使心无所倚，神无所归，导致心神不安，甚则精神错乱的清理变化。

V005-N00647.label: 惊则气乱
V005-N00647.englishNames: Fright  Interrupting  Flow  of  Qi; Fright Leading to Qi Turbulence
V005-N00647.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调｜气逆
V005-N00647.definition: 指大惊则气机紊乱，气血失调，使心无所倚，神无所归，导致心神不安，甚则精神错乱的病理变化。

V005-N00647.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00647.label: 惊则气乱
V005-N00647.englishNames: Fright causes the qi to become chaotic
V005-N00647.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜情志疗法
V005-N00647.definition: Sudden shock and fright disrupt the qi activity and causes qi movements to become confused and disorderly.

V005-N00647.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00647.label: 惊则气乱
V005-N00647.englishNames: fright causing disorder of qi; fright leading to qi turbulence

V005-N00648.label: 饮食失宜
V005-N00648.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因
V005-N00648.definition: 指饮食不节、饮食不洁，饮食偏嗜等饮食失于常度的致病因素。

V005-N00648.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00648.label: 饮食失宜
V005-N00648.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00648.definition: Diet harmful to health, including unhealthy dietary habits, ingestion of contaminated food, dietary preference, etc.

V005-N00649.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00649.label: 饮食不节
V005-N00649.englishNames: irregular eating; dietary irregularities; Improper Diet
V005-N00649.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜伤食

V005-N00649.label: 饮食不节
V005-N00649.aliases: 宿食不化； 宿食内停； 饮食不当； 饮食不慎； 饮食劳倦； 饮食劳伤； 饮食失调； 饮食失节； 饮食所伤； 饮食停聚； 饮食停滞
V005-N00649.englishNames: Eating and Drinking without Temperance; Irregular Eating

V005-N00649.definition: 饮食不能节制，明显低于或者超过本人的适度的饮食量。包括过饥和过饱。

V005-N00649.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00649.label: 饮食不节
V005-N00649.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜饮食因素

V005-N00649.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00649.label: 饮食不节
V005-N00649.englishNames: irregular eating; Improper Diet; Dietary irregularities; dietary irregularities
V005-N00649.pinyinNames: yin shi bu jie; yǐn shí bù jié
V005-N00649.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00649.definition: Improper diet, including excessive hunger and binge eating.

V005-N00649.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00649.label: 饮食不节
V005-N00649.englishNames: irregular eating; dietary irregularities; Improper Diet
V005-N00649.definition: diet harmful to health, including ingestion of raw, cold or contaminated food, voracious eating or excessive hunger, predilection for a special food, alcohol addiction, etc.

V005-N00650.label: 饮食不洁
V005-N00650.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因｜饮食失宜
V005-N00650.definition: 食用不清洁、不卫生或陈腐变质或有毒的食物。

V005-N00650.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00650.label: 饮食不洁
V005-N00650.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜饮食因素

V005-N00650.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00650.label: 饮食不洁
V005-N00650.englishNames: contaminated food; Consumption of unclean food
V005-N00650.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00650.definition: Intake of contaminated or poisonous food.

V005-N00651.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00651.label: 偏食
V005-N00651.aliases: 酒癖； 饮食偏嗜； Food Preferences
V005-N00651.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜伤食｜饮食不节
V005-N00651.definition: 对某一种类型的食物过分偏爱和进食。

V005-N00651.label: 饮食偏嗜
V005-N00651.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因｜饮食失宜
V005-N00651.definition: 嗜食饮食之偏寒、偏热、五味之偏酸或偏苦或偏甘或偏辛或偏咸，以及嗜酒等。

V005-N00651.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00651.label: 饮食偏嗜
V005-N00651.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00651.definition: Excessive indulgence in specific food, including cold or hot food, certain flavours or alcohol.

V005-N00653.label: 五味偏嗜
V005-N00653.definition: 长期偏好酸、甜、咸、苦、辛辣等食味而损害脏腑。现也包括偏食某种单一食物，以及饮食过寒、过热等饮食不合理的致病因素。

V005-N00653.label: 五味偏嗜
V005-N00653.englishNames: Addicition for One of  Five  Flavors; Flavor Predilection
V005-N00653.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因｜饮食失宜｜饮食偏嗜
V005-N00653.definition: 指长期偏好酸、甜、咸、苦、辛辣等食味而损害脏腑。现也包括偏食某种单一食物，以及饮食过寒、过热等饮食不合理的致病因素。

V005-N00653.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00653.label: 五味偏嗜
V005-N00653.englishNames: five-flavor preference; Flavour preference; flavor predilection
V005-N00653.pinyinNames: wǔ wèi piān shì; wu wei pian shi
V005-N00653.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00653.definition: The five flavours are spicy, sweet, sour, bitter and salty. Habitual preference for a particular flavour or taste may bring about adverse reactions or damage the five zang organs.

V005-N00653.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00653.label: 五味偏嗜

V005-N00653.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00653.label: 五味偏嗜
V005-N00653.definition: habitual preference for a particular flavor or taste that may give rise to disease, the same as flavor craving/ preference

V005-N00654.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00654.label: 酒客

V005-N00656.label: 湿家
V005-N00656.englishNames: person suffering from dampness; patient with dampness

V005-N00656.vocabName: T/CIATCM 104-2023（表14-表27）张仲景经方术语代码表
V005-N00656.label: 湿家

V005-N00656.label: 湿家
V005-N00656.englishNames: person suffering from dampness; patient with dampness

V005-N00657.label: 劳逸失度
V005-N00657.aliases: 劳逸过度； 劳逸损伤
V005-N00657.englishNames: Improper Balance between Work and Rest; Maladjustment btween Work and Rest
V005-N00657.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因
V005-N00657.definition: 指过度劳累和过度安逸的总称。

V005-N00657.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00657.label: 劳逸失度
V005-N00657.englishNames: maladjustment between work and rest; Work–rest imbalance
V005-N00657.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00657.definition: A collective term for over-exertion and physical inactivity.

V005-N00658.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00658.label: 过劳
V005-N00658.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜劳伤
V005-N00658.definition: 体力劳动或体育锻炼持续时间过长，或强度过大，则脏腑和肢体皆可积劳成疾，临床可引起脾肺气虚津亏及筋骨损伤证。

V005-N00658.label: 过劳
V005-N00658.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因｜劳逸失度
V005-N00658.definition: 致病因素。过度劳伤，包括劳力过度、劳神过度和房劳过度。

V005-N00658.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00658.label: 过劳
V005-N00658.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00658.definition: Overwork can be physical, mental or sexual.

V005-N00659.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00659.label: 过劳
V005-N00659.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜劳伤
V005-N00659.definition: 体力劳动或体育锻炼持续时间过长，或强度过大，则脏腑和肢体皆可积劳成疾，临床可引起脾肺气虚津亏及筋骨损伤证。

V005-N00659.label: 劳力过度
V005-N00659.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因｜劳逸失度｜过劳
V005-N00659.definition: 指长期的超过力所能及的体力活动，能损伤脏腑，使脏气虚少。是身体疲劳的重要原因。

V005-N00659.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00659.label: 劳力过度
V005-N00659.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00659.definition: Excessive physical activities damage the zang–fu organs and cause qi deficiency of the zang organs.

V005-N00660.label: 劳神过度
V005-N00660.englishNames: Excessive Thinking and Anxiety; Mental Exhaustion
V005-N00660.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因｜劳逸失度｜过劳
V005-N00660.definition: 指持续的剧烈的超过机体适应能力的心神活动，能耗伤心脾，甚则殃及诸脏，是精神或神经疲劳的主要原因。

V005-N00660.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00660.label: 劳神过度
V005-N00660.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00660.definition: Excessive mental activities tend to damage heart blood and spleen qi.

V005-N00661.label: 房劳
V005-N00661.definition: 性生活过度，可使肾之精气亏耗，成为致病因素。

V005-N00661.label: 房劳过度

V005-N00661.definition: 指性生活过度，使肾精亏耗，是虚损的病因之一。

V005-N00663.label: 过逸
V005-N00663.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因｜劳逸失度
V005-N00663.definition: 致病因素。过度安逸，可致气血运行不畅，筋骨柔弱，脾胃呆滞，甚则继发它病。

V005-N00663.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00663.label: 过逸
V005-N00663.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00663.definition: Physical inactivity leads to imbalances in the flow of qi and blood, weak tendons and bones, stagnant qi of the spleen and stomach. In severe cases, it may even cause other secondary diseases.

V005-N00664.label: 五劳
V005-N00664.englishNames: five kinds of overstrain; five consumptions; five kinds of strain; five kinds of consuptive diseases
V005-N00664.definition: 久视、久卧、久坐、久立、久行五种过度劳累而致病的因素的合称。

V005-N00664.label: 五劳
V005-N00664.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因｜劳逸失度
V005-N00664.definition: 指久视、久坐、久立、久行物种过劳的致病因素。

V005-N00664.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00664.label: 五劳
V005-N00664.englishNames: Five exhaustions; five kinds of overstrain; five consumptions; five kinds of strain; five kinds of consuptive diseases
V005-N00664.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00664.definition: The five exhaustions are listed as follows: Long-time observation damages blood; long-time lying damages qi; long-time sitting damages muscles; long-time standing damages bones; and long-time walking damages sinews. Alternatively, the five overstrains refer to deficiencies of the five zang organs (i.e. liver, heart, spleen, lung and kidney).

V005-N00664.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00664.label: 五劳
V005-N00664.englishNames: five kinds of overstrain; five consumptions; five kinds of strain; five kinds of consuptive diseases

V005-N00665.label: 七伤
V005-N00665.definition: 食伤、忧伤、饮伤、房室伤、饥伤、劳伤、经络营卫气伤的合称。

V005-N00665.label: 七伤
V005-N00665.path: 病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因
V005-N00665.definition: 指饮伤、食伤、房室伤、饥伤、劳伤、经络伤、营卫气伤等七种伤证。

V005-N00665.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00665.label: 七伤
V005-N00665.englishNames: seven damages; Seven damages; seven injuries
V005-N00665.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00665.definition: Refers to the seven pathogenic factors that lead to deficiency and consumption, including improper diet, anxiety, drink, sex, hunger, over-exertion, and damage to meridians, collaterals, Ying-nutrients, Wei-defense and qi.

V005-N00665.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00670.aliases: 湿痰； 湿痰蕴结肌肤； 痰湿内阻； 痰湿瘀滞； 痰湿中阻； 痰湿阻滞； 痰湿阻滞精室； PhlegmDampness； Syndrome of Phlegmdampness

V005-N00670.definition: 脾失健运，聚湿生痰而致痰浊与湿邪相合的病邪。
