V005-N00675.definition: 指体内某些部位形成并停滞为病的砂石样病理产物或结块。

V005-N00675.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00675.definition: The gravel-like substance that accumulates in the human body, especially in the ducts and cavities of zang–fu organs. It is also a secondary pathogenic factor.

V005-N00676.definition: 母亲在受孕至分娩的整个妊娠期间对胎儿的不良影响，导致婴儿出生后发生疾病。

V005-N00676.definition: 指禀赋与疾病经母体而传及子代。就病因而言，属于由胎而来的致病因素。

V005-N00676.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00676.definition: An inherited etiological factor that transmits the body constitution and disease of the mother to her fetus.

V005-N00677.definition: 婴儿在胎妊期间禀受自母体的热毒，可成为其出生后易发生疮疹诸病的病因。

V005-N00677.definition: 指婴儿在胎妊期间禀受母体的热（火）毒，为出生后发生疮疹和遗毒等病变的致病因素。

V005-N00680.definition: 跌仆，或受外力撞击、兵器损伤，以及虫兽咬伤，烫、烧、冻伤等致病因素导致皮肉筋骨及内脏受伤。

V005-N00693.definition: 指疾病初愈，或行神过劳，或早犯房事而引起疾病复发者。

V005-N00693.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00693.label: 劳复

V005-N00694.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00694.definition: A pathological state of pathogenic factors affecting two meridians that are interior–exteriorly connected.

V005-N00695.label: 直中
V005-N00695.definition: 伤寒病邪不经三阳病的传变过程，直接侵犯三阴经，初起即为三阴病。

V005-N00695.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00695.label: 直中
V005-N00695.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜六经病｜传变
V005-N00695.definition: 伤寒病初起，病邪不从阳经传入，而直接侵袭阴经发病者。

V005-N00695.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00695.label: 直中

V005-N00697.label: 邪正盛衰
V005-N00697.englishNames: exuberance and debilitation of the healthy qi or pathogenic qi; rising and falling of vital qi and pathogen; exuberance or decline of healthy and pathogenic qi
V005-N00697.definition: 指在疾病发生、发展过程中，机体的抗病能力与致病邪气间相互斗争所发生的盛衰病机变化，影响着疾病的发展和转归，以及病证的虚实变化。

V005-N00697.label: 邪正盛衰
V005-N00697.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜发病原理
V005-N00697.definition: 指疾病过程中，机体抗病能力与致病邪气之间相互斗争中所发生的盛衰变化。

V005-N00697.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00697.label: 邪正盛衰
V005-N00697.englishNames: exuberance and debilitation of the healthy qi or pathogenic qi; rising and falling of vital qi and pathogen; exuberance or decline of healthy and pathogenic qi; Waxing and waning of anti-pathogenic qi and pathogenic factors
V005-N00697.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00697.definition: The pathological states due to the struggle between healthy qi and pathogenic factors.

V005-N00697.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00697.label: 邪正消长
V005-N00697.englishNames: exuberance and debilitation of pathogenic qi or healthy qi

V005-N00697.label: 邪正盛衰
V005-N00697.englishNames: exuberance and debilitation of the healthy qi or pathogenic qi
V005-N00697.definition: the key factor that determines the process of disease and prognosis, namely, rise of the healthy qi with decline of the pathogenic qi leading to improvement and cure, while exuberance of the pathogenic qi with debilitation of the healthy qi resulting

V005-N00698.label: 邪气盛则实
V005-N00698.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜发病原理
V005-N00698.definition: 指疾病过程中，邪气盛，正气激烈对抗，出现实证的病机。

V005-N00698.label: 邪气盛则实
V005-N00698.englishNames: Exuberance of Pathogenic Qi Leading to Excessiveness
V005-N00698.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机｜实的病机
V005-N00698.definition: 指在疾病过程中，邪气亢盛，正气未虚，邪正相争导致以邪气盛为主的实性病理变化。

V005-N00699.label: 实
V005-N00699.definition: 与虚相对而言，指邪气亢盛，以邪气盛为矛盾主要方面的病理反应，表现为正气与邪气均较强盛，正邪相搏，斗争剧烈，反应明显，可见各种亢盛有余的征候。

V005-N00699.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00699.label: 实
V005-N00699.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00699.definition: Opposite to deficiency, it is a hyperactive pathological state due to a fierce struggle between excessive pathogenic factors and normal healthy qi.

V005-N00699.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00699.label: 实

V005-N00699.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00699.label: 实
V005-N00699.definition: (1) excessiveness of the pathogenic qi; (2) strong constitution; (3) strong reaction against pathogens

V005-N00700.label: 五实
V005-N00700.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机｜实的病机｜邪气盛则实
V005-N00700.definition: 指五脏实热闭阻病变的总称。心受邪而脉洪盛、肺受邪而皮肤灼、脾受邪而腹胀满、肝受邪而闷瞀、肾受邪而二便不通。

V005-N00701.label: 精气夺则虚
V005-N00701.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜发病原理
V005-N00701.definition: 精气指人体的正气，精气夺则虚是指疾病过程中正气过度耗损，出现虚证的病机。

V005-N00701.label: 精气夺则虚
V005-N00701.englishNames: Loss of Essential Qi Leading to Deficiency
V005-N00701.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机｜虚的病机
V005-N00701.definition: 指在疾病过程中，正气过度耗损，邪正相搏，导致以正气虚衰为主的虚性病理变化。

V005-N00702.label: 虚
V005-N00702.definition: 指正气不足，以正气虚损为矛盾主要方面的病理反应，表现为机体的精、气、血、津液亏少和功能衰弱，脏腑经络的功能低下，抗病能力减退，可见各种虚弱不足的证候。

V005-N00702.vocabName: 简帛医药文献词典（2018）（未校勘）
V005-N00702.label: 虚
V005-N00702.path: 上編 簡帛醫學詞語｜其他醫學詞語
V005-N00702.definition: 脈象之一。脈搏往來空虚無力。

V005-N00702.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00702.label: 虚
V005-N00702.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00702.definition: Opposite to excess, it is a hypoactive pathological state due to the struggle between weak healthy qi and mild/moderate pathogenic factors.

V005-N00702.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00702.label: 虚

V005-N00702.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00702.label: 虚
V005-N00702.definition: (1) deficiency of the healthy qi; (2) weak constitution; (3) weak reaction against pathogens

V005-N00703.label: 五虚
V005-N00703.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机｜虚的病机｜精气夺则虚
V005-N00703.definition: 指五脏精气虚损病变的总称。心气虚而脉细、肺气虚而皮寒、脾气虚而饮食不入、肝气虚而气少、肾气虚而二便滑泄。

V005-N00703.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00703.label: 五虚

V005-N00704.label: 虚实夹杂
V005-N00704.englishNames: intermingled deficiency and excess; deficiency-excess complex
V005-N00704.definition: 由于邪正相争，形成邪盛和正衰同时并存的病理变化。

V005-N00704.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00704.label: 虚实夹杂
V005-N00704.englishNames: Syndrome of Intermingled Deficiency and Excess
V005-N00704.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候
V005-N00704.definition: 疾病过程中，邪正斗争，邪盛与正衰同时并存的病理变化，包括虚中夹实和实中夹虚。

V005-N00704.label: 虚实错杂
V005-N00704.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机
V005-N00704.definition: 指疾病过程中，邪盛与正虚同时存在的病理状态。

V005-N00704.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00704.label: 虚实错杂
V005-N00704.aliases: 虚实夹杂； Mixed deficiency and excess
V005-N00704.englishNames: Combined deficiency and excess; deficiency and excess in complexity
V005-N00704.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00704.definition: A pathological state due to deficiency of healthy qi and excess of pathogenic factors. This includes deficiency complicated with excess and excess complicated with deficiency.

V005-N00704.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00704.label: 虚实夹杂

V005-N00704.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00704.label: 虚实夹杂
V005-N00704.definition: a pathological state in which both excess of pathogenic qi and debilitation of healthy qi occur in the disease process

V005-N00705.label: 虚中夹实
V005-N00705.englishNames: deficiency complicated with excess; deficiency complicated by excess; deficiency with excess complication
V005-N00705.definition: 正气虚损并夹有实邪，以虚为主的病理变化。

V005-N00705.label: 虚中夹实
V005-N00705.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机｜虚实错杂
V005-N00705.definition: 指病理变化以正虚为主，又兼有实邪为患的病理状态。

V005-N00705.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00705.label: 虚中夹实
V005-N00705.englishNames: deficiency complicated with excess; deficiency complicated by excess; deficiency with excess complication; Deficiency complicated with excess
V005-N00705.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00705.definition: A pathological state that mainly manifests as a deficiency of healthy qi, accompanied by excessive pathogenic factors.

V005-N00705.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00705.label: 虚中夹实
V005-N00705.definition: deficiency condition complicated by excess symptoms with the former dominant

V005-N00706.label: 实中夹虚
V005-N00706.englishNames: excess complicated with deficiency; excess with deficiency complication; excess complicated by deficiency
V005-N00706.definition: 以邪实为主，又兼有正气不足的病理变化。

V005-N00706.label: 实中夹虚
V005-N00706.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机｜虚实错杂
V005-N00706.definition: 指病理变化以邪实为主，又兼有正气虚损的病理状态。

V005-N00706.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00706.label: 实中夹虚
V005-N00706.englishNames: excess complicated with deficiency; excess with deficiency complication; Excess complicated with deficiency; excess complicated by deficiency
V005-N00706.pinyinNames: shí zhōng jiā xū; shi zhong jia xu
V005-N00706.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00706.definition: A pathological state that mainly manifests as excess of pathogenic factors, accompanied by a deficiency of healthy qi.

V005-N00706.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00706.label: 实中夹虚
V005-N00706.englishNames: excess complicated by deficiency; excess complicated with deficiency

V005-N00706.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00706.label: 实中夹虚
V005-N00706.definition: excess condition complicated by deficiency symptoms with the former dominant

V005-N00707.label: 虚实真假
V005-N00707.englishNames: true and false manifestation of deficiency and excess; true or false deficiency-excess; true-false of excess-deficiency; true or false excess and deficiency
V005-N00707.definition: 虚实外证表现与疾病的本质相反的病理变化。

V005-N00707.label: 虚实真假
V005-N00707.englishNames: True or False Excess and Deficiency
V005-N00707.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机
V005-N00707.definition: 指邪气盛极之实而夹假虚之象或正气虚极之虚而夹假实之征的病理变化。包括真虚假实和真实假虚。

V005-N00707.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00707.label: 虚实真假
V005-N00707.englishNames: true and false manifestation of deficiency and excess; True or false deficiency and excess; true or false deficiency-excess; true-false of excess-deficiency; true or false excess and deficiency
V005-N00707.pinyinNames: xu shi zhen jia; xū shí zhēn jiǎ
V005-N00707.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00707.definition: The false symptoms contrary to the true nature of the disease. This includes true deficiency with false excess and true excess with false deficiency.

V005-N00707.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00707.label: 虚实真假
V005-N00707.englishNames: true or false excess and deficiency; true and false manifestation of deficiency and excess; true-false of excess-deficiency

V005-N00707.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00707.label: 虚实真假
V005-N00707.definition: false appearance of deficiency-excess manifestations opposite to the true nature of the disease

V005-N00708.label: 真虚假实
V005-N00708.englishNames: true deficiency disease with false excessive manifestation; true deficiency with false excess
V005-N00708.definition: 正气虚弱为病，反而出现类似实证的假象。

V005-N00708.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00708.label: 真虚假实
V005-N00708.englishNames: Syndrome of True Deficient Disease with False Excessive Manifestation
V005-N00708.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜虚证
V005-N00708.definition: 病机为虚，反见某些邪盛表现的证候，临床表现为胸腹部柔软而喜按、神疲乏力、气短懒言、舌淡脉弱、病久体衰等真虚症状，又见腹胀满、气喘、二便闭涩等由虚所致的假实表现。

V005-N00708.label: 真虚假实
V005-N00708.englishNames: Real Deficiency with Pseudo-Excess; True Deficiency with False Excess
V005-N00708.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机｜虚实真假
V005-N00708.definition: 指病机的本质为“虚”，但表现出“实”的临床假象。

V005-N00708.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00708.label: 真虚假实
V005-N00708.englishNames: true deficiency disease with false excessive manifestation; true deficiency with false excess; True deficiency with false excess
V005-N00708.pinyinNames: zhēn xū jiǎ shí; zhen xu jia shi
V005-N00708.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00708.definition: The false excess symptoms due to extreme deficiency of healthy qi.

V005-N00708.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00708.label: 真虚假实
V005-N00708.englishNames: true deficiency with false excess; true deficiency disease with false excessive manifestation

V005-N00708.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00708.label: 至虚有盛候

V005-N00708.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00708.label: 真虚假实

V005-N00709.label: 真实假虚
V005-N00709.englishNames: true excess disease with false deficient manifestation; true excess with false deficiency
V005-N00709.definition: 实邪结聚为病，反而出现类似虚证的假象。

V005-N00709.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00709.label: 真实假虚
V005-N00709.englishNames: Syndrome of True Excessive Disease with False Deficient Manifestation
V005-N00709.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜实证
V005-N00709.definition: 泛指疾病本质为实证，而表现出某些类似虚弱症状的证候。

V005-N00709.label: 真实假虚
V005-N00709.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机｜虚实真假
V005-N00709.definition: 指病机的本质为“实”，但表现出“虚”的临床假象。

V005-N00709.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00709.label: 真实假虚
V005-N00709.englishNames: true excess disease with false deficient manifestation; true excess with false deficiency; True excess with false deficiency
V005-N00709.pinyinNames: zhen shi jia xu; zhēn shí jiǎ xū
V005-N00709.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00709.definition: The false deficiency symptoms due to extreme excess of pathogenic factors.

V005-N00709.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00709.label: 大实有羸状

V005-N00709.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00709.label: 真实假虚
V005-N00709.englishNames: true excess with false deficiency; true excess disease with false deficient manifestation

V005-N00709.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00709.label: 真实假虚

V005-N00710.label: 虚实转化
V005-N00710.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机
V005-N00710.definition: 指在疾病过程中，由于邪气伤正，或正虚而邪气积聚，发生病机性质由实转虚或因虚致实的变化。

V005-N00710.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00710.label: 虚实转化
V005-N00710.englishNames: Deficiency–excess transformation; transformation of deficiency and excess
V005-N00710.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00710.definition: The mutual transformation between deficiency of healthy qi and excess of pathogenic factors. This includes excess transforming into deficiency and deficiency into excess.

V005-N00711.label: 由实转虚
V005-N00711.englishNames: deficiency transformed from excess; conversion of excess into deficiency; transformation from excess into deficiency
V005-N00711.definition: 疾病本来是以邪气盛为矛盾主要方面的实性病变，由于失治、误治，或病情迁延，伤及正气，向以正气虚损为矛盾主要方面的虚性病变转化的病理变化。

V005-N00711.label: 由实转虚
V005-N00711.path: 分期与传变｜传变｜病性转化
V005-N00711.definition: 指疾病或病证本来是以泄气盛为矛盾猪獒方面的实质性病变，继而转化为以正气虚损为矛盾主要方面的徐行病变过程。

V005-N00711.label: 由实转虚
V005-N00711.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机｜虚实转化
V005-N00711.definition: 指以邪气盛为主的实性病变，向以正气虚损为主的虚性病变的转化。

V005-N00711.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00711.label: 由实转虚
V005-N00711.englishNames: deficiency transformed from excess; conversion of excess into deficiency; Excess transforming into deficiency; transformation from excess into deficiency
V005-N00711.pinyinNames: you shi zhuan xu; yóu shí zhuǎn xū
V005-N00711.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00711.definition: A transformation from an excess pattern (hyperactivity of pathogenic factors) to a deficiency pattern (deficiency of healthy qi).

V005-N00711.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00711.label: 由实转虚
V005-N00711.englishNames: transformation from excess into deficiency; conversion of excess into deficiency; deficiency transformed from excess

V005-N00711.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00711.label: 由实转虚
V005-N00711.definition: the process of a disease turning from excess of pathogenic qi into deficiency of healthy qi

V005-N00712.label: 因虚致实
V005-N00712.definition: 疾病本来是以正气虚为矛盾主要方面的虚性病变，因正气虚弱，脏腑功能减退，气、血、水液运行障碍，产生气滞、血瘀、痰饮、水湿等实邪留滞的病理变化。

V005-N00712.label: 因虚致实
V005-N00712.path: 分期与传变｜传变｜病性转化
V005-N00712.definition: 指疾病和病证本来是以正气亏损为矛盾主要方面的虚性病变，转变为邪气盛较突出的病变过程。

V005-N00712.label: 因虚致实
V005-N00712.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜虚实病机｜虚实转化
V005-N00712.definition: 指以正气虚为主的虚性病变，向以邪气亢盛为主的实性病变的转化。

V005-N00712.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00712.label: 因虚致实
V005-N00712.englishNames: excess resulted from deficiency; Deficiency transforming into excess
V005-N00712.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00712.definition: A transformation from a deficiency pattern (deficiency of healthy qi) to an excess pattern (hyperactivity of pathogenic factors).

V005-N00713.label: 阴阳失调
V005-N00713.englishNames: yinyang disharmony; imbalance between yin and yang; yin-yang disharmony
V005-N00713.definition: 阴阳失去平衡协调的各种病理变化的统称。

V005-N00713.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00713.label: 阴阳失调
V005-N00713.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V005-N00713.definition: 机体阴阳消长失去平衡，疾病的发生、发展过程中，由于致病因素的作用，导致机体的阴阳消长失去相对的平衡，形成阴阳的盛衰、互损、格拒、转化或亡失的一系列病理变化。

V005-N00713.label: 阴阳失调
V005-N00713.englishNames: excess and deficiency of either  Yin and Yang
V005-N00713.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理
V005-N00713.definition: 当阴阳的相对平衡遭到破坏后，阴阳失调，从而形成的阴阳偏胜偏衰的情况。

V005-N00713.label: 阴阳失调
V005-N00713.aliases: 阴阳乖戾； 阴阳失衡
V005-N00713.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机
V005-N00713.definition: 即阴阳之间失去平衡协调的简称。是指在疾病的发生发展过程中，由于各种致病因素的影响，导致机体的阴阳双方失去相对的平衡协调而出现的阴阳偏胜、偏衰、互损、格拒、亡失等一系列病理变化。

V005-N00713.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00713.label: 阴阳失调
V005-N00713.englishNames: Disharmony between yin and yang; yinyang disharmony; imbalance between yin and yang; yin-yang disharmony
V005-N00713.pinyinNames: yīn yáng shī tiáo; yin yang shi tiao
V005-N00713.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00713.definition: A general term for pathological states due to waxing and waning of yin and yang. This includes excess of yin or yang, deficiency of yin or yang, mutual impairment between yin and yang, rejection between yin and yang, transformation between yin and yang, and depletion/loss of yin or yang.

V005-N00713.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00713.label: 阴阳失调
V005-N00713.englishNames: imbalance between yin and yang; yin-yang disharmony; yinyang disharmony

V005-N00713.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00713.label: 阴阳失调
V005-N00713.definition: a general term for all kinds of pathological changes due to imbalance and incoordination of yin and yang

V005-N00714.label: 阴阳偏盛
V005-N00714.englishNames: abnormal exuberance of yin or yang; excess of either yin or yang; preponderance of yin or yang
V005-N00714.definition: 阴偏盛导致阳虚，阳偏盛导致阴虚的病理变化的统称。阴邪以寒、静、湿为特点，侵犯人体，致阴偏盛；阳邪以热、动、燥为特点，侵犯人体，致阳偏盛。

V005-N00714.label: 阴阳偏盛
V005-N00714.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调
V005-N00714.definition: 指人体阴阳二气中某一方的病理性亢盛状态，属“邪气盛则实”的实性病机。

V005-N00714.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00714.label: 阴阳偏盛
V005-N00714.englishNames: abnormal exuberance of yin or yang; excess of either yin or yang; Excess yin or yang; preponderance of yin or yang
V005-N00714.pinyinNames: yin yang pian sheng; yīn yáng piān shèng
V005-N00714.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00714.definition: Pathological states due to excess of yin or yang.

V005-N00714.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00714.label: 阴阳偏盛
V005-N00714.englishNames: preponderance of yin or yang; abnormal exuberance of yin or yang; excess of either yin or yang

V005-N00714.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00714.label: 阴阳偏盛
V005-N00714.englishNames: abnormal exuberance of yin or yang
V005-N00714.definition: any pathological change marked by yin or yang higher than the normal level due to yin pathogens or yang pathogens

V005-N00715.label: 阳盛
V005-N00715.englishNames: exuberance of yang; yang exuberance; yang excessiveness
V005-N00715.definition: 人体之阳主温煦和兴奋，阳偏盛则机能亢奋或热量过剩，可出现明显的热象等病理表现。

V005-N00715.label: 阳盛
V005-N00715.aliases: 孤阳上亢； 亢阳； 阳极； 阳亢； 阳偏胜； 阳热极盛； 阳热亢极； 阳热亢盛； 阳胜； 阳盛隔阴于外
V005-N00715.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏盛
V005-N00715.definition: 指机体在疾病过程中所出现的一种阳气病理性偏盛、机能亢奋、机体反应性增强、热量过剩的病理状态。

V005-N00715.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00715.label: 阳盛
V005-N00715.englishNames: exuberance of yang; yang exuberance; yang excessiveness

V005-N00715.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00715.label: 阳盛
V005-N00715.definition: a pathological state in which yang is exuberant while yin has not been debilitated, giving rise to an excessheat syndrome, the same as yang excess

V005-N00716.label: 阳胜则阴病
V005-N00716.englishNames: Excess of  Yang  leading  to disorder of  Yin
V005-N00716.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴阳消长｜阴阳互为消长
V005-N00716.definition: 阴阳学说对病因病机的高度概括。阳气偏胜导致阴气不正常，阴阳失衡。

V005-N00716.label: 阳胜则阴病
V005-N00716.englishNames: Excess of YANG Leading to Disorder of YIN; Preponderance of YANG Making YIN Suffer
V005-N00716.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏盛｜阳盛
V005-N00716.definition: 指阳热偏胜导致各种伤津、伤阴的病理变化。

V005-N00716.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00716.label: 阳胜则阴病
V005-N00716.englishNames: predominance of yang making yin suffer; When yang prevails, yin fluids will be consumed.; predominance of yang leading to disorder of yin
V005-N00716.pinyinNames: yáng shèng zé yīn bìng; yang sheng ze yin bing
V005-N00716.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00716.definition: A pathological state of overwhelming yang heat consuming yin fluids.

V005-N00716.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00716.label: 阳胜则阴病

V005-N00716.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00716.label: 阳胜则阴病

V005-N00717.label: 阳盛则热
V005-N00717.englishNames: Excess  of  Yang  bringing  about  heat  syndrome
V005-N00717.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴阳对立制约｜阴阳制约
V005-N00717.definition: 阴阳学说用于分析人体病理变化规律。阳气偏胜，阴气不足，则多出现热性病变。

V005-N00717.label: 阳盛则热
V005-N00717.englishNames: Excess of YANG Bringing about Heat Syndrome; Preponderance of YANG Leading to Heat
V005-N00717.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏盛｜阳盛
V005-N00717.definition: 指阳邪偏胜导致热而且实的病理变化。

V005-N00717.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00717.label: 阳胜则热
V005-N00717.englishNames: predominance of yang leading to heat; Yang excess leading to heat
V005-N00717.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00717.definition: A pathological state of overwhelming yang leading to excess heat.

V005-N00718.label: 阴盛
V005-N00718.englishNames: exuberance of yin; yin excessiveness; yin exuberance
V005-N00718.definition: 人体之阴王宁静和抑制，阴偏盛则脏腑组织机能抑制或障碍，温煦气化不足，可出现寒象等病理表现。

V005-N00718.label: 阴盛
V005-N00718.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏盛
V005-N00718.definition: 指机体在疾病过程中所出现的一种阴气病理性偏盛、机能抑制、热量耗伤过多的病理状态。

V005-N00718.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00718.label: 阴盛
V005-N00718.englishNames: exuberance of yin; yin exuberance; yin excessiveness

V005-N00718.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00718.label: 阴盛
V005-N00718.definition: a pathological state in which yin pathogen is exuberant while the healthy qi has not been damaged, giving rise to an excess-cold syndrome, the same as yin excess

V005-N00719.label: 阴胜则阳病
V005-N00719.englishNames: Excess of  Yin  leading  to Disorder of  Yang
V005-N00719.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴阳消长｜阴阳互为消长
V005-N00719.definition: 阴阳学说对病因病机的高度概括。阴气偏胜导致阳气不正常，阴阳失衡。

V005-N00719.label: 阴胜则阳病
V005-N00719.englishNames: Excess of YIN Leading to Disorder of YANG; Predominance of YIN Making YANG Suffer
V005-N00719.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏盛｜阴盛
V005-N00719.definition: 指阴气亢盛过度制约阳气，即阴盛则损伤阳气而致阳虚。

V005-N00719.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00719.label: 阴胜则阳病
V005-N00719.englishNames: predominance of yin leading to disorder of yang; When yin prevails, yang qi will be impaired.; predominance of yin making yang suffer
V005-N00719.pinyinNames: yin sheng ze yang bing; yīn shèng zé yáng bìng
V005-N00719.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00719.definition: A pathological state of excess yin cold consuming yang qi.

V005-N00719.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00719.label: 阴胜则阳病
V005-N00719.englishNames: predominance of yin making yang suffer; predominance of yin leading to disorder of yang

V005-N00719.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00719.label: 阴胜则阳病

V005-N00720.label: 阴胜则寒
V005-N00720.englishNames: Predominance of YIN Leading to Cold
V005-N00720.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏盛｜阴盛
V005-N00720.definition: 指阴邪偏盛导致寒而且实的病理变化。

V005-N00720.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00720.label: 阴胜则寒
V005-N00720.englishNames: predominance of yin leading to cold; Yin excess leading to cold
V005-N00720.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00720.definition: A pathological state of overwhelming yin leading to excess cold.

V005-N00721.label: 阴阳偏衰
V005-N00721.englishNames: deficiency of either yin or yang; abnormal debilitation of yin or yang; decline of yin or yang
V005-N00721.definition: 机体各种阴阳之气虚弱的病理变化的统称。

V005-N00721.label: 阴阳偏衰
V005-N00721.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调
V005-N00721.definition: 指人体阴阳二气中某一方虚衰不足的病理状态，属“精气夺则虚”的虚性病机。

V005-N00721.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00721.label: 阴阳偏衰
V005-N00721.englishNames: deficiency of either yin or yang; abnormal debilitation of yin or yang; Waning of yin or yang; decline of yin or yang
V005-N00721.pinyinNames: yin yang pian shuai; yīn yáng piān shuāi
V005-N00721.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00721.definition: Pathological states due to deficiency of yin or yang.

V005-N00721.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00721.label: 阴阳偏衰
V005-N00721.englishNames: decline of yin or yang; abnormal debilitation of yin or yang; deficiency of either yin or yang

V005-N00721.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00721.label: 阴阳偏衰
V005-N00721.englishNames: abnormal debilitation of yin or yang
V005-N00721.definition: any pathological change marked by yin or yang lower than the normal level due to deficiency of yin or yang of the human body

V005-N00722.label: 阳虚
V005-N00722.definition: 机体阳气不足，机能减退或衰弱，代谢活动减退，机体反应性低下，阳热不足的病理变化。

V005-N00722.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00722.label: 阳虚
V005-N00722.aliases: 虚寒； 阳气亏虚； 阳气虚； 阳虚内寒
V005-N00722.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V005-N00722.definition: 阳气亏损，失却温煦推动，脏腑机能衰退，以畏寒肢冷，神疲乏力，气短，口淡不渴，或喜热饮，尿清便溏，或尿少浮肿，面白，舌淡胖，脉沉迟无力等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00722.label: 阳虚
V005-N00722.aliases: 气虚阳微； 伤阳； 阳不足； 阳偏衰； 阳气不足； 阳气亏损； 阳气亏虚； 阳气衰竭； 阳气素虚； 阳气虚弱； 阳气虚衰； 阳气虚脱； 阳衰； 脏腑阳气不足
V005-N00722.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏衰
V005-N00722.definition: 指机体阳气虚损，温煦、推动、兴奋等作用减退，出现机能减退或衰弱，代谢减缓，产热不足的病理状态。

V005-N00722.label: 阳虚
V005-N00722.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜虚劳

V005-N00722.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00722.label: 阳虚

V005-N00722.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00722.label: 阳虚
V005-N00722.definition: a pathological state characterized by deficiency of body’s yang qi that leads to diminished functions, decreased metabolic activities, reduced body reactions as well as deficiency-cold manifestations; in Kampo medicine, “yang” and “excess” are indepen

V005-N00723.label: 阳虚则寒
V005-N00723.aliases: 阳虚寒凝； 阳虚阴寒； 阳虚则外寒
V005-N00723.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏衰｜阳虚
V005-N00723.definition: 指阳气虚弱，温煦功能减退，必然导致寒而虚的病理变化。

V005-N00723.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00723.label: 阳虚则寒
V005-N00723.englishNames: yang deficiency leading to cold; Yang deficiency leading to cold
V005-N00723.pinyinNames: yáng xū zé hán; yang xu ze han
V005-N00723.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00723.definition: A pathological state of yang qi deficiency leading to deficiency cold.

V005-N00723.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00723.label: 阳虚则寒

V005-N00724.label: 阴虚
V005-N00724.definition: 阴分不足，津血亏损，滋润、荣养不够的病理变化；因阴不制阳，也可出现阳相对亢盛的虚性机能亢奋的病理变化。

V005-N00724.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00724.label: 阴虚
V005-N00724.aliases: 阴液亏虚； Syndrome of Yin Deficiency
V005-N00724.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V005-N00724.definition: 阴液不足，不能制阳，以潮热盗汗、午后颧红、五心烦热、口燥咽干、舌红少苔、脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00724.label: 阴虚
V005-N00724.aliases: 耗伤阴液； 阴竭； 阴津亏耗； 阴津亏虚； 阴亏脉陷； 阴亏已极； 阴偏衰； 阴伤； 阴衰； 阴虚毒恋； 阴虚邪恋； 阴液不足； 阴液耗伤； 阴液耗损； 阴液精血亏虚； 阴液亏少； 阴液亏损； 阴液亏虚； 余毒伤阴
V005-N00724.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏衰
V005-N00724.definition: 指机体阴气不足，凉润、宁静、抑制等功能减退，出现代谢相对增快，机能虚性亢奋，产热相对增多的病理状态。

V005-N00724.label: 阴虚
V005-N00724.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜虚劳

V005-N00724.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00724.label: 阴虚

V005-N00724.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00724.label: 阴虚
V005-N00724.definition: a pathological change marked by deficiency of yin with diminished moistening, calming, downbearing and yang-inhibiting function, leading to relative hyperactivity of yang qi; in Kampo medicine, “yin” and “deficiency” are independently understood

V005-N00725.label: 阴虚发热
V005-N00725.aliases: 阴虚内热； 阴虚生热； 阴虚则内热； 阴虚则热
V005-N00725.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏衰｜阴虚
V005-N00725.definition: 指阴虚，制约阳热的功能减退而致虚热内生的病理变化，可见到低热、午后潮热，或夜间发热，手足心热，盗汗消瘦等症。

V005-N00725.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00725.label: 阴虚则热
V005-N00725.englishNames: yin deficiency leading to heat; Yin deficiency leading to heat
V005-N00725.pinyinNames: yin xu ze re; yīn xū zé rè
V005-N00725.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00725.definition: A pathological state in which yin fluid fails to control yang and causes a relative hyperactivity of yang and deficiency heat.

V005-N00725.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00725.label: 阴虚则热

V005-N00726.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00726.label: 阴虚阳亢
V005-N00726.aliases: 虚阳偏亢； 虚阳偏旺； Syndrome of Hyperactivity of Yang due to Yin Deficiency； YiN DEFIC YANG HYPERACT
V005-N00726.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚
V005-N00726.definition: 阴液亏虚，阳失制约而偏亢，以潮热盗汗、两颧潮红、头晕目眩、烦躁失眠、舌红少津、脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00726.label: 阴虚阳亢
V005-N00726.aliases: 阳气浮动； 阴虚阳浮
V005-N00726.englishNames: Hyperactivity of YANG due to Deficiency of YIN; YIN Dificiency with YANG Hyperactivity
V005-N00726.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏衰｜阴虚
V005-N00726.definition: 指机体阴液亏损，阴不敛阳，阳相对亢盛而浮越于上的病理变化。

V005-N00726.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00726.label: 阴虚阳亢
V005-N00726.englishNames: yin deficiency with yang hyperactivity; Yin deficiency leading to yang hyperactivity
V005-N00726.pinyinNames: yin xu yang kang; yīn xū yáng kàng
V005-N00726.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00726.definition: A pathological state in which yin fluid fails to control yang and causes a relative hyperactivity of yang.

V005-N00726.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00726.label: 阴虚阳亢

V005-N00726.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00726.label: 阴虚阳亢
V005-N00726.definition: insufficient essence, blood and fluid failing to restrain yang, causing increased activity of yang

V005-N00727.label: 阴虚火旺
V005-N00727.englishNames: yin deficiency resulting in rampant fire; yin deficiency with effulgent fire; hyperactivity of fire due to yin deficiency
V005-N00727.definition: 阴虚，阴不制阳，阳相对亢盛而致虚火炽盛的病理变化，可见到烦躁易怒，两颧潮红，性欲亢进等症。

V005-N00727.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00727.label: 阴虚火旺
V005-N00727.aliases: 虚火； 阴虚火炽； 阴虚火炎； 阴虚燥热； Syndrome of Hyperactivity of Fire due to Yin Deficiency； YIN DEFIC FIRE HYPERACT
V005-N00727.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚
V005-N00727.definition: 阴液亏虚，虚火亢旺，以心烦失眠、口燥咽干、盗汗遗精、两颧潮红、小便短黄、大便干结，或咳血、衄血，或舌体、口腔溃疡，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00727.label: 阴虚火旺
V005-N00727.aliases: 水不制火； 虚火内生； 虚火上扰； 虚火上炎； 阴虚毒热； 阴虚火炽
V005-N00727.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏衰｜阴虚
V005-N00727.definition: 指阴液亏损，木不制火，而致虚火上升的病理变化。

V005-N00727.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00727.label: 阴虚火旺
V005-N00727.englishNames: yin deficiency resulting in rampant fire; yin deficiency with effulgent fire; hyperactivity of fire due to yin deficiency; Yin deficiency leading to fire hyperactivity
V005-N00727.pinyinNames: yin xu huo wang; yīn xū huǒ wàng
V005-N00727.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00727.definition: A pathological state in which yin fluid fails to control yang and causes a relative hyperactivity of yang and deficiency fire.

V005-N00727.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00727.label: 阴虚火旺
V005-N00727.englishNames: yin deficiency resulting in rampant fire; yin deficiency with effulgent fire; hyperactivity of fire due to yin deficiency

V005-N00727.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00727.label: 阴虚火旺
V005-N00727.definition: insufficient yin failing to restrain yang, causing exuberant fire of the deficiency type

V005-N00728.label: 虚火上炎
V005-N00728.englishNames: flaring up of deficient fire; flaming of deficiency-fire; deficiency fire flaming upward
V005-N00728.definition: 阴虚，水不制火，而致虚火上升的病理变化，可见到咽干咽痛，口舌生疮等症。

V005-N00728.label: 阴虚火旺
V005-N00728.aliases: 水不制火； 虚火内生； 虚火上扰； 虚火上炎； 阴虚毒热； 阴虚火炽
V005-N00728.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳偏衰｜阴虚
V005-N00728.definition: 指阴液亏损，木不制火，而致虚火上升的病理变化。

V005-N00728.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00728.label: 虚火上炎
V005-N00728.englishNames: flaming of deficiency-fire; deficiency fire flaming upward; flaring up of deficient fire

V005-N00728.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00728.label: 虚火上炎
V005-N00728.definition: a pathological change occurring in yin deficiency which is unable to inhibit yang, causing upflaming of the deficiency fire

V005-N00729.label: 阴阳互损
V005-N00729.englishNames: Deficiency of both YIN and YANG
V005-N00729.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜阴阳学说原理｜阴阳消长｜阴阳皆消皆长
V005-N00729.definition: 根据阴阳互根互用的理论，阴阳任何一方，虚损到一定程度，均能影响另一方，形成阴阳两虚。

V005-N00729.label: 阴阳互损
V005-N00729.englishNames: Deficiency of Both YIN and YANG
V005-N00729.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调
V005-N00729.definition: 指在阴或阳任何一方虚损的前提下，病变发展影响及相对的一方，形成阴阳两虚的病机。

V005-N00729.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00729.label: 阴阳互损
V005-N00729.englishNames: yin or yang injury with yang or yin involved; Mutual impairment between yin and yang
V005-N00729.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00729.definition: A pathological state of deficiency of both yin and yang. Often results from severe deficiency of yin affecting yang or vice versa. This includes yin deficiency affecting yang and yang deficiency affecting yin.

V005-N00730.label: 阳损及阴
V005-N00730.englishNames: yang deficiency involving yin; yang impairment affecting yin; detriment to yang affects yin; yang injury with yin involved
V005-N00730.definition: 人体阴阳互根，阳虚到一定程度，就可累及于阴，使阴气生化不足，而形成以阳虚为主的阴阳两虚病理变化。

V005-N00730.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00730.label: 阳损及阴
V005-N00730.englishNames: Syndrome of Yang Deficiency Involving Yin
V005-N00730.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴阳两虚
V005-N00730.definition: 阳气亏损，日久及阴，终致阴阳俱虚的证候。

V005-N00730.label: 阳损及阴
V005-N00730.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜阴阳失调｜阴阳互损
V005-N00730.definition: 指阳气虚损，继而累及于阴，使阴液亏损，从而导致以阳虚为主的阴阳两虚的病理变化。

V005-N00730.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00730.label: 阳损及阴
V005-N00730.englishNames: yang deficiency involving yin; yang impairment affecting yin; Deficiency of yang affecting yin; detriment to yang affects yin; yang injury with yin involved
V005-N00730.pinyinNames: yang sun ji yin; yáng sǔn jí yīn
V005-N00730.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00730.definition: A pathological state in which yang qi deficiency impedes the generation of yin, resulting in deficiency of both yin and yang with a preponderance of yang deficiency.

V005-N00730.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

This includes excessive yin rejecting yang and excessive yang rejecting yin.

V005-N00742.englishNames: exhaustion of yin and collapse of yang

V005-N00743.label: 寒热失调
V005-N00743.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机
V005-N00743.definition: 指机体阴阳失调，寒温失其常度而发生的偏寒或偏热或寒热错杂、真假的病理变化。

V005-N00744.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00744.label: 实寒
V005-N00744.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜实证
V005-N00744.definition: 感受阴寒之邪所致的证候。

V005-N00744.label: 实寒
V005-N00744.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调｜寒的病机
V005-N00744.definition: 指寒邪偏盛的实寒性的病理变化。

V005-N00744.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00744.label: 实寒

V005-N00744.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00744.label: 实寒
V005-N00744.definition: a pathological change arising from contraction of yin cold pathogen

V005-N00745.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00745.label: 阳虚
V005-N00745.aliases: 虚寒； 阳气亏虚； 阳气虚； 阳虚内寒
V005-N00745.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V005-N00745.definition: 阳气亏损，失却温煦推动，脏腑机能衰退，以畏寒肢冷，神疲乏力，气短，口淡不渴，或喜热饮，尿清便溏，或尿少浮肿，面白，舌淡胖，脉沉迟无力等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00745.label: 虚寒
V005-N00745.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调｜寒的病机
V005-N00745.definition: 指阳气偏虚的虚而且寒的病理变化。

V005-N00745.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00745.label: 虚寒
V005-N00745.definition: a pathological change arising when yang qi becomes insufficient and fails to provide adequate warmth

V005-N00746.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00746.label: 实热
V005-N00746.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜实证

V005-N00746.label: 实热
V005-N00746.aliases: 火热炽盛； 火热上冲； 火热上炎； 热极； 热盛； 邪热壅盛
V005-N00746.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调｜热的病机
V005-N00746.definition: 指阳热亢盛的实而且热的病理变化。

V005-N00747.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00747.label: 实火
V005-N00747.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜实证
V005-N00747.definition: 阳盛太过，耗伤人体正气的病邪。

V005-N00747.label: 实火
V005-N00747.aliases: 火热毒邪炽盛； 火热毒邪壅盛； 火热内扰； 火热疫毒炽盛； 火热壅盛成毒； 实火熏蒸
V005-N00747.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调｜热的病机｜实热
V005-N00747.definition: 指邪火炽盛所致的实性而热极的病理变化。

V005-N00748.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00748.label: 虚热
V005-N00748.englishNames: Syndrome of Endogenous Heat due to Yin Deficiency
V005-N00748.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜虚证
V005-N00748.definition: 阴液不足，虚热内生，以低热或午后潮热、手足心热、五心烦热、颧红、盗汗、口干不欲饮、便秘尿短、舌红少苔，或光红无苔，脉细数等为常见的证候。

V005-N00748.label: 虚热
V005-N00748.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调｜热的病机
V005-N00748.definition: 指阴血不足所致虚而且热的病理变化。

V005-N00749.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00749.label: 阴虚火旺
V005-N00749.aliases: 虚火； 阴虚火炽； 阴虚火炎； 阴虚燥热； Syndrome of Hyperactivity of Fire due to Yin Deficiency； YIN DEFIC FIRE HYPERACT
V005-N00749.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚
V005-N00749.definition: 阴液亏虚，虚火亢旺，以心烦失眠、口燥咽干、盗汗遗精、两颧潮红、小便短黄、大便干结，或咳血、衄血，或舌体、口腔溃疡，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00749.label: 虚火
V005-N00749.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调｜热的病机｜虚热
V005-N00749.definition: 指真阴亏损或阴盛格阳所致之热或阴虚阳亢，水不制火，所致的阴虚内热，火热上攻的病理变化。

V005-N00749.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00749.label: 虚火
V005-N00749.definition: consumption of yin fluid failing to restrain yang fire, giving rise to fire of the deficiency type

V005-N00750.label: 寒热错杂
V005-N00750.englishNames: cold and heat in complexity; intermingled cold and heat; cold-heat complex
V005-N00750.definition: 寒热邪气并存的病理变化，导致寒热表现同时并见。

V005-N00750.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00750.label: 寒热错杂
V005-N00750.aliases: 寒热夹杂； 寒热挟杂
V005-N00750.englishNames: Syndrome Of Intermingled Heat And Cold
V005-N00750.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V005-N00750.definition: 泛指同一病人、同一时期、既有寒证又有热证的表现，寒热交错并见的证候。

V005-N00750.label: 寒热错杂
V005-N00750.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调
V005-N00750.definition: 指寒和热交错混杂的病理变化。包括上热下寒、上寒下热、表热里寒、表寒里热等。

V005-N00750.vocabName: T/CIATCM 104-2023（表14-表27）张仲景经方术语代码表
V005-N00750.label: 寒热错杂
V005-N00750.path: 经方病机（金匮要略）代码表｜呕吐病机

V005-N00750.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00750.label: 寒热错杂
V005-N00750.englishNames: cold and heat in complexity; intermingled cold and heat

V005-N00750.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00750.label: 寒热错杂
V005-N00750.definition: a pathological change that causes complicated heat and cold conditions such as heat in the upper body with cold in the lower body, and cold in the exterior and heat in the interior

V005-N00751.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00751.label: 上寒下热
V005-N00751.aliases: 下热上寒； Syndrome Of Upper Cold And Lower Heat
V005-N00751.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒热错杂
V005-N00751.definition: 泛指上部有寒、下部有热的证候。

V005-N00751.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00751.label: 上寒下热

V005-N00751.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00751.label: 上寒下热
V005-N00751.englishNames: upper body cold and lower body heat
V005-N00751.definition: a complex condition characterized by the simultaneous presence of cold in the upper body and heat in the lower body, the same as cold above and heat below

V005-N00752.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00752.label: 上热下寒
V005-N00752.aliases: Syndrome Of Upper Heat And Lower Cold
V005-N00752.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒热错杂
V005-N00752.definition: 泛指上部有热、下部有寒的证候。

V005-N00752.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00752.label: 上热下寒

V005-N00752.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00752.label: 上热下寒
V005-N00752.englishNames: upper body heat and lower body cold
V005-N00752.definition: a complex condition characterized by the simultaneous presence of heat in the upper body and cold in the lower body, the same as heat above and cold below

V005-N00753.label: 寒热真假
V005-N00753.englishNames: truefalse of cold and heat; true or false cold and heat
V005-N00753.definition: 由于阴阳格拒而致与疾病本质相反的寒热表现，包括真寒假热、真热假寒等。

V005-N00753.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00753.label: 寒热真假
V005-N00753.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N00753.definition: Refers to how extreme cold or heat may cause false symptoms in critical conditions, such as extreme cold manifesting as heat or extreme heat manifesting as cold.

V005-N00754.label: 真热假寒
V005-N00754.englishNames: true heat with false cold; true heat disease with false cold manifestation
V005-N00754.definition: 内热炽盛而外见寒象的病理变化。

V005-N00754.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00754.label: 真热假寒
V005-N00754.englishNames: syndrome of true heat disease with false cold manifestation
V005-N00754.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V005-N00754.definition: 内有真热而外见某些假寒的危重证候，多因里热炽盛，阳气郁闭于内而不能达外，则外见四肢厥冷，而且热越盛肢厥越重，即所谓“热深厥亦深”，又称阳盛格阴证。

V005-N00754.label: 热极生寒
V005-N00754.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调｜寒热错杂
V005-N00754.definition: 根据阴阳转化的观点，认为阳热的病证在一定条件下会转化为阴寒的病证，有如夏热转变为秋凉冬寒。一般由热转寒多因正气耗伤，属病情逆转。

V005-N00754.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00754.label: 真热假寒
V005-N00754.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N00754.definition: A yang pattern with apparent yin symptoms. These include aversion to cold but no desire for more clothes or blanket; cold hands and feet but a burning sensation in the chest and abdomen; and watery diarrhoea with dry or strong-smelling stools. The pulse is deep but wiry, slippery and forceful upon pressure. In addition, excessive thirst, a dry mouth, a foul breath, a dry, white tongue coating, and yellow urine may be present. Often occurs when pathogenic factors enter the interior to transform into heat and causes yang excess to reject yin.

V005-N00754.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00754.label: 真热假寒
V005-N00754.englishNames: true heat with false cold; true heat disease with false cold manifestation

V005-N00754.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00754.label: 真热假寒
V005-N00754.definition: a pathological change marked by excessive heat in the interior with pseudo-cold manifestations

V005-N00755.label: 真寒假热
V005-N00755.englishNames: true cold with false heat; true cold disease with false heat manifestation
V005-N00755.definition: 阴寒内盛而外见热象的病理变化。

V005-N00755.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00755.label: 真寒假热
V005-N00755.aliases: 阴盛格阳； Real Cold Pseudo Heat
V005-N00755.englishNames: syndrome of true cold disease with false heat manifestation
V005-N00755.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V005-N00755.definition: 泛指阴寒内盛，格阳于外，以既有手足厥冷、小便清长、大便清冷、舌淡苔白等真寒症状，又有身热反欲衣被、面色浮红、口渴欲热饮等假热表现的证候。

V005-N00755.label: 寒极生热
V005-N00755.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调｜寒热错杂
V005-N00755.definition: 指寒证发展到寒极阶段，格阳于外，虚火浮动，出现阴盛格阳的假热现象。

V005-N00755.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00755.label: 真寒假热
V005-N00755.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N00755.definition: A yin pattern with apparent yang symptoms. These include fever but prefer more clothes or blanket; thirst but no desire to drink water; and restless hands and feet but mental tranquillity. The tongue coating is black but slippery and moist. The pulse is large and surging, but weak upon pressure. It is commonly seen in people with constitutional deficiency cold coupled with contraction of external pathogens or floating of deficiency yang (interior cold rejecting yang) due to over-exertion or dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs.

V005-N00755.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00755.label: 真寒假热
V005-N00755.englishNames: true cold with false heat; true cold disease with false heat manifestation

V005-N00755.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00755.label: 真寒假热
V005-N00755.definition: a pathological change marked by abundant yin-cold in the interior with pseudo-heat manifestations

V005-N00756.label: 表里病机
V005-N00756.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机
V005-N00756.definition: 指病邪侵入人体而致病位浅深和病势轻重的机制。包括表里寒热、表里虚实和表里同病等。

V005-N00758.label: 表寒
V005-N00758.definition: 风寒之邪侵袭肌肤，束于卫表，尚未入里的病理变化。

V005-N00758.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00758.label: 风寒束表
V005-N00758.aliases: 表寒； 表实寒； 风寒表证； 寒邪束表
V005-N00758.englishNames: Syndrome of Exterior Tightened by Wind Cold
V005-N00758.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候｜表证
V005-N00758.definition: 风寒之邪侵袭肤表，腠理闭塞，以恶寒甚，或有发热、无汗、头身疼痛，或鼻塞流清涕、气喘、苔薄白、脉浮紧等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00758.label: 表寒
V005-N00758.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜表里病机｜表的病机
V005-N00758.definition: 指风寒之邪侵袭肌肤，束于卫表，尚未入里的病理变化。

V005-N00758.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00758.label: 表寒

V005-N00758.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00758.label: 表寒
V005-N00758.definition: attack on the exterior part of the body by windcold, chiefly manifested by severe aversion to wind and cold, headache and stiff neck, soreness of the limbs and joints, thin white coating of the tongue and floating tense pulse

V005-N00759.label: 表热
V005-N00759.definition: 温热邪气侵袭肌表，伤及卫分，尚未入里的病理变化。

V005-N00759.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00759.label: 风热犯表
V005-N00759.aliases: 表热； 风热表证； 风热犯卫； 风热袭表
V005-N00759.englishNames: Syndrome of Exterior Attacked by Wind Heat
V005-N00759.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候｜表证
V005-N00759.definition: 风热之邪侵袭肤表，以发热、微恶风寒、少汗、全身不适、头痛、口微渴，或有咽痛、舌边尖红、苔薄黄、脉浮数等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00759.label: 表热
V005-N00759.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜表里病机｜表的病机
V005-N00759.definition: 指温热邪气侵袭肌表，伤及卫分，尚未入里的病理变化。

V005-N00759.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00759.label: 表热

V005-N00759.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00759.label: 表热
V005-N00759.definition: attack on the exterior part of the body by wind-heat, chiefly manifested by slight aversion to wind and cold, moderate fever, headache, slight thirst, thin white or thin yellowish coating of the tongue, or red tip of the tongue and floating rapid puls

V005-N00760.label: 里寒
V005-N00760.definition: 脏腑阴寒偏胜或阳气衰微的病理变化。

V005-N00760.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00760.label: 里寒
V005-N00760.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候｜里证
V005-N00760.definition: 脏腑阳气不足，阴寒内生，或寒邪直中脏腑，或寒邪由表传里，以形寒肢冷、面色苍白、口淡不渴、喜热饮、小便清长、大便溏泻、舌淡苔白润、脉沉迟等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00760.label: 里寒
V005-N00760.aliases: 寒邪内侵； 寒邪内阻
V005-N00760.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜表里病机｜里的病机
V005-N00760.definition: 指脏腑阴寒偏胜或阳气衰微的病理变化。

V005-N00760.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00760.label: 里寒

V005-N00760.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00760.label: 里寒
V005-N00760.definition: a pathological state characterized by preponderance of yin cold or decline of yang qi in the interior

V005-N00761.label: 里热
V005-N00761.definition: 脏腑阳热亢盛或阴虚内热的病理变化。

V005-N00761.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00761.label: 里热
V005-N00761.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候｜里证
V005-N00761.definition: 热邪内传，脏腑、气血积热，以身热汗多、口渴引饮、心烦口苦、小便短赤、舌红苔黄、脉洪数或弦数等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00761.label: 里热
V005-N00761.aliases: 里热炽盛； 里热内结
V005-N00761.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜表里病机｜里的病机
V005-N00761.definition: 指脏腑阳热亢盛或阴虚内热的病理变化。

V005-N00761.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00761.label: 里热

V005-N00761.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00761.label: 里热
V005-N00761.definition: a pathological state characterized by heat in the interior, either due to exuberance of pathogenic heat or due to yin deficiency with endogenous heat

V005-N00763.label: 表实
V005-N00763.definition: 外邪侵入肌表，邪正相争，腠理闭塞的病理变化。

V005-N00763.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00763.label: 表实

V005-N00763.definition: 风寒之邪侵袭肌表，卫气郁遏，腠理闭塞，以发热恶寒、无汗、头痛、身体疼痛、脉浮紧为常见症的证候。

V005-N00763.label: 表实
V005-N00763.aliases: 腠理闭塞； 肌表闭伏
V005-N00763.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜表里病机｜表的病机
V005-N00763.definition: 指外邪侵入肌表，邪正相争，腠理闭塞的病理变化。

V005-N00763.label: 表实
V005-N00763.englishNames: Exterior Syndrome of Excess; exterior repletion

V005-N00763.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00763.label: 表实

V005-N00763.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00763.label: 表实
V005-N00763.definition: invasion of external pathogens that causes gathering of defense qi in the skin and flesh and blockage of the interstices and pores marked by absence of sweating, chills and a floating forceful pulse

V005-N00764.label: 表虚
V005-N00764.definition: 卫气虚而感受外邪的病理变化。

V005-N00764.label: 风袭表疏
V005-N00764.aliases: 表虚； Syndrome of Exterior Deficiency Attacked by Wind

V005-N00764.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候｜表证
V005-N00764.definition: 风邪侵袭肤表，腠理不固，以发热，恶风，头痛，自汗出，或鼻鸣干呕，舌淡红，苔薄白，脉浮缓等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00764.label: 表虚
V005-N00764.aliases: 腠理不固； 腠理疏松； 卫表不固

V005-N00764.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00764.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00764.label: 表虚
V005-N00764.definition: deficiency of defense qi in the superficial part of the body, marked by spontaneous sweating or sweating accompanied by aversion to wind and floating feeble pulse

V005-N00765.label: 里实
V005-N00765.definition: 指外邪入里化热，结于胃肠而阳明腑实，或体内寒凝、气滞、血瘀、食滞、虫积、停痰、留饮等，邪盛而正未虚的病理变化。

V005-N00765.label: 里实
V005-N00765.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候｜里证
V005-N00765.definition: 外邪侵犯人体，或是脏腑机能失调，导致痰饮、水湿、积气、瘀血、宿食、燥屎、脓、虫、砂石等有形之物停积体内，导致邪气盛实的证候。

V005-N00765.label: 里实
V005-N00765.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜表里病机｜里的病机
V005-N00765.definition: 指外邪入里化热，结于胃肠而阳明腑实，或体内寒凝、气滞、血瘀、食滞、虫积、停痰、留饮等，邪盛而正未虚的病理变化。

V005-N00765.label: 里实
V005-N00765.definition: (1) a pathological change resulting from an external pathogen transforming into heat and entering the interior to bind in the stomach and intestines; (2) a general term denoting accumulation of pathological products in the body, such as phlegm, retain

V005-N00766.label: 里虚
V005-N00766.definition: 脏腑气血阴阳亏虚，机能减退的病理变化。

V005-N00767.definition: 在表的病变未解，在里的病变又起，同时并存的病理变化。

V005-N00767.definition: 表证里证同时存在。多因表证未解而病邪入里，或病者素有宿疾又新感表邪所致。有表寒里热证、表热里寒证、表虚里实证、表实里虚证之分。亦指表里出现同一性质的证候。如表里俱寒证、表里俱热证、表里俱虚证、表里俱实证等。

V005-N00767.label: 表里同病
V005-N00767.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候

V005-N00767.definition: The coexistence of exterior pattern and interior pattern. Often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors enter the interior before exterior pattern is resolved. Alternatively, it may occur when biao (branch) is affected before the ben (root) disorders are resolved.

V005-N00776.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00776.label: 气血不和
V005-N00776.aliases: 气血失调； Syndrome of Qi Blood Disharmony
V005-N00776.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气血津液兼证｜气血同病
V005-N00776.definition: 气血相互为用的功能失调。气属于阳，血属于阴，两者之间的关系，犹如阴阳相随、相互依存、相互为用。气对于血，具有推动、温煦、化生、统摄的作用；血对于气，则具有濡养和运载等作用。气的虚衰和升降出入异常，必然影响及血，血的虚衰和血的运行失常时，也必然影响及气。

V005-N00777.label: 气失调
V005-N00777.aliases: 气机不畅； 气机不利； 气机失常； 气机失调； 气机紊乱

V005-N00777.definition: 指气的生成、运行失常而引起的气滞、气逆、气陷、气闭、气脱等病理变化。

V005-N00778.label: 气虚
V005-N00778.definition: 由劳倦内伤或重病、久病后元气不足，脏腑组织功能低下，抗病力减弱的病理变化。

V005-N00778.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00778.label: 气虚
V005-N00778.aliases: 气虚毒滞； 气虚发热； 气虚寒凝； 气虚气滞； 气虚湿困； 气虚水停； Qi Deficiency
V005-N00778.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V005-N00778.definition: 元气不足，脏腑机能衰退，以气短乏力、神疲懒言、自汗、舌淡、脉虚等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00778.label: 气虚
V005-N00778.aliases: 气不足； 气虚不升； 气虚推运无力； 气虚无力升举； 清阳不升； 体虚； 虚弱； 元气不足； 正气不足； 正气大伤； 正气亏损； 正气亏虚； 正气内虚； 正气虚； 正气虚弱； 正气虚损； 正虚
V005-N00778.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调
V005-N00778.definition: 指一身之气不足及其功能低下的病理状态。

V005-N00778.label: 气虚
V005-N00778.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜虚劳

V005-N00778.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00778.label: 气虚
V005-N00778.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00778.definition: A pathological state of decreased zang–fu functions or body weakness due to deficiency of qi.

V005-N00778.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00778.label: 气虚

V005-N00778.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00778.label: 气虚
V005-N00778.definition: a general term for deficiency of qi that leads to decreased visceral functions and lowered body resistance

V005-N00779.label: 气虚中满
V005-N00779.englishNames: qi deficiency with fullness in the middle; qi deficiency with abdominal fullness; abdominal fullness with qi deficiency; flatulence caused by qi deficiency
V005-N00779.definition: 因气虚，运化失职，导致脘腹胀满的病理变化。

V005-N00779.label: 气虚中满
V005-N00779.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调｜气虚
V005-N00779.definition: 指因气虚，运化失职，导致脘腹胀满的病理变化。

V005-N00779.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00779.label: 气虚中满
V005-N00779.englishNames: qi deficiency with abdominal fullness; abdominal fullness with qi deficiency; flatulence caused by qi deficiency

V005-N00779.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00779.label: 气虚中满
V005-N00779.englishNames: qi deficiency with fullness in the middle
V005-N00779.definition: a pathological change of qi deficiency in which qi is insufficient for normal transportation and transformation in the middle energizer, thus causing epigastric and abdominal distension

V005-N00780.label: 劳则气耗
V005-N00780.definition: 疲劳过度，导致精气耗损的病理变化。

V005-N00780.label: 劳则气耗
V005-N00780.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调｜气虚
V005-N00780.definition: 指疲劳过度，导致精气耗损的病理变化。

V005-N00780.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00780.label: 劳则气耗

V005-N00783.label: 气逆
V005-N00783.englishNames: qi counterflow; reversed flow of qi
V005-N00783.definition: 气机升降出入反常，应降不降，气机上逆，或横逆的病理变化。

V005-N00783.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00783.label: 气逆
V005-N00783.englishNames: Syndrome of Reversed Flow of qi
V005-N00783.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V005-N00783.definition: 泛指气机逆乱向上，以咳嗽气喘，或恶心、呕吐、呃逆、嗳气，或觉气从少腹上冲胸咽，胸胁胀闷，头胀眩晕等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00783.label: 气逆
V005-N00783.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调
V005-N00783.definition: 指气升之太过，或降之不及，以脏腑之气逆上为特征的一种病理状态。

V005-N00783.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00783.label: 气逆
V005-N00783.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜病理声音情况｜呼吸声

V005-N00783.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00783.label: 气逆
V005-N00783.englishNames: qi counterflow; reversed flow of qi; Qi counterflow
V005-N00783.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00783.definition: A pathological state of reversed upflow of qi. Either excessive upward flow of qi or inhibited downward flow of qi.

V005-N00783.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00783.label: 气逆
V005-N00783.definition: reversal of the normal downward flow of qi, the same as qi reflux

V005-N00784.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00784.label: 气陷
V005-N00784.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V005-N00784.definition: 气虚无力升举，应升反降，以头晕眼花，少气倦怠，脘腹坠胀，脱肛，内脏、子宫下垂，舌淡苔白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00784.label: 气陷
V005-N00784.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调
V005-N00784.definition: 指气的上升不足或下降太过，以气虚升举无力而下陷为特征的一种病理状态。

V005-N00784.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00784.label: 气陷
V005-N00784.englishNames: Qi sinking; qi sinking; qi fall
V005-N00784.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00784.definition: A pathological state in which qi fails to lift or hold but flows downward.

V005-N00784.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00784.label: 气陷

V005-N00784.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00784.label: 气陷
V005-N00784.definition: a pathological change of deficient qi marked by failure in its lifting or holding function, also known as qi sinking

V005-N00785.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00785.label: 脾气下陷
V005-N00785.aliases: 脾虚气陷； 中气下陷； Sinking of Qi due to Spleen Deficiency
V005-N00785.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜脾系证候｜脾虚
V005-N00785.definition: 脾气虚弱，中气下陷，以脘腹重坠作胀、食后益甚，或便意频数，肛门重坠，或脱肛、阴挺，或小便混浊，或久泄不止，或崩漏、胎漏，神疲乏力、食少、腹胀、便溏、眩晕、舌淡、脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00785.label: 中气下陷
V005-N00785.aliases: 脾气下陷； 脾虚气陷； 气虚下陷； 下陷
V005-N00785.englishNames: Sinking of Qi of Middle-JIAO; Visceroptosis with Hyposplenic Qi
V005-N00785.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调｜气陷
V005-N00785.definition: 指脾气虚损，升举无力，气机趋下，内脏位置维系无力，而发生某些内脏的位置下移，形成胃下垂、肾下垂、子宫脱垂、脱肛等病变。

V005-N00785.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00785.label: 中气下陷

V005-N00786.label: 气失调
V005-N00786.aliases: 气机不畅； 气机不利； 气机失常； 气机失调； 气机紊乱
V005-N00786.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机
V005-N00786.definition: 指气的生成、运行失常而引起的气滞、气逆、气陷、气闭、气脱等病理变化。

V005-N00787.label: 气郁
V005-N00787.definition: 气郁结而不得疏泄发散的病理变化。

V005-N00787.label: 气郁
V005-N00787.aliases: 气机郁闭； 气机郁结； 气机郁滞； 气收
V005-N00787.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调
V005-N00787.definition: 指气郁结而不得疏泄发散的病理变化。

V005-N00787.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00787.definition: Stagnant movement of qi. It is often associated with emotions and disorder of qi and blood. Often refers to liver qi stagnation.

V005-N00787.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00787.label: 气郁

V005-N00787.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V005-N00787.definition: depressed and stagnant flow of qi that causes dysfunction of internal organs and meridians/ channels, the same as qi stagnation

V005-N00788.englishNames: transformation of qi depression into fire; stagnant qi transforming into fire; qi depression transforming into fire
V005-N00788.definition: 气郁日久，化生火热而气火并存的病理变化。

V005-N00788.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00788.label: 气郁化火
V005-N00788.aliases: 气郁化热； 气滞化火； 气滞化热； Qi Depression Transforming into Fire
V005-N00788.englishNames: Syndrome of Qi Depression Transforming into Fire
V005-N00788.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V005-N00788.definition: 气机阻滞，日久化火，以情绪抑郁，烦躁易怒，胸胁胀闷、灼痛，口苦口干，舌红苔黄，脉弦数等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00788.label: 气郁化火
V005-N00788.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调｜气郁
V005-N00788.definition: 指气郁日久，化生火热而气火并存的病理变化。

V005-N00788.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00788.label: 气郁化火
V005-N00788.englishNames: transformation of qi depression into fire; stagnant qi transforming into fire; Qi stagnation transforming into fire; qi depression transforming into fire
V005-N00788.pinyinNames: qì yù huà huǒ; qi yu hua huo
V005-N00788.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00788.definition: A pathological state of prolonged qi stagnation transforming into fire heat.

V005-N00788.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00788.label: 气郁化火
V005-N00788.englishNames: transformation of qi depression into fire; qi depression transforming into fire

V005-N00788.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00788.label: 气郁化火
V005-N00788.definition: a pathological change of long-standing stagnation of qi that transforms into fire

V005-N00789.label: 气滞
V005-N00789.definition: 气运行不畅而停滞的病理变化。

V005-N00789.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00789.label: 气滞
V005-N00789.aliases: 气机郁结； 气机阻滞； 气滞热壅； 气滞水停； 气滞痰凝； 少腹气滞； Qi Stagnation

V005-N00789.definition: 某些脏腑或局部气机阻滞，以胸胁脘腹胀闷疼痛，时轻时重，走窜不定，胀痛常随太息、嗳气、肠鸣、矢气而减，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00789.label: 气滞
V005-N00789.aliases: 气机阻塞； 气机阻滞； 阻滞气机
V005-N00789.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调

V005-N00789.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00789.label: 气滞
V005-N00789.englishNames: qi stagnation; Qi impediment; qi stegnation
V005-N00789.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00789.definition: A pathological state in which the movement of qi is inhibited.

V005-N00789.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00789.label: 气滞

V005-N00789.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00789.label: 气滞
V005-N00789.definition: a pathological change characterized by impeded circulation of qi that leads to stagnation of qi movement and functional disorder of organs, manifested as distention or pain in the affected part

V005-N00790.label: 血失调
V005-N00790.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机
V005-N00790.definition: 指血液生成、运行以及生理功能异常的病理变化。

V005-N00791.label: 血虚
V005-N00791.definition: 血液亏虚，血的营养和滋润功能减退，以致脏腑百脉、形体器官失养的病理变化。

V005-N00791.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00791.label: 血虚
V005-N00791.aliases: 肌肤失养； 血虚动风； 血虚风袭； 血虚风燥； 血虚寒凝； Syndrome of Blood Deficiency
V005-N00791.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V005-N00791.definition: 血液亏虚，脏腑、经络、形体失养，以面色淡白或萎黄，唇舌爪甲色淡，头晕眼花，心悸多梦，手足发麻，妇女月经量少、色淡、后期或经闭，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00791.label: 血虚
V005-N00791.aliases: 耗血伤阴； 生血不足； 亡血； 血亏； 血亏失濡； 血脉空虚； 血虚不润； 血虚失养； 血液亏少； 血液亏虚； 阴血不足； 阴血亏损； 阴血亏虚； 阴血虚； 营血亏虚
V005-N00791.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调

V005-N00791.label: 血虚
V005-N00791.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜虚劳

V005-N00791.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00791.label: 血虚
V005-N00791.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00791.definition: A pathological state in which deficient blood fails to nourish the zang–fu organs and meridians/channels.

V005-N00791.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00791.label: 血虚

V005-N00791.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00791.label: 血虚
V005-N00791.definition: any pathological change characterized by deficiency of blood which fails to nourish organs, tissues and meridians/channels

V005-N00792.label: 血瘀
V005-N00792.definition: 由于气滞、气虚、血虚、外伤、阴寒内盛等各种原因，导致血液郁滞于一定部位的病理变化。

V005-N00792.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00792.label: 血瘀
V005-N00792.aliases: 少腹血瘀； 少腹瘀热； 少腹瘀滞； 血瘀动血； 血瘀风燥； 血瘀化热； 血瘀水停； 瘀血内阻； 瘀血阻隔； 瘀血阻滞； 瘀滞肌肤； 瘀阻胞宫； 瘀阻精室； 瘀阻胸胁； Syndrome of Blood Stasis
V005-N00792.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V005-N00792.definition: 瘀血内阻，血行不畅，以局部出现青紫肿块、疼痛拒按，或腹内癥块、刺痛不移、拒按，或出血紫暗成块、舌紫或有斑点，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00792.aliases: 脉阻络痹； 血脉瘀滞； 血菀； 血行受阻； 血行瘀滞； 血行瘀阻； 淤血阻滞； 瘀血痹阻； 瘀血结聚； 瘀血内结； 瘀血内阻； 瘀血凝滞； 瘀血停滞； 瘀血阻于； 瘀血阻滞； 瘀阻
V005-N00792.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调

V005-N00792.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00792.label: 血瘀
V005-N00792.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00792.definition: A pathological state of slow, coagulated or stagnant circulation of blood.

V005-N00792.label: 血瘀

V005-N00792.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00792.label: 血瘀
V005-N00792.definition: a morbid state of blood stagnancy in a certain area of the body caused by sluggish flow of qi, deficiency of qi or blood, trauma, or yin-cold

V005-N00793.label: 血寒
V005-N00793.definition: 外感寒邪，寒入血分，或阳虚不能温煦血脉，而使血行凝涩不畅的病理变化。

V005-N00793.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00793.label: 血寒
V005-N00793.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V005-N00793.definition: 寒邪客于血脉，凝滞气机，血行不畅，以恶寒，肢体麻木、冷痛，手足清冷，得热痛减，唇舌青紫，妇女月经后期、痛经、经色紫暗夹块，苔白滑，脉沉迟涩等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00793.label: 血寒
V005-N00793.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调
V005-N00793.definition: 指血脉受寒，血流滞缓，乃至停止不行的病理状态。

V005-N00793.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00793.label: 血寒
V005-N00793.englishNames: Blood cold; blood cold; cold in blood
V005-N00793.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00793.definition: A pathological state in which cold enters the blood phase and causes the blood to stagnate or coagulate.

V005-N00793.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00793.label: 血寒

V005-N00793.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00793.label: 血寒
V005-N00793.definition: a pathological change in which cold either externally contracted or originated from yang deficiency, entering the blood aspect, causes qi stagnation or blood stasis by its congealing effect

V005-N00794.label: 血热
V005-N00794.definition: 外感热邪，热入血分，血受热邪所迫而妄行，导致出血、发癍等的病理变化。

V005-N00794.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00794.label: 血热
V005-N00794.aliases: 血热（中医）； Syndrome of Blood Heat
V005-N00794.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V005-N00794.definition: 是指血分有热、血行加速的病理状态。血热多由于邪热入血所致，也可由于情志郁结、五志过极化火而导致血热。

V005-N00794.label: 血热
V005-N00794.aliases: 热邪深入血分； 热与血结； 血分热； 血分热盛； 血积热； 血热风燥； 血热内扰
V005-N00794.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调
V005-N00794.definition: 指热入血脉之中，使血行加速，脉络扩张，或迫血妄行而致出血的病理状态。

V005-N00794.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00794.label: 血热
V005-N00794.englishNames: blood heat; heat in blood; Blood heat
V005-N00794.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00794.definition: A pathological state in which heat enters the blood phase and causes the blood to move recklessly.

V005-N00794.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00794.label: 血热
V005-N00794.definition: a pathological change in which exuberant heat or fire enters the blood, usually causing hemorrhage

V005-N00796.label: 血不归经
V005-N00796.aliases: 血不循经； 血溢脉外
V005-N00796.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调
V005-N00796.definition: 指血液妄行于脉外而出血的病理变化。

V005-N00796.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00796.label: 血不归经
V005-N00796.englishNames: Blood failing to flow within the vessels; blood flow outside channels; blood failing to stay in the meridians
V005-N00796.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00796.definition: A pathological state in which blood moves recklessly out of the vessels.

V005-N00796.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00796.label: 血不归经
V005-N00796.englishNames: blood failing to stay in the meridians
V005-N00796.definition: a pathological change that causes extravasation of blood

V005-N00797.label: 血不养筋
V005-N00797.englishNames: Failure of Blood to Nourish Tendons
V005-N00797.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调
V005-N00797.definition: 指肝血不足，筋失濡养而致筋脉拘急的病理变化。

V005-N00797.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00797.label: 血不养筋
V005-N00797.englishNames: Blood failing to nourish the sinews; failure of blood to nourish tendons
V005-N00797.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00797.definition: A pathological state in which liver blood fails to nourish the sinews and causes muscle/tendon spasm.

V005-N00798.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00798.label: 气血两虚
V005-N00798.aliases: 气血两虚动风； Qi Blood Deficiency
V005-N00798.englishNames: Syndrome of Deficiency of both Qi and Blood
V005-N00798.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气血津液兼证｜气血同病
V005-N00798.definition: 气血亏虚，形体失养，以神疲乏力、气短懒言、面色淡白或萎黄、头晕目眩、唇甲色淡、心悸失眠、舌淡脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00798.label: 气血两虚
V005-N00798.aliases: 气弱血亏； 气虚运血无力； 气血不续； 气血不足； 气血二亏； 气血惧虚； 气血亏损； 气血亏虚； 气血两亏； 气血虚极； 气血虚弱； 血虚俱虚； 血虚气脱
V005-N00798.englishNames: Dificiency of both Qi and Blood
V005-N00798.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气血失调
V005-N00798.definition: 指气虚和血虚同时存在的病理状态。

V005-N00798.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00798.label: 气血两虚
V005-N00798.englishNames: Dual deficiency of qi and blood; deficiency of both qi and blood; dual deficiency of qi and blood
V005-N00798.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00798.definition: A pathological state of malnourishment of the body or weakened bodily function due to simultaneous presence of qi deficiency and blood deficiency.

V005-N00798.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00798.label: 气血两虚
V005-N00798.englishNames: dual deficiency of qi and blood
V005-N00798.definition: simultaneous presence of qi deficiency and blood deficiency

V005-N00799.label: 气滞血瘀
V005-N00799.englishNames: qi stagntion and blood stasis; qi stagnation and blood stasis; blood stasis due to qi stagnation; stagnation of qi and blood stasis
V005-N00799.definition: 气机运行不畅，以致血液运行障碍，形成气滞与血瘀并存的病理变化。

V005-N00799.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00799.label: 血瘀气滞
V005-N00799.aliases: 气滞血瘀； 瘀滞； Syndrome of Blood Stasis and Stagnant Qi
V005-N00799.englishNames: Syndrome of Blood Stasis and Qi Stagnation
V005-N00799.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气血津液兼证｜气血同病
V005-N00799.definition: 瘀血内阻，气机郁滞，以腹内癥块、刺痛或胀痛、拒按，或局部青紫肿胀、疼痛，舌紫或有斑点，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00799.label: 气滞血瘀
V005-N00799.aliases: 气血闭阻； 气血不畅； 气血壅聚； 气血壅滞； 气血瘀结； 气血瘀滞； 气血瘀阻； 气血郁滞； 气血阻痹； 气滞而血行不畅； 气滞血淤； 血瘀气滞
V005-N00799.englishNames: Qi Stagnation Blood Stasis; Stagnation of Qi and Blood Stasis
V005-N00799.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调｜气滞
V005-N00799.definition: 指因气的运行郁滞不畅，导致血液运行障碍，出现血瘀的病理状态。

V005-N00799.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00799.label: 气滞血瘀
V005-N00799.englishNames: qi stagntion and blood stasis; qi stagnation and blood stasis; blood stasis due to qi stagnation; Blood stasis due to qi stagnation; stagnation of qi and blood stasis
V005-N00799.pinyinNames: qi zhi xue yu; qì zhì xuè yū
V005-N00799.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00799.definition: A pathological state in which stagnant qi affects the circulation of blood and causes simultaneous presence of qi stagnation and blood stasis.

V005-N00799.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00799.label: 气滞血瘀
V005-N00799.englishNames: qi stagnation and blood stasis; qi stagntion and blood stasis; stagnation of qi and blood stasis

V005-N00799.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00799.label: 气滞血瘀
V005-N00799.englishNames: blood stasis due to qi stagnation
V005-N00799.definition: a pathological change in which a long-standing or severe stagnation of qi impedes the flow of blood, a condition characterized by coexistence of qi stagnation and blood stasis

V005-N00800.label: 气虚血瘀
V005-N00800.englishNames: qi deficiency with blood stasis; qi deficiency and blood stasis; blood stasis due to qi deficiency
V005-N00800.definition: 气虚推动无力而导致血瘀，形成气虚与血瘀并存的病理变化。

V005-N00800.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00800.label: 气虚血瘀
V005-N00800.aliases: 气虚血凝； Syndrom of Qi Deficiency Blood Stasis
V005-N00800.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气血津液兼证｜气血同病
V005-N00800.definition: 气虚运血无力，血行瘀滞，以面淡而晦暗、身倦乏力、少气懒言、疼痛如刺、痛处不移、舌质淡紫、或有紫斑、脉沉涩等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00800.label: 气虚血瘀
V005-N00800.englishNames: Blood Stasis due to Qi Deficiency
V005-N00800.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调｜气虚
V005-N00800.definition: 指因气对血的推动无力而致血行不畅，甚至瘀阻不行的病理状态。

V005-N00800.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00800.label: 气虚血瘀
V005-N00800.englishNames: Blood stasis due to qi deficiency; qi deficiency with blood stasis; qi deficiency and blood stasis; blood stasis due to qi deficiency
V005-N00800.pinyinNames: qì xū xuè yū; qi xu xue yu
V005-N00800.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00800.definition: A pathological state in which qi fails to promote the circulation of blood and causes blood stasis, resulting in simultaneous presence of qi deficiency and blood stasis.

V005-N00800.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00800.label: 气虚血瘀
V005-N00800.englishNames: qi deficiency and blood stasis; blood stasis due to qi deficiency

V005-N00800.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00800.label: 气虚血瘀
V005-N00800.definition: a pathological change of qi deficiency in which qi is insufficient to maintain blood flow, thus resulting in blood stasis

V005-N00801.label: 气不摄血
V005-N00801.englishNames: failure of qi to control blood; qi failing to control blood
V005-N00801.definition: 由于气虚不足，统摄血液功能减退，以致血不循经，逸出脉外，从而导致各种失血的病理变化。

V005-N00801.label: 气虚不摄
V005-N00801.englishNames: failure of keeping fluid due to qo defocoemcu; qi deficiency failing to control; qi deficiency failing to control blood
V005-N00801.definition: 气虚固摄无力，致使体内的各种液态物质易于丢失的病理变化。

V005-N00801.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00801.label: 气不摄血
V005-N00801.aliases: 气不统血； Qi Deficiency Caused Bleeding
V005-N00801.englishNames: Syndrome of Qi Failing to Control Blood
V005-N00801.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气血津液兼证｜气血同病
V005-N00801.definition: 气虚不能统摄血液，以便血、肌衄、齿衄、妇女崩漏、月经量多、神疲乏力、气短懒言、面色无华、舌淡脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V005-N00801.label: 气不摄血
V005-N00801.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气血失调
V005-N00801.definition: 指因气虚不足，统摄血液的生理功能减弱，血不循经，逸出脉外而致各种出血的病理状态。

V005-N00801.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00801.label: 气不摄血
V005-N00801.englishNames: Qi failing to contain blood; failure of qi to control blood; qi failing to control blood
V005-N00801.pinyinNames: qì bú shè xuè; qi bu she xue
V005-N00801.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00801.definition: A pathological state in which qi fails to contain blood and allows the blood to flow out of the vessels.

V005-N00801.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00801.label: 气不摄血
V005-N00801.englishNames: failure of qi to control blood; qi failing to control blood

V005-N00801.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00801.label: 气虚不摄
V005-N00801.englishNames: qi deficiency failing to control blood
V005-N00801.definition: a pathological change of qi deficiency in which qi is unable to retain the fluids (including blood)

V005-N00802.label: 气随血脱
V005-N00802.englishNames: qi prostration following blood loss; qi collapse following blood loss; qi desertion due to blood depletion; qi collapse following bleeding
V005-N00802.definition: 急性大出血时，气随血液的突然大量流失而脱散的危重病理变化。

V005-N00802.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00802.label: 气随血脱
V005-N00802.aliases: Syndrome of Hemorrhage Caused Qi Exhaustion
V005-N00802.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气血津液兼证｜气血同病
V005-N00802.definition: 因大量出血，气无所附而随之暴脱，以面色苍白、四肢厥冷、大汗淋漓、气息微弱、甚至昏厥、脉微欲绝、或虚大无力等为常见症的危重证候。

V005-N00802.label: 气随血脱
V005-N00802.aliases: 气血欲脱； 血脱气脱
V005-N00802.englishNames: Qi Desertion due to Blood Depletion
V005-N00802.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气血失调
V005-N00802.definition: 指在大量出血的同时，气也随着血液的流失而急剧散脱，从而 形成气血并脱的病理状态。

V005-N00802.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00802.label: 气随血脱
V005-N00802.englishNames: qi prostration following blood loss; Qi collapse following heavy blood loss; qi collapse following blood loss; qi desertion due to blood depletion; qi collapse following bleeding
V005-N00802.pinyinNames: qì suí xuè tuō; qi sui xue tuo
V005-N00802.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00802.definition: A critical state in which massive blood loss causes sudden collapse of qi.

V005-N00802.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00802.label: 气随血脱
V005-N00802.englishNames: qi prostration following blood loss; qi collapse following blood loss; qi desertion due to blood depletion

V005-N00802.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00802.label: 气随血脱
V005-N00802.definition: a pathological change in which massive loss of blood leads to collapse of qi

V005-N00803.label: 血随气逆
V005-N00803.englishNames: bleeding due to qi reversed flow; blood flowing counterflow with qi; bleeding following qi counterflow
V005-N00803.definition: 血随气逆而上冲，甚则动血而吐血，或变闭清窍而昏厥的病理变化。

V005-N00803.label: 血随气逆
V005-N00803.aliases: 气血逆乱； 气血上逆
V005-N00803.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气血失调
V005-N00803.definition: 指因气机上逆使血亦随之上冲而致呕血或清窍闭塞的病理变化。

V005-N00803.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00803.label: 血随气逆
V005-N00803.englishNames: bleeding due to qi reversed flow; blood flowing counterflow with qi; bleeding following qi counterflow; Blood counterflow with qi
V005-N00803.pinyinNames: xuè suí qì nì; xue sui qi ni
V005-N00803.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00803.definition: A pathological state in which upward adverse flow of qi leads to blood rushing upward and results in haematemesis, haemoptysis or stroke.

V005-N00803.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00803.label: 血随气逆
V005-N00803.englishNames: bleeding following qi counterflow; bleeding due to qi reversed flow

V005-N00803.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00803.label: 血随气逆
V005-N00803.definition: a pathological change in which the upward adverse flow of qi leads blood rushing upward

V005-N00804.label: 气病及血
V005-N00804.englishNames: qi disease affecting the blood; qi disease involving blood
V005-N00804.definition: 先发气病，然后累及于血的传变趋势。

V005-N00804.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00804.label: 气病及血
V005-N00804.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类

V005-N00804.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00804.label: 气病及血
V005-N00804.definition: a pathological change in which diseased conditions of qi tend to induce blood disorders

V005-N00805.label: 血病及气
V005-N00805.definition: 先发血病，然后累及于气的传变趋势。

V005-N00806.label: 伤津
V005-N00806.englishNames: impairment of fluid; damage to fluid
V005-N00806.definition: 由于高热、汗出过多，或感受燥邪而导致的肺、胃津液损伤的病理变化。

V005-N00806.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V005-N00806.label: 伤津
V005-N00806.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜津液亏虚
V005-N00806.definition: 机体津液不足，人体各组织器官和孔窍失其濡润。

V005-N00806.label: 伤津
V005-N00806.aliases: 耗气伤津； 耗伤津液； 耗伤阴津； 津伤； 津液耗伤； 津液受伤； 津液灼伤； 亡津
V005-N00806.englishNames: Body Fluid Consumption; Impairment of Fluid
V005-N00806.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜津液失常｜津液不足
V005-N00806.definition: 指由于高热、汗出过多，或感受燥邪而导致的肺、胃津液损伤的病理变化。

V005-N00806.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00806.label: 伤津
V005-N00806.englishNames: impairment of fluid; Damage to thin body fluid; damage to fluid
V005-N00806.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00806.definition: A pathological state in which the thin, clear fluids are consumed.

V005-N00806.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00806.label: 伤津
V005-N00806.englishNames: damage to fluid; impairment of fluid

V005-N00806.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00806.label: 伤津
V005-N00806.definition: a general term for various impairments and loss of body fluid

V005-N00807.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00807.label: 津脱
V005-N00807.path: 第1部分 内科学｜急症
V005-N00807.definition: 津液大量急剧耗失，气阴欲脱，口唇焦裂，皮肤枯瘪，眼眶凹陷，关节不利，小便短少，大便干结，舌干无津，脉细弱,血压持续下降，低于90/60mmHg等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00807.label: 津脱
V005-N00807.englishNames: clear fluid depletion; fluid depletion; fluid collapse
V005-N00807.definition: 大汗伤津，或吐下伤津，造成津液大量脱失的病理变化。

V005-N00807.label: 津脱
V005-N00807.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜津液失常｜津液不足
V005-N00807.definition: 指人体津液大量脱失而亡阳的病理变化。

V005-N00807.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00807.label: 津脱
V005-N00807.englishNames: fluid depletion; fluid collapse; clear fluid depletion

V005-N00807.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00807.label: 津脱
V005-N00807.definition: a severe form of damage to fluid, usually due to profuse sweating, excessive vomiting or diarrhea

V005-N00809.label: 气随液脱
V005-N00809.englishNames: depletion of fluid involving qi desertion; qi prostration following liquid depletion; qi collapse due to humor depletion
V005-N00809.definition: 大汗、大吐、大泻，使津液大量丢失，气亦随津液大量外泄而脱失的危重病理变化。

V005-N00809.label: 气随液脱
V005-N00809.englishNames: Depletion of Fluid Involving Qi Desertion
V005-N00809.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜津液失常｜津液不足｜液脱
V005-N00809.definition: 指津液大量丢失，气失去依附而随津液外泄出现暴脱亡失的病理状态。

V005-N00809.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00809.label: 气随液脱
V005-N00809.englishNames: depletion of fluid involving qi desertion; Qi collapse following loss of thick fluids; qi prostration following liquid depletion; qi collapse due to humor depletion
V005-N00809.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00809.definition: A critical state in which a massive loss of bodily fluids causes sudden collapse/loss of yang qi.

V005-N00809.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00809.label: 气随液脱
V005-N00809.englishNames: qi collapse due to humor depletion
V005-N00809.definition: a pathological change in which qi collapse occurs following massive loss of fluid

V005-N00810.label: 气化无权
V005-N00810.definition: 由于阳气不足，气化作用失职，影响气、血、精、津液等的化生，导致津液代谢产物排除不利而贮留于体内的病理变化。

V005-N00810.label: 气化无权
V005-N00810.aliases: 气化不利； 气化失常； 气化失司
V005-N00810.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜津液失常
V005-N00810.definition: 指由于阳气不足，气化作用失职，影响气、血、精、津液等的化生，导致津液代谢产物排除不利而贮留于体内的病理变化。

V005-N00810.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
